name: Rob Bonta
subject: I spoke about what’s at stake — and how we fight back.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250901&t=1001&akid=1931%2E1088799%2EowlzN8 ]Rob Bonta

Last
week I joined California Democrats for a townhall on immigration — I want
to share some of my remarks with you because the stakes are too high to
stay silent.

I spoke about the dangerous, and at times unlawful, tactics Trump is using
to intimidate immigrant families and divide our communities — how he’s
cultivating fear, mistrust, and confusion.

How he’s bringing in military trucks. He’s sending federal agents in masks
and plainclothes into our communities. They’re driving unmarked vehicles
and jumping out of moving vans, refusing to identify themselves when
asked.

Trump’s tactics are dangerous and inhumane. His actions are damaging
community trust in law enforcement, disrupting our lives — and they are
deeply un-American.

I refuse to stand idly by while this administration terrorizes our
communities and repeatedly breaks the law.

That’s why in just 32 weeks, I’ve filed 39 lawsuits against Trump —
including:

* Blocking his attempt to end birthright citizenship
* Stopping him from tying vital federal funding to immigration
enforcement
* Challenging his illegal deployment of federal troops in Los Angeles

And at the California Department of Justice, we’re making sure people know
their rights. My office has published resources for immigrant families,
schools, and communities in multiple languages — because knowledge is
power.

Every lawsuit, every action, every resource takes support – but I can’t
keep up these fights unless I win re-election next year.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250901?refcode=em20250901-1931&refcode2=1931_1088799_owlzN8&akid=1931%2E1088799%2EowlzN8 ]Will you chip in today to my re-election campaign so I can keep
fighting back against Trump’s unlawful attacks and continue defending
California families?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250901?refcode=em20250901-1931&amount=5&refcode2=1931_1088799_owlzN8&akid=1931%2E1088799%2EowlzN8 ]Donate $5 »

California is the most diverse state in the nation — and that’s our
greatest strength. I’ll never stop fighting to protect it.

Thank you,
Rob

[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/1064?t=1002&akid=1931%2E1088799%2EowlzN8 ][IMG]

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=1931%2E1088799%2EowlzN8

Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 9/1/2025
body:
Special Labor Day Edition
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**September 1, 2025** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Readers,
Happy Labor Day from all of us at Rocky Mountain Voice. Today isn’t just another long weekend—it’s a chance to pause and honor the dignity of work, the grit of that first paycheck, and the responsibility that comes with showing up.
As our editor Jen Schumann reported in her recent piece, _[Show up and earn: First jobs, buying power and Colorado’s July numbers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_ , the lessons of hard work often begin with those first jobs. Whether it’s bagging groceries, swinging a hammer, or pulling espresso shots, those early shifts shape character as much as they shape a résumé. One leader recalled that the real takeaway wasn’t the pay—it was learning that “the little things count.”
Colorado’s [July jobs report](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) underscores why those opportunities matter. Employers added 3,700 nonfarm payroll jobs, led by construction. Average hourly earnings remain above the national average—$38.93 compared to $36.44 nationally—but challenges remain. The state’s overall unemployment sits at 4.5%, while the unemployment rate for teens between the ages of 16-19 is 20.1%. For young Coloradans, those entry-level jobs fit a rhythm the charts show—about one in three ages 15–24 worked on a typical day last year.
So today, as we fire up grills and gather with family, let’s remember [what Labor Day is really about](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): honoring the people who built this country and making sure the next generation has the same chance to learn, earn, and grow. Colorado’s future depends on it.
_**IYCMI, here's what happened during special session:**_ Lawmakers wrapped up Colorado’s special session with only a partial fix to the state’s massive budget gap. Democrats plugged about [$253 million of the $783 million shortfall](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) by ending certain tax breaks and revenue shifts, but left roughly $530 million in [unresolved cuts to Gov. Polis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and the state’s reserves.

Polis has already exercised that authority, signing an executive order to [cut $252.5 million from this year’s budget](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). The largest reductions fall on Medicaid provider rates and higher education, though reserves and new corporate tax revenue are also being tapped to cover the shortfall. While Democrats call the cuts a necessary response to federal budget losses, Republicans argue they stem from years of state overspending.
_**In short:** one-third of the problem was patched, [two-thirds punted](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), leaving taxpayers to wonder if real fiscal discipline will ever arrive in Denver._

_**Don’t miss this perspective:** One Colorado resident laid out a list of practical solutions for fixing the $783M budget deficit without raising taxes. Read the full commentary here: [The special session leaves Polis with a $783M deficit — here’s how he can fix it without new taxes.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_
Stay strong, stay bold, and stay in the fight.
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[A political refugee in Colorado: The painful choice to leave my homeland](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _After months of prayer, deliberation, and heartbreak, my wife and I have made the decision to leave Colorado. We’ve accepted an offer on our home in Castle Rock. For the first time in my life, I am saying goodbye to the state of my birth – the mountains where I learned to hike, the skyline I memorized as a child, the people and culture I have served, fought for, and loved._
**[From silence to the mic: Why young conservatives say CSU’s TPUSA event matters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Turning Point USA is bringing Charlie Kirk and the American Comeback Tour to Colorado State University (CSU) on Sept. 18. The chapter will host two events that day—a midday “Prove Me Wrong” debate session and an evening program at the Lory Student Center Ballrooms. Doors open at 5:30 p.m., with priority seating for CSU students, though community members are also welcome. Registration is required and first come, first served.

**[Colorado election results may violate 1946 Secret Ballots Amendment](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Colorado Constitution guarantees the right for citizens to vote in secret. Article VII, Section 8 states that all elections by the people shall be by ballot, and no ballots shall be marked in any way that would allow the ballot to be identified as the ballot of a particular person. And in 1946, Colorado voters approved the Secret Ballots Amendment that explicitly provided for secret ballots.
|
---
**STATE**
**[Polis says Colorado isn’t a sanctuary state but the laws say otherwise](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Gov. Jared Polis has distinguished himself in business and politics, yet he arguably missed his true calling — doing stand-up at a comedy club. He’d leave his audience in stitches. Case in point: His thigh-slapper the other day — about Colorado not being a sanctuary state._
**[Shots for Freedom: Colorado gun owners rally to push back against new restrictions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY HUEY LAUGESEN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _At a time when Colorado is at the forefront of the national war over the Second Amendment, it’s not enough to be indignant. We must be active. That’s why the Colorado State Shooting Association (CSSA) is proud to host the Shots for Freedom Range Weekend and Banquet, taking place in Colorado Springs September 20–21 at Magnum Shooting Center South._
**[Senator Sullivan’s “just another form” gun law remark goes unchecked by media as sheriffs warn of crippling costs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY COREY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Senator Sullivan’s dismissive rhetoric goes unchecked by the liberal media. Let me start with a quote from Post “reporter” Nick Coltrain’s article. “SB-3 does prohibit the sale of many semiautomatic weapons — unless the purchaser has completed a firearm education course..."_
__
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[When Violence Targets Conservatives, the Media Looks Away](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The nation is reeling after the tragic shooting at a Minneapolis Catholic school. Two children are dead, more than a dozen are injured, and the community is shattered. Investigators have identified the shooter as Robin M. Westman, and disturbing evidence has already surfaced: weapons scrawled with political messages, including “Kill Donald Trump."_
__
**[Teachers Unions Sent $50M to Progressive Groups Instead of Classrooms](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A public unions expert told Fox News Digital the NEA spends less than 10% of its budget on ‘representational activities’. Amid a trend of declining membership since the Supreme Court struck down mandatory union dues, the nation’s two largest teachers’ unions have poured tens of millions into left-wing causes, a new report from a conservative watchdog group finds.
**[Transgender Shooter Expressed Regret Over Transition Before Attacking School](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[NEW YORK POST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Transgender mass shooter Robin Westman confessed that he “was tired of being trans” and wished he “never brain-washed” himself in a manifesto posted online before he slaughtered two children and wounded dozens more at a Minneapolis church.

**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Colorado Officials Target Christian Bakery With Heavy-Handed Zoning Rules](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE FEDERALIST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A cherished French bakery in Jefferson County, Colorado, is facing potential closure because of the county’s harsh enforcement of exclusionary zoning regulations. This situation underscores how overly restrictive regulations create unnecessary hurdles that stifle entrepreneurship, especially when the local economy is struggling.

**[DU scales back DEI programs to avoid losing federal funding](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The University of Denver is scaling back its diversity, equity and inclusion work as it moves to comply with new directives from the Trump administration. In an interview with 9NEWS, Chancellor Jeremy Haefner said DU will no longer provide DEI training for staff and will end scholarships and programs once offered exclusively to students of specific racial groups.
**[From farm kid to parliamentarian: Gregory Carlson launches Fremont County commissioner bid](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Gregory Carlson, a Fremont County native known nationally for his work as a parliamentarian, announced his candidacy for District 2 commissioner on Aug. 26 at the Republican meeting in Florence.

**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Colorado’s Shift Left Sparks Growing Resentment in Neighboring States](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FLEETING WEST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Coloradans were once known for being friendly, modest, and considerate. That reputation has fundamentally shifted thanks to the last three million people who arrived and steamrolled the place._ __
**[The special session leaves Polis with a $783M deficit — here’s how he can fix it without new taxes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RUSS MINARY,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Governor Polis recently called—and lawmakers have now concluded—a special session aimed at addressing the estimated State budget deficit of $1.2 to 1.6 BILLION. That means that every man, woman and child in CO has to pay $208 more this year._
__

**[Swift, Rocky, and Oz: What Stories Teach Us About Being Human](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Yesterday morning’s Today show lineup truly felt like it was straight out of a movie, with the charming romance between Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift (Sincerely, CONGRATULATIONS!), a heartfelt nod to Rocky’s classic resilience (my go-to movie), and a stunning reimagining of The Wizard of Oz at The Sphere in Las Vegas (the four characters I highlight when teaching temperament)._
__

**[The Shield of Faith: The Final Move – Who Do You Want to Be?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

I was a hard rocker through and through. Zeppelin, Dio, Ozzy... those were my peeps. My soul leaned into guitar solos, not synthesizers._

clean_body: Special Labor Day Edition | | | | September 1, 2025 MONDAY NEWS DIGEST | | Dear Readers, Happy Labor Day from all of us at Rocky Mountain Voice. Today isn’t just another long weekend—it’s a chance to pause and honor the dignity of work, the grit of that first paycheck, and the responsibility that comes with showing up. As our editor Jen Schumann reported in her recent piece, , the lessons of hard work often begin with those first jobs. Whether it’s bagging groceries, swinging a hammer, or pulling espresso shots, those early shifts shape character as much as they shape a résumé. One leader recalled that the real takeaway wasn’t the pay—it was learning that “the little things count.” Colorado’s underscores why those opportunities matter. Employers added 3,700 nonfarm payroll jobs, led by construction. Average hourly earnings remain above the national average—$38.93 compared to $36.44 nationally—but challenges remain. The state’s overall unemployment sits at 4.5%, while the unemployment rate for teens between the ages of 16-19 is 20.1%. For young Coloradans, those entry-level jobs fit a rhythm the charts show—about one in three ages 15–24 worked on a typical day last year. So today, as we fire up grills and gather with family, let’s remember : honoring the people who built this country and making sure the next generation has the same chance to learn, earn, and grow. Colorado’s future depends on it. IYCMI, here's what happened during special session: Lawmakers wrapped up Colorado’s special session with only a partial fix to the state’s massive budget gap. Democrats plugged about by ending certain tax breaks and revenue shifts, but left roughly $530 million in and the state’s reserves. Polis has already exercised that authority, signing an executive order to . The largest reductions fall on Medicaid provider rates and higher education, though reserves and new corporate tax revenue are also being tapped to cover the shortfall. While Democrats call the cuts a necessary response to federal budget losses, Republicans argue they stem from years of state overspending. In short: one-third of the problem was patched, , leaving taxpayers to wonder if real fiscal discipline will ever arrive in Denver. Don’t miss this perspective: One Colorado resident laid out a list of practical solutions for fixing the $783M budget deficit without raising taxes. Read the full commentary here: Stay strong, stay bold, and stay in the fight. In liberty and truth, Heidi Ganahl | | | TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK BY C. J. GARBO, After months of prayer, deliberation, and heartbreak, my wife and I have made the decision to leave Colorado. We’ve accepted an offer on our home in Castle Rock. For the first time in my life, I am saying goodbye to the state of my birth – the mountains where I learned to hike, the skyline I memorized as a child, the people and culture I have served, fought for, and loved. BY JEN SCHUMANN, Turning Point USA is bringing Charlie Kirk and the American Comeback Tour to Colorado State University (CSU) on Sept. 18. The chapter will host two events that day—a midday “Prove Me Wrong” debate session and an evening program at the Lory Student Center Ballrooms. Doors open at 5:30 p.m., with priority seating for CSU students, though community members are also welcome. Registration is required and first come, first served. BY MIKE O'DONNELL, The Colorado Constitution guarantees the right for citizens to vote in secret. Article VII, Section 8 states that all elections by the people shall be by ballot, and no ballots shall be marked in any way that would allow the ballot to be identified as the ballot of a particular person. And in 1946, Colorado voters approved the Secret Ballots Amendment that explicitly provided for secret ballots. | STATE Gov. Jared Polis has distinguished himself in business and politics, yet he arguably missed his true calling — doing stand-up at a comedy club. He’d leave his audience in stitches. Case in point: His thigh-slapper the other day — about Colorado not being a sanctuary state. BY HUEY LAUGESEN, At a time when Colorado is at the forefront of the national war over the Second Amendment, it’s not enough to be indignant. We must be active. That’s why the Colorado State Shooting Association (CSSA) is proud to host the Shots for Freedom Range Weekend and Banquet, taking place in Colorado Springs September 20–21 at Magnum Shooting Center South. BY COREY GAINES, Senator Sullivan’s dismissive rhetoric goes unchecked by the liberal media. Let me start with a quote from Post “reporter” Nick Coltrain’s article. “SB-3 does prohibit the sale of many semiautomatic weapons — unless the purchaser has completed a firearm education course..." | NATIONAL BY C. J. GARBO, The nation is reeling after the tragic shooting at a Minneapolis Catholic school. Two children are dead, more than a dozen are injured, and the community is shattered. Investigators have identified the shooter as Robin M. Westman, and disturbing evidence has already surfaced: weapons scrawled with political messages, including “Kill Donald Trump." A public unions expert told Fox News Digital the NEA spends less than 10% of its budget on ‘representational activities’. Amid a trend of declining membership since the Supreme Court struck down mandatory union dues, the nation’s two largest teachers’ unions have poured tens of millions into left-wing causes, a new report from a conservative watchdog group finds. Transgender mass shooter Robin Westman confessed that he “was tired of being trans” and wished he “never brain-washed” himself in a manifesto posted online before he slaughtered two children and wounded dozens more at a Minneapolis church. | LOCAL A cherished French bakery in Jefferson County, Colorado, is facing potential closure because of the county’s harsh enforcement of exclusionary zoning regulations. This situation underscores how overly restrictive regulations create unnecessary hurdles that stifle entrepreneurship, especially when the local economy is struggling. The University of Denver is scaling back its diversity, equity and inclusion work as it moves to comply with new directives from the Trump administration. In an interview with 9NEWS, Chancellor Jeremy Haefner said DU will no longer provide DEI training for staff and will end scholarships and programs once offered exclusively to students of specific racial groups. BY JEN SCHUMANN, Gregory Carlson, a Fremont County native known nationally for his work as a parliamentarian, announced his candidacy for District 2 commissioner on Aug. 26 at the Republican meeting in Florence. | COMMENTARY Coloradans were once known for being friendly, modest, and considerate. That reputation has fundamentally shifted thanks to the last three million people who arrived and steamrolled the place. BY RUSS MINARY, Governor Polis recently called—and lawmakers have now concluded—a special session aimed at addressing the estimated State budget deficit of $1.2 to 1.6 BILLION. That means that every man, woman and child in CO has to pay $208 more this year. BY DRAKE HUNTER, Yesterday morning’s Today show lineup truly felt like it was straight out of a movie, with the charming romance between Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift (Sincerely, CONGRATULATIONS!), a heartfelt nod to Rocky’s classic resilience (my go-to movie), and a stunning reimagining of The Wizard of Oz at The Sphere in Las Vegas (the four characters I highlight when teaching temperament). name: Scott Baugh
subject: Thank You! And Check This Out!
body:
We ran a hard-fought campaign for Congress, and we came close. It would not have been possible without your help!
---
If you are not able to see this mail, click [here](https://h86sw.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/mr/sh/1t6AVsd2XFnIGF9VAxjvG3qN8XLusT/6CUTHLLMLSaj)
| | | | |
> FROM THE DESK OF **SCOTT R. BAUGH**
> **FORMER CANDIDATE FOR CONGRESS** Dear Friends, It’s been a few months since you heard from me, and I wanted to **thank you** for all you did to help me in my race for Congress. _We were outspent $29 million to $11 million and came very close._ Your support was vital and extremely encouraging to me. Thank you again! We are living in perhaps the most volatile political environment our state and our country have ever witnessed. The volume of information is overwhelming, so I'd like to introduce you to a resource that has been invaluable to me. **My great friend and highly respected conservative strategist in California, Jon Fleischman, has launched a new project on Substack called “So, Does It Matter?” -- a site where he writes prolifically about California politics.** For many years, I have valued and benefitted from Jon's insight, candor, and deep commitment to advancing the principles we share. **In all candor, I was blown away when I subscribed to Jon’s newsletter.** Every day, I get something insightful in my inbox. For example, his recent posts show how Republicans will get royally hosed by Gavin Newsom’s new gerrymander that will take Republicans from a 43-9 minority representation in Congress to a 48-4 representation. That’s right - Republicans regularly get at least 40% of the vote in California, but this gerrymander reduces Republicans to just 8% of the representation. Jon tracks Gavin Newsom like a bloodhound and follows the race to succeed him. Jon writes about statewide politics, national politics as they affect us here, and local politics. Some of his work on San Francisco and Los Angeles is enough to make your head spin. _But enough of my description - please see for yourself what Jon presents on his Substack._ **Recent Columns from So Does It Matter** Here are three pieces Jon has written recently. It was hard to pick these, as there are so many great ones...
>
> – [California's Redistricting Showdown: Newsom's Trump Gambit Faces A Jump Ball](ttps://www.sodoesitmatter.com/p/californias-redistricting-showdown?utm_source=brevo&utm_campaign=Baugh Appeal For SDIM&utm_medium=email)– [California Patriot Profile: Orange County Sheriff Don Barnes](https://h86sw.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDg0fVrEAGSVSif0wSgZN/sDIgPzrTeuSC) – [New California High Speed Rail Report: Newsom's Presidential Albatross?](https://h86sw.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE8LNiHcWMNfimUOlRQHR/gQ_CUoFDvMK8) I’m sending you this note because I enjoy what Jon is doing so much that I want to share it with you. Jon’s my friend, and I know he would really appreciate it if you could take a look. Sixty percent of his content is always free, and you can unlock the other 40% at a very modest monthly rate. Check it out — I think you’ll be glad you did! Oh, there is a slight chance you've already received this from me; if so, I was able to thank you twice! [ _www.SoDoesItMatter.com_](https://h86sw.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsEag5ui0sSIpyqJmaQ9zV/ng67iut1cbyr "http://www.sodoesitmatter.com/") Warmly, **Scott Baugh**
---
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://h86sw.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/un/v2/sh/1t6AVsdYhqSR1mM7hQsVgy8EiUC0JV/KNnx6BGFqWGF)
[ ](https://h86sw.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/tracking/?utm_campaign=035e1d9e01a96ee4e121c3360b298892&utm_medium=email&utm_source=logo_mailin)

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Sanders Calls For RFK Jr. to Resign as HHS Secretary, Warns of "Public Health Crisis"
body:

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Our constitutional freedoms are more than just words on paper
body:
A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State, the right of the people...

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5uo/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**_The Second Amendment to the United States Constitution_****:**
**_A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State, the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed._**
Patriot, our Founding Fathers knew that the right to bear arms is fundamental to maintaining a free nation.
The same patriots that bravely declared American Independence and fought to win the Revolutionary War were well aware of the dangers of disarming citizens. They knew that only a nation comprised of citizens capable of defending themselves and their communities would be able to resist tyranny.
And after securing Independence and ratifying our nation’s constitution our Founders ratified the Bill of Rights, including the 2nd Amendment, to enshrine our liberty for future generations of Americans.
**Now it is up to us to secure these rights and pass them on to our children!**
The late, great Justice Antonin Scalia once cautioned at a Senate Judiciary hearing that every banana republic and dictatorship claims to protect the rights of their people but they are “just words on paper”, what the Framers would call a “parchment guarantee”.
Benjamin Franklin commented at the Constitutional Convention that we were given a republic “if you can keep it”.
**The reason America is a free country today is because for 250 years brave men and women like you stood up to defend our God-given freedoms from enemies both foreign and domestic.**
**_[To commemorate 250 years of American exceptionalism and commitment to protecting freedom I am offering my patriotic supporters a chance to win one of my favorite firearms](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5uo/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_ :**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5uo/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[ENTER TODAY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5uo/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, there is so much to celebrate this year as we approach the 250th anniversary of our Declaration of Independence.
But not all of our fellow Americans appreciate the spirit of 1776.
**Right now, in the halls of Congress and throughout the Swamp, Deep State bureaucrats and power hungry politicians are working together to undermine the rights our ancestors have fought a quarter of a millennium to give to us.**
Both Democrats and RINO Republicans are working together to open our borders, implement the trans agenda, and impose gun control that would make it impossible for Americans to own a firearm like my M249.
That’s why I am working with President Donald Trump to protect **Faith** , **Family** , and **Freedom**. As Chairwoman of the DOGE subcommittee and one of the loudest conservative voices in the MAGA movement, I am fighting everyday for our America First agenda.
[STAND WITH MTG](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5uo/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Fellow patriot, I will always fight for your constitutional freedoms including the right to keep and bear arms no matter what the Swamp throws at me.
**_[I hope that you enter today for a chance to win my M249 and make a contribution of whatever you can to my America First campaign for Congress to help me continue defending our freedoms and values](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5uo/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
I appreciate the support of every patriot that stands with me, with your support we will hold the line and give our posterity a free nation.

_For America,_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5uo/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5uo/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

### **_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b5up/?__vbtrk=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE1NTI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=315528&trkid=890745049&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: The Flyover
subject: Massive Quake, Monorail Rescue, and Mirror Scarab
body:
A 6.0 magnitude [earthquake struck eastern Afghanistan](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO2zAQRU9DdTTIkSWZBQsvAlXZNClSCiNxaM2aIh2StrC3D-QrpJx5wMf_78_n9IkcON5-4Ua2-jRF2kugWilPG5bCL_r7xDttKaaMHDKV5TmBgk4qIxVMDjl8T-fGWU8E1DZk9dD1FzUMvWpW60yv9eL94Lw21JvO9IZw7mYEPZhL17A90pRRoJUy2pxcSwa06-fLvCy91-KsyHFN-fSVONaVfPhOL8qnJW1NsGutjyLaq4BRwLjv-2kr8WACRoryNgsYj1EHTDk4AeOWMsm6YpQXpeSdQyAnMToJx83x65mPh6-UJWGu61uBXLkWif62YuRSMQoYMcvrVf_8gPYu2jEt7ET74-PwSXv5TfnRZOseO4fApR_EWd025PBuXv9L98vCvwAAAP__49mU_w) late Sunday, killing more than 800 people and injuring nearly 3,000.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u3DAQhU8jdbsYkRIpFSwCGNs5bUpiTA53J-GPQlJr-PaBnCAXcPveh5mH78erfUWOnO_fMZHpodhM7y1S71Rtwtb4Sb8P_EWp5FKRY6XmDitALBfYLiCsR44fdh69CUSC5Ehm0otaQWsF48MEmEkFDIJmFybtdXACQ1AC3aLnVY1szmuwgZgAtmm7ekmbmLx6W9-cU2EaZiDPvdTrz8K5PyjEj_KkenUljdE8et_bIL8N4jaIG-cntX7d0WErJ3HG8nb0ZFs5qqNBvlBCjoNQZ5jI85EG-bIj-8uOtWeq7cH7v95h2pHv-ZP4X04rXOQi7V8FR-aOdgK9rFLCCttYjd_fOUZuSg8z3M-Hn3P7lxw_jfgTAAD___OLkbM) | |
# Tuesday, September 2, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1901, Vice President Theodore Roosevelt spoke at the Minnesota State Fair, where he quoted an [old proverb he lived by](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQAF8DnZFtwByFizR0lzYlWuzlcM5g4t0D8fvo8oX0oxlpvu7jHUIM2-MTVrQ8p3HDkyIyYx5XIAoH_rzgiWvaUoYQM5J7jVrqVsheSD16CPEam9LbGVFjXaJVXWtusuuMLBfrZ-m61rUtGOzB3KBXpnOt8ko2tZtkGezbJnuplZS96itfY6-VN9Ntcs7Mqmgk-sApV98pbLzgHK90YK5cWstoF-adivqj0EOhh_M8qxU3hjjHRPRmCj3siZgKPfCCyaeMIqdEeGBkQTvCU1CaOV4CNi8c5HwJEFN4COLgnmW2fj9DjIFMVzTysUKIf3H-17HD6t8AAAD__7pbgxM): _"Speak softly and carry a big stick."_ Historians have never found a citation for the line before Roosevelt uttered it, and they believe he actually coined it himself earlier in his career. Today, we report on a father at Hersheypark whose [quick instincts saved a child](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAUhJ8GOqOD-XXh4jZ0e9uU6Ng-LM4ae2N7Qbx9xCp5gnSfNNJovvm4zTe0zvr7f9xI5iXMno7kKGeK84Yp2Z2-XvigLfgQ0bpISb9mDrxjIBjw2aB159yWRi5EnJqSZD10_QjD0EO5SlIKxFgLJeoFF6WUFkqormmHQcNiutLKqw0E8BpA1KIyDQlem16NSut-qYsWyNgcYvUZrM8rLe4MO8VKh610cs35mYrmX8Gngk_HcVRe6cviygs-XVjw6ZXYD5mIG2ar2duFmAonO9A9rL8zcrRjJsN-fdlKMa10sifGB4vaI-djA00ZpXke1jmb-qFo4b6hde9F-U837pJ_BwAA__8QKIpN) wandering on the monorail tracks. Theme parks have a way of sticking in our memories. Do you still remember the first time you went to one? Reply to this email and let us know. Today's edition is slightly abbreviated as our staff spends the holiday with their families. There's no _Flyover Podcast_ episode either, as our hosts do the same. We'll be back in full force on Wednesday. Put today's sponsor, [Pacaso](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u3DAQhU8jdbsYkRIpFSwCGNs5bUpiTA53J-GPQlJr-PaBnCAXcPveh5mH78erfUWOnO_fMZHpodhM7y1S71Rtwtb4Sb8P_EWp5FKRY6XmDitALBfYLiCsR44fdh69CUSC5Ehm0otaQWsF48MEmEkFDIJmFybtdXACQ1AC3aLnVY1szmuwgZgAtmm7ekmbmLx6W9-cU2EaZiDPvdTrz8K5PyjEj_KkenUljdE8et_bIL8N4jaIG-cntX7d0WErJ3HG8nb0ZFs5qqNBvlBCjoNQZ5jI85EG-bIj-8uOtWeq7cH7v95h2pHv-ZP4X04rXOQi7V8FR-aOdgK9rFLCCttYjd_fOUZuSg8z3M-Hn3P7lxw_jfgTAAD___OLkbM), on your watchlist for your next investment opportunity.
|
---
## Massive Quake Kills Over 800 in Afghanistan
A 6.0 magnitude [earthquake struck eastern Afghanistan](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO2zAQRU9DdTTIkSWZBQsvAlXZNClSCiNxaM2aIh2StrC3D-QrpJx5wMf_78_n9IkcON5-4Ua2-jRF2kugWilPG5bCL_r7xDttKaaMHDKV5TmBgk4qIxVMDjl8T-fGWU8E1DZk9dD1FzUMvWpW60yv9eL94Lw21JvO9IZw7mYEPZhL17A90pRRoJUy2pxcSwa06-fLvCy91-KsyHFN-fSVONaVfPhOL8qnJW1NsGutjyLaq4BRwLjv-2kr8WACRoryNgsYj1EHTDk4AeOWMsm6YpQXpeSdQyAnMToJx83x65mPh6-UJWGu61uBXLkWif62YuRSMQoYMcvrVf_8gPYu2jEt7ET74-PwSXv5TfnRZOseO4fApR_EWd025PBuXv9L98vCvwAAAP__49mU_w) late Sunday, killing more than 800 people and injuring nearly 3,000. Entire [villages were flattened](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAUBOCnMR3IP2Bw4WKlFdIW2XZLdLAPcDbGzrWdRHn7q-QVbj3SaL75d1kuQIHi_hdOtHVLS8RnCVgr5uWEUuiBX3e44pliykAhY3H3RXI5tNy0XC4eKLyWvvF2Q5SoGrRiHPTEx1Hz5rBeDHziWkkYjAMzTl4YQK7W3plhdL4h-27jhkvBuRGm8wqNFF6v0-qc3gTrOXqqKXf_E8V64BZe6YG5c-lsgj1qvRWmfjE5MznD6t6Cbk_vmMn5T6yYI1RKEQKTs25P2CPVu8cWIdfjw2tLzXTF0sK2HxCpVIhMzqWm_GJqJs_UbyEH0RvNVZOtvz0pBCp6ZD3fT6DwWVN_dOHDyu8AAAD__zaYhmc) in the remote, mountainous region, where clay-built homes crumbled and blocked roads hampered rescue efforts. The quake's shallow depth--just 5 miles--amplified the devastation, leaving survivors trapped and hospitals overwhelmed. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFvgzAUhH-N2UD2I9gweOjClq4d0QM_wmsMTm0HlH9fkf6Ebqc76U7ffV2HK7Ln7faJK9k8h2GjI3nKmeKwYkq8088T77SGLURkHylNzwEkNKXsSgmDQ_av4VI4OxMB1QVZZRrdSmO0LBbbKlejNo0zBluFoMwMo0LTGuy0UU3B9myTnQQlZae6ytXUgXJ6bMdp0rMSF0mOc4jVd-AtLzT7V9gpVlNYC2-XnB9J1B8CegH9cRzVNKaT4swF9KcU0ON8W3DjlHErCWNe3ljlA-9_3hiioyigL6J1j4O956SNuMjbiuzfW_lfB-0WfgMAAP__XNR7rg). Taliban officials and aid agencies have launched airlifts and appealed for international assistance as the country reels from ongoing crises, including drought, hunger, and aid shortages.
## Boy Rescued from Hersheypark Monorail
A young boy was safely rescued Saturday evening after he was spotted walking alone atop a closed monorail track at Hersheypark in Pennsylvania. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAUhJ8GOqOD-XXh4jZ0e9uU6Ng-LM4ae2N7Qbx9xCp5gnSfNNJovvm4zTe0zvr7f9xI5iXMno7kKGeK84Yp2Z2-XvigLfgQ0bpISb9mDrxjIBjw2aB159yWRi5EnJqSZD10_QjD0EO5SlIKxFgLJeoFF6WUFkqormmHQcNiutLKqw0E8BpA1KIyDQlem16NSut-qYsWyNgcYvUZrM8rLe4MO8VKh610cs35mYrmX8Gngk_HcVRe6cviygs-XVjw6ZXYD5mIG2ar2duFmAonO9A9rL8zcrRjJsN-fdlKMa10sifGB4vaI-djA00ZpXke1jmb-qFo4b6hde9F-U837pJ_BwAA__8QKIpN). The child, reported missing around 5 p.m., had wandered into a secured area and climbed onto an elevated Capital BlueCross Monorail, which was not operating at the time. John Sampson, a father from Bucks County who was visiting the park, said his "[dad instincts kicked in](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5CAUhE-Ds9d64J9uBw42cTabbmiBKQ_sYOgFui3ffuW5wiSVlPSpvvrzsXxoH3z8_K13THVLS8RRAmpFXnZdin_j30t_YU8xZe1DRllfi2LVE4_EarHah3PpGjttgELbYJL3fnjw_T5w46aeNdqhlYNhvY6deRir7GhM16GX6Lnx00XjkZVkHuV4sy1GJe1gHmZdh02KjmF9Tfn2N_lYHbZwpjfybU17EyZX67OI9pdQs1BzPJ-p1KsSar7AQs08XiGFml-FLj-hZoecyGpLFmXN3qDQnnbESg70LQlLJp10uESHjhYZllKsiRxycTifOn9R9hYkmWkDKvlI1YG0z0LNTZ7s8_Ah-DLcRcefu_bhe3P90dHvSf0PAAD__yqdkwM)" when he saw the child teetering on the edge. He climbed onto a snack stand roof, jumped onto the track, and carried the boy to safety. The child, who had been missing for about 20 minutes, was unharmed and quickly reunited with his family.
## Biologists Use Classic Rock to Deter Wolves
U.S. Department of Agriculture biologists are [using drones and classic rock](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL0SnCAUhZ8GO3bw-ktBkYZu06Z0EK4rWQQDVx3fPmNeIfU5880536_39DY--Pj5aTZUtKQp4lUCEmGeNlOKP_HPYb64pZiy8SFjsccEAjouJBcwOePDPbWVUwsiYFOhqoeuH8Uw9KJalZuF6U1tZjF3o50NzE66VjbdIN3Q9q7y6qEJKaAWQtby5RqUULt-Hmdr-6VmrUDnKeXX7-QjrbiEO52YXzZtVVAr0V5Y84OBZqDjvadCT8RAP2AGWowMdFMz0Efhzz8G2ljuLF9N4VcKJxZO6xEd5kL5sF_uI8_Jfn18-vwyN6fE95wILXFriAIy0FVWbr98CL70A2vFZzM-_JtF_-XyVPA3AAD__781iZs) to prevent gray wolves from attacking livestock near the California-Oregon border. The drones blast loud, unfamiliar sounds, like AC/DC's _Thunderstruck_ and argument clips from the movie _Marriage Story, _which startle the wolves and drive them away from the cattle herds. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u4zAQBOCnoToKyxX1V7C4Rp2vORxSCityZTOmRIekZfjtA-UVUg8wg28-LvOFfPD79S9tbMoa551fOXApnOaNcvYHfz3pzlvcYyIfEmf7nBGwlTBKwNmRD-9ZV86szMhNxUb1bTdA33dQ3Qytioal6ZTWymrqgYD1Ygdi6AGtrrw522AEVACjGmvX8IjKdcuwWNutSmhg50tM9Wf0e7nxGt7x4FTbuFXB3Ep5ZNH8ETgJnGixp6C-xjMWOP3_J3A6vOMocErR3uX2zN7KN4fTLR8pFrZFWiolsHzFcHCWClvVql63VTLu8fIh-Nz1QsN1Ix9-lsuv7joMfgcAAP__8JN_WA). The approach plays on wolves' aversion to novel stimuli and has proven more effective than electric fences or guard dogs. Gray wolves, once nearly wiped out, have rebounded across the Rockies and Northwest, putting ranchers on edge. While the $20,000 drones offer short-term relief, experts and ranchers alike caution that the wolves may eventually catch on.

clean_body: A 6.0 magnitude late Sunday, killing more than 800 people and injuring nearly 3,000. | | | | | | Tuesday, September 2, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1901, Vice President Theodore Roosevelt spoke at the Minnesota State Fair, where he quoted an : "Speak softly and carry a big stick." Historians have never found a citation for the line before Roosevelt uttered it, and they believe he actually coined it himself earlier in his career. Today, we report on a father at Hersheypark whose wandering on the monorail tracks. Theme parks have a way of sticking in our memories. Do you still remember the first time you went to one? Reply to this email and let us know. Today's edition is slightly abbreviated as our staff spends the holiday with their families. There's no Flyover Podcast episode either, as our hosts do the same. We'll be back in full force on Wednesday. Put today's sponsor, , on your watchlist for your next investment opportunity. | Massive Quake Kills Over 800 in Afghanistan A 6.0 magnitude late Sunday, killing more than 800 people and injuring nearly 3,000. Entire in the remote, mountainous region, where clay-built homes crumbled and blocked roads hampered rescue efforts. The quake's shallow depth--just 5 miles--amplified the devastation, leaving survivors trapped and hospitals overwhelmed. . Taliban officials and aid agencies have launched airlifts and appealed for international assistance as the country reels from ongoing crises, including drought, hunger, and aid shortages. Boy Rescued from Hersheypark Monorail A young boy was safely rescued Saturday evening after he was spotted walking alone atop a closed monorail track at Hersheypark in Pennsylvania. . The child, reported missing around 5 p.m., had wandered into a secured area and climbed onto an elevated Capital BlueCross Monorail, which was not operating at the time. John Sampson, a father from Bucks County who was visiting the park, said his "" when he saw the child teetering on the edge. He climbed onto a snack stand roof, jumped onto the track, and carried the boy to safety. The child, who had been missing for about 20 minutes, was unharmed and quickly reunited with his family. Biologists Use Classic Rock to Deter Wolves U.S. Department of Agriculture biologists are to prevent gray wolves from attacking livestock near the California-Oregon border. The drones blast loud, unfamiliar sounds, like AC/DC's Thunderstruck and argument clips from the movie Marriage Story, which startle the wolves and drive them away from the cattle herds. . The approach plays on wolves' aversion to novel stimuli and has proven more effective than electric fences or guard dogs. Gray wolves, once nearly wiped out, have rebounded across the Rockies and Northwest, putting ranchers on edge. While the $20,000 drones offer short-term relief, experts and ranchers alike caution that the wolves may eventually catch on. ## In an emotional 1-on-1 interview, one of America's most respected business magnate and investor, CEO of SpaceX, Tesla, Inc. and Twitter, Inc., [Elon Musk](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1875789/VaHR0cHM6Ly9nby51c21hZ2F6aW5laW5zaWRlci5jb20vYTBkNmE0ZGItYTQxMS00ZmJlLTg3ZDctNDkwYjZjYjI4NDk5/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsbXBCU2FiQQ/gaLbFYg/sbn29f6af66), revealed that he wouldn't be where he is now.

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1875789/VaHR0cHM6Ly9nby51c21hZ2F6aW5laW5zaWRlci5jb20vYTBkNmE0ZGItYTQxMS00ZmJlLTg3ZDctNDkwYjZjYjI4NDk5/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsbXBCU2FiQQ/gaLbFYg/sbn29f6af66)
## He went on to say that he honestly didn't expect things to get this big and he knew he would receive scrutiny from fans and sponsors for this, but he felt it was a time...

Here is what He said: ["This was a really, really difficult decision to tell the truth..."](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1875789/VaHR0cHM6Ly9nby51c21hZ2F6aW5laW5zaWRlci5jb20vYTBkNmE0ZGItYTQxMS00ZmJlLTg3ZDctNDkwYjZjYjI4NDk5/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsbXBCU2FiQQ/gaLbFYg/sbn29f6af66)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Super-High-Voltage Power Lines, Most Accessible Cities, and Savannah Bananas
body:
Plans to build three extra-high-voltage transmission lines from Central Texas to the Permian Basin have [raised concerns](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAMhp8mbKmMSykZMtzC1ltvRIEYiBQSlPigfftTeIXbbOvT_-vzz2t4GeddWL7NRprfcxwCndkTM6Uh_-6UVresR_RsFtrjScm7QAMCPiQoCThY4_xnaCqrR7CqrkjXz0fb1dAprFYNaGBuR7TGdjDa-a7GSQHWj2lW5jnbyukSBuVWQ43qBkAKVa2wbWw3m0k0QNZxTDdeielt8uw_8aB0m-JWeb0y71ncvwT2AvvRLSMFmymwC-QLI7AvFQJ76K65YMkEKwOd8qTM8oqVl58sgnJPcds5S1-wKYZM6TDsYijLRClkgX2VtN1P573L7VM0sGzGXY0V_--Xh8a_AAAA__-GvYqf) among some landowners along the proposed routes. The 765-kilovolt lines would require a 200-foot right of way with 19-story towers every 1,000 feet.

## High-Voltage Power Lines Raise Concerns
Plans to build three extra-high-voltage transmission lines from Central Texas to the Permian Basin have [raised concerns](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAMhp8mbKmMSykZMtzC1ltvRIEYiBQSlPigfftTeIXbbOvT_-vzz2t4GeddWL7NRprfcxwCndkTM6Uh_-6UVresR_RsFtrjScm7QAMCPiQoCThY4_xnaCqrR7CqrkjXz0fb1dAprFYNaGBuR7TGdjDa-a7GSQHWj2lW5jnbyukSBuVWQ43qBkAKVa2wbWw3m0k0QNZxTDdeielt8uw_8aB0m-JWeb0y71ncvwT2AvvRLSMFmymwC-QLI7AvFQJ76K65YMkEKwOd8qTM8oqVl58sgnJPcds5S1-wKYZM6TDsYijLRClkgX2VtN1P573L7VM0sGzGXY0V_--Xh8a_AAAA__-GvYqf) among some landowners along the proposed routes. The 765-kilovolt lines would require a 200-foot right of way with 19-story towers every 1,000 feet. The $33 billion project aims to provide power to the fast-growing region, where electricity demand is [expected to swell](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuqzAQRL_GdEbLBgguXLyGLq-9JVrwAisZbBkHkr-_Sn7h9jNHM-fnMTxIvOzLf9rY5tcchp2vw3POnIbjGTmtsqxn8JkWjuHi5GXnAQEbDUYDDo7Ev4e6cHYEZ6qCbXVv2q6CzmCxWqjRtAabG03omnFssGmnGpuZYK47mAqxHxgYwKqCCk0JwAZNZbCtXTfTpGpgJzmkMq-c-UXH7N_h5FROYSu8XXOOh7r9U9gr7K_rKp9ZvOS3k5M_GYX955TC_tvWiZenpxzSoSnGFE7WkdMmtOuRDtl1Yi80fhk6etoV9nfssDUK-yJZFy_xXo72rmpYNhL_XZL_5u-0-BsAAP__F7KGWg) to 26 gigawatts—about a third of ERCOT's entire load during the peak of summer—by 2038. AEP Texas and CPS Energy have proposed a [370-mile route](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1ywyAQxfHToM6aZY0-KCjSqHPalBpkVmJnkNAAMfbtM_YV0r_3K_4_t_lmOfCxfdudTHmucT6o5kClUJrz70nJ8-YfMRS70RkrpcAHzQjYXUBfAGdnObxm1TizgNOyISOHrh8ljBobbzqFix4WJXscB-jsih249aqvTvao3NKweWOgAaUEiboFII1aauyVG1d7FwrIcYmpLZ4KPW1ewys-KLX3uDfB-FLOLK5fAieBU621tXSWZI-8c84cj_dO4PS5Cpx8rDa5S44hF76TwKlJxp2VQ-DcD0LBtlsOH738r8nD4F8AAAD__ygldsA) between San Antonio and Fort Stockton, while the Lower Colorado River Authority and Oncor have proposed routes from [Bell County to Schleicher County](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3ynDAQw5_GdGZsHx_nwkUaun_alIzPLLDJYjP2HhxvnyFVUqeTCv1G0o-v8csjYVy--w0cf-Y0RjgLATPksbx3yCsu65GI_QJ7OiETRhiNMq1UViozTh7pGptqci81WV2B033bPbV6WlOtruvto3tYmPtGT0qHZ6tCOxs1e5jBNrZCd8OUVUZrpY2tlQJrrLama6bn7INoFEzIKde8AsPHl5mudECuQ9oqcivzXsTjmzCDMMN5njWF7OuUF2EGiJCX6xYEgTMGydnHsmEpmKIww99W3ttkTm_GeIdfQCRDeke-JPjCkpN84SJXJJJ918pfxz84uef0EwILM1TZTfuJRFi6XjRq2TzSn8L8fzcfzvwOAAD__25_lcM) and from [there to Ward County](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGTpCAUhH8NZlj4xkEJCC4xm0svtFAe-m4QLGB05t9fedFuvFl30F9195_H-DDkKSy_zYa6vF0cA57ZYymYxvzaMa20rEf0xSy4xxOTp4AjCLhzobiA0Rryn7GtrJ6EVU2Fuunusm9Er6BatZndZJ3rFUgpWgdOdtNNdh3aSZhbDxXpCyaUgKYRDahaCFSgGgWytb0zM2sFWiox1WXFgm-Tnf_EA1M9x63yei1lz-z2i8HAYDjPs_ZzMnVMC4MBA6blcwmPc0k085JMyBvlTDEwGL5afm3jKb4KhSs80cJX8p6XyLMJlnvzRN7JO38e3zh8T_EvzoXBUCVt95O8pyw71oplM-T_Ny0_-_fQ8C8AAP__6a2Tcw). ## Texas Cities Among Nation's Most Accessible
Houston, Dallas, and San Antonio are among the most accessible cities in the U.S. for people with limited mobility, [according to a study](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3OozAQheGrgc5oPOEnLlxsQ5dtt0QGDzCSwciexMndr7J7CV_9SOdI75_H9HAc-Nx-u4OsvNc4nVRyIBFKU35elHbe9lcM4ja6YqEU-KQJATsFRgFO3nH4TG3t7Qze6JqsHrr-ruFusN6tMd1sqB8IZk2uc2bGdh38eluxB-_mmu13DAyg1qDRNABk0GiDfevvq1uqFsizxNTITkJvl9fwiS9KzRKPOthd5MrV7VeFY4VjKaUp7vT_ucLRJeElUIWj7KSOmEW5ZaGceQ6kFhamrPhUX33mOll_FQ6Bcz9ULWyH4_DvSH6W52XxbwAAAP__Ujx7tg) by travel website Wander that examined walkability scores and the number of wheelchair-friendly attractions, trails, and public transit stations. Houston edged Dallas for the No. 4 ranking, with an accessibility score of 9.45/10. It was recognized for having the [most wheelchair-friendly trails](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u6jAQxfHVOB2RPTgfLly8Jh2vvWU04EliaYgje8Cw-yvYwu3P-RX_n8t8wchxX__jnby8ljTvVAuTCOW5PA7KW1y3Z2LBlY5UKXPcaQYN3Um7k4Y5YOT3bJvgrzo405A3Q9ePRo8Oms2frSUzYHc1ONAYHCwBgl3CSLcz9tg10X8w7TQYow24Vmty4IyD3oZxwZuymkKUlFvZSOiFZeF3elJub-nesN9EjqLO_xRMCqZaa4vMkjFy-SwUTI-iYPo-FUxbehRJe5N9OGpkjqUflNXrHSN_Rflbh6eH3wAAAP__fGBzLQ), with nearly 63% of its 158 trails earning the designation. Dallas earned an accessibility score of 9.40/10 for the No. 5 spot. San Antonio's score of 8.91/10 [tied with San Francisco](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCnMR1ovSEEFy6uocu1V6LFXsDSgpHthPD2p5zuDf7-02hm_jzHJwUJ-_KbNrblM8dx5zMLl8JpzK-D0xqW9R2l0MJHPDlJ2HlEwHsNpgYcPQW5xrbydgJvdMVWP-5dr6E3WK2W-dYiGZp83803DQ64Yze32LLHiVwV7DcMDKDWoNE0AGzQaINd6_uZnGqBfSgxNWXlwh_Ks1zxzalxcavErqUcWd1-KRwUDud5NtuVaae9xD3EL1I4fFcpHCQ6EoUDpRKcsMIh017_pzU5xzmHSbjO5eWvGqFHRA3NsR5Vsv44g0jI3UO1sGwU5F-F8rPj3hb_BgAA__9IFIQ9) for the No. 10 ranking. "_Accessibility should never be an afterthought; it's part of creating exceptional travel experiences_ ," said Wander Chief of Staff Matt Kowalewski.

clean_body: Plans to build three extra-high-voltage transmission lines from Central Texas to the Permian Basin have among some landowners along the proposed routes. The 765-kilovolt lines would require a 200-foot right of way with 19-story towers every 1,000 feet. | | | | | | Tuesday, September 2, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1960, Pro Football Hall of Fame running back was born in Sealy. He set the NFL's single-season rushing record with 2,105 yards while playing for the Los Angeles Rams in 1984. Today's edition is slightly shorter than normal to give our staff a little extra time with their families over the Labor Day weekend. We’ll be back with a full edition tomorrow. Electricity demand in Texas is booming, especially in the Permian Basin. Several extra-high-voltage power lines are planned. Today's top story highlights and the concerns of landowners along the proposed routes. Today's sponsor is . Check out their 10-second daily method for reducing wrinkles, sagging, and dark spots. Abilene ☁️ 96/66° | Amarillo ☁️ 88/62° | Austin ☁️ 98/72° | Brownsville 🌤️ 96/77° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 93/77° | DFW ☁️ 96/70° | El Paso 🌤️ 89/67° | Houston 🌤️ 95/73° | Laredo 🌤️ 94/75° | Lubbock ☁️ 90/64° | Midland ☁️ 93/68° | San Antonio ☁️ 96/71° | Tyler ☁️ 95/68° | Waco ☁️ 95/70° | High-Voltage Power Lines Raise Concerns Plans to build three extra-high-voltage transmission lines from Central Texas to the Permian Basin have among some landowners along the proposed routes. The 765-kilovolt lines would require a 200-foot right of way with 19-story towers every 1,000 feet. The $33 billion project aims to provide power to the fast-growing region, where electricity demand is to 26 gigawatts—about a third of ERCOT's entire load during the peak of summer—by 2038. AEP Texas and CPS Energy have proposed a between San Antonio and Fort Stockton, while the Lower Colorado River Authority and Oncor have proposed routes from and from . The utilities held multiple public forums for each of the proposed routes over the summer, but have complained that they were not sufficiently advertised. If the Texas Public Utility Commission approves the transmission lines, they are expected to . Texas Cities Among Nation's Most Accessible Houston, Dallas, and San Antonio are among the most accessible cities in the U.S. for people with limited mobility, by travel website Wander that examined walkability scores and the number of wheelchair-friendly attractions, trails, and public transit stations. Houston edged Dallas for the No. 4 ranking, with an accessibility score of 9.45/10. It was recognized for having the , with nearly 63% of its 158 trails earning the designation. Dallas earned an accessibility score of 9.40/10 for the No. 5 spot. San Antonio's score of 8.91/10 for the No. 10 ranking. "Accessibility should never be an afterthought; it's part of creating exceptional travel experiences ," said Wander Chief of Staff Matt Kowalewski. | Flying together with our sponsor Scientists at University College Cork have validated a surprising that’s transforming how women fight signs of aging—without creams or invasive treatments. In a study involving 674 women with deep wrinkles, sagging skin, and dark spots, researchers found that using this simple technique in front of the mirror each day led to dramatic improvements in appearance within just a few weeks. What’s more shocking? has been shown to be up to 10 times more effective than retinol—without any of the harsh side effects like redness, irritation, or dryness.It’s fast, painless, and surprisingly easy to do at home. Thousands of women are already using it to look 10, 15, or even 20 years younger—and the results speak for themselves. # YOU DID IT!
---
| |
---
| **Team TFVC wants to take a moment to celebrate YOU!** Thank you for your perseverance, your advocacy, and your unwavering commitment to medical liberty. Because of your efforts - petition signatures, public comments, emails, and phone calls - Texans are on the brink of being able to purchase **Ivermectin without a physician’s prescription.** We know we’ve been talking about this nonstop, but that’s because this was a battle worth fighting on every front. And in a remarkably short time, look what has been accomplished! Your support and prayers fueled Rep. Shofner’s persistent efforts in the Texas House, leading to **HB 25 becoming a top priority** in the second Special Session for not only Governor Greg Abbott, but Speaker Dustin Burrows as well. Even Public Health Committee Chairman Gary Vandeaver, who was such an impediment to the passage of this policy during the regular session, signed on as a co-author. **In just a matter of days** , HB 25 was filed, heard in committee, voted on in the House, and sent through the Senate. (Side note: if you haven’t yet watched the floor debates in both chambers, you’re missing some of the most **shocking displays of medical tyranny** we’ve ever witnessed.) Very soon, HB 25 will land on the Governor’s desk - and be signed into law. **And it’s ALL thanks to YOU. Celebrate this huge victory for all Texans with us!**

---
|

clean_body: | | OTC Ivermectin is soon to be a reality! | | | | | | YOU DID IT! | | | Team TFVC wants to take a moment to celebrate YOU! Thank you for your perseverance, your advocacy, and your unwavering commitment to medical liberty. Because of your efforts - petition signatures, public comments, emails, and phone calls - Texans are on the brink of being able to purchase Ivermectin without a physician’s prescription. We know we’ve been talking about this nonstop, but that’s because this was a battle worth fighting on every front. And in a remarkably short time, look what has been accomplished! Your support and prayers fueled Rep. Shofner’s persistent efforts in the Texas House, leading to HB 25 becoming a top priority in the second Special Session for not only Governor Greg Abbott, but Speaker Dustin Burrows as well. Even Public Health Committee Chairman Gary Vandeaver, who was such an impediment to the passage of this policy during the regular session, signed on as a co-author. In just a matter of days , HB 25 was filed, heard in committee, voted on in the House, and sent through the Senate. (Side note: if you haven’t yet watched the floor debates in both chambers, you’re missing some of the most shocking displays of medical tyranny we’ve ever witnessed.) Very soon, HB 25 will land on the Governor’s desk - and be signed into law. And it’s ALL thanks to YOU. Celebrate this huge victory for all Texans with us! | | | | News | | | | | | ICYMI: Shot Callers | In last week's episode, Michelle Worton and Julie Woods, founders of CANrise19 , a Canadian based advocacy organization focused on supporting the COVID19 vaccine injured, shared their stories of injury and discovering a new community. | | | | | | Baby on the Way? | If you have a loved one with a baby on the way and have struggled to have ‘the talk’ with them about vaccine safety and exemptions, let Team TFVC do the heavy lifting by sending our ! | | | Upcoming Events | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Your support allows us to make wins like OTC Ivermectin possible. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr0c05fke16d4sirvn3qkabej4php0k5dodcnq6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3h69pr2c3h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4t16o7b4kptm4b317fn81m54j4jkagl6joeh7jg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3h69pr2c3h2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd02j26ve2iv097tgm6isuk5daa56oddtuutpts8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3h69pr2c3h2bs)
---

__
---

---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

**Are you as FURIOUS as I am?**

The fake news media and the corrupt deep state are in FULL PANIC MODE because **I'm exposing their slimy schemes and RESHAPING President Trump's administration from the inside out!**

That's right--outlets like **Wired** , **Politico** , **Washington Post** , and the rest of the press are screaming about how "**Laura Loomer is leading the charge to PURGE disloyal traitors "** from the National Security Council, FDA, NSA, and beyond.

**For the mainstream media, I 've become a headline of upheaval within the White House.**

For the government officials who are undermining Trump's agenda, **I 've become their biggest threat.**

But I need your help to keep researching and investigating. [**Please donate today to help me keep going.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z779t9qng7227dc2p5uknlmqo9nraol4a0h36cuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j60or4c3h2bs)

I've been darting around the country as my small staff continues their work. I'm meeting with sources, verifying everything, and in between, when called to the Oval Office, I fly to Washington on my dime.

This is my job. I don't have a lobbying firm backed by corporate dollars. And I'm not being sponsored by anyone but hard-working Americans like you.

I know it's a lot to ask, but I'm doing this for us . . . so our nation can be strong and the president we elected can truly Make America Great Again. [**Will you help me?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrlp4l34dslbs4pkno530r4mhqtj81v4k0irkdvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j60or4c3h2bs)

From blasting bureaucrats who sabotage America First to forcing out deep-state snakes, **President Trump knows I'm the tip of the spear --and he's listening to US!**

The hundreds of articles about me aren't just headlines; it's a live reporting of the **WAR that 's going on for the heart of our nation**, and **WE'RE WINNING** because of relentless fighters like YOU and me!

My explosive exposes demand non-stop digging, dangerous travel to hunt down leads, and firepower to blast the truth across X and every platform that dares to let freedom ring. **[** Without YOUR immediate support**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbrkra47f910frk8t6g82sp5rek0hvclcpoggvqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j60or4c3h2bs), the enemy wins--and we CANNOT let that happen!**

**[**STAND WITH ME IN THIS BATTLE RIGHT NOW!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4v4ajeq56ejtbdr7er4ltcsv6vlgv3pfccufol0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j60or4c3h2bs)**

[**Chip in**$25, $50, $100, or whatever you can muster****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znkbko3rj6nkb7i8175pj3auak9g4sf2trt4vej8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j60or4c3h2bs) to arm me with the resources to **CRUSH the corruption** , keep the purges rolling, and **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN --FOR REAL!**

**Let's RAGE against the machine TOGETHER! America First or BUST!**

Unleashed and Unapologetic,
Laura Loomer

Johnson thought we'd forget about them, and move on to other issues. He thought wrong. # [Trump DEMANDS truth about COVID vaccine results](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=172522888&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNTIyODg4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTY4MTk1NDQsImV4cCI6MTc1OTQxMTU0NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.qdIh-YOzRPfQbw1vnwO_FkUKC1OqRaaRuAFmJxDd2vM)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5b486095-408a-4631-b8aa-74f15ad6703a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Trump posted on Truth Social **[demanding that drug companies](https://substack.com/redirect/5b486095-408a-4631-b8aa-74f15ad6703a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** publicly justify the success of their COVID-19 vaccines, stating he wants "a definitive answer" on the controversy and urging companies to release data "NOW" to the CDC and public.
* **Claims of Hidden Data:** Trump asserted that Pfizer and other companies have shown him "extraordinary" results and "GREAT numbers" about their COVID vaccines but haven't shared this information publicly, questioning why they don't release these findings to resolve ongoing debates.
* **Trump wrote:**
_"I have been shown information from Pfizer, and others, that is extraordinary, but they never seem to show those results to the public. Why not??? They go off to the next 'hunt' and let everyone rip themselves apart, including Bobby Kennedy Jr. and CDC, trying to figure out the success or failure of the Drug Companies Covid work. They show me GREAT numbers and results, but they don 't seem to be showing them to many others. I want them to show them NOW, to CDC and the public, and clear up this MESS, one way or the other!!!"_
* **Operation Warp Speed Reflection:** Trump expressed uncertainty about his own administration's Operation Warp Speed program, writing that he hopes it was as "BRILLIANT" as many claim, but wants to know "if not...why" it may have fallen short of expectations.
* **Political Responses:** HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. thanked Trump for his "commitment to Gold Standard Science," while Senator Bernie Sanders urged Trump not to "backtrack" on vaccines, reminding him that he previously said Operation Warp Speed and COVID vaccines saved "tens of millions of lives."

Now this new event could trigger one of its biggest moves yet.
**As much as 50% or more in the coming years.**

# Maduro responds to U.S. warships knocking on his front door
Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro **[accused the United States of seeking regime change](https://substack.com/redirect/90641228-baed-4ec7-9af0-dc0c85bc63da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** through military threats, calling the U.S. naval buildup in the Caribbean "the biggest threat that has been seen on our continent in the last 100 years."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/90641228-baed-4ec7-9af0-dc0c85bc63da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump's Military Deployment:** President Trump authorized the naval deployment as part of his broader border policy to disrupt drug cartel activity in the region, with the Pentagon emphasizing it's part of a "whole-of-government effort" to eliminate cartel threats to U.S. security.
* **Bounty and Drug Trafficking Claims:** The Trump administration has accused Maduro of engaging in drug trafficking and announced a $50 million reward for information leading to his arrest and conviction, while Venezuela maintains it won't bow to threats and is "super-prepared."
* **Pentagon's Justification:** Chief Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell stated that cartels have engaged in "historic violence and terror" that has destabilized regional economies and flooded the U.S. with deadly drugs, violent criminals, and gangs, requiring coordination with regional partners to address the threat.

* * *
# Trump to award Rudy Giuliani the Presidential Medal of Freedom
President Donald Trump announced on Truth Social that he will **[award former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://substack.com/redirect/bbbd34b3-9ecc-4ae1-9a99-e29371d38ad9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the Presidential Medal of Freedom, calling him "the greatest Mayor in the history of New York City" and "an equally great American Patriot."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bbbd34b3-9ecc-4ae1-9a99-e29371d38ad9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump Wrote:** "As President of the United States of America, I am pleased to announce that Rudy Giuliani, the greatest Mayor in the history of New York City, and an equally great American Patriot, will receive THE PRESIDENTIAL MEDAL OF FREEDOM, our Country's highest civilian honor," Trump wrote on Truth Social. "Details as to time and place to follow. Thank you for your attention to this matter. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!!!"
* **Car Accident Context:** The announcement came one day after Giuliani was seriously injured in a car crash in New Hampshire, where he had reportedly stopped to help a woman fleeing domestic violence before being struck from behind at high speed on the highway.
* **Serious Injuries:** Giuliani was hospitalized with multiple injuries including a fractured thoracic vertebrae, multiple lacerations and contusions, and injuries to his left arm and lower leg, though his spokesman said he is expected to be discharged within days.
* **Legal Team History:** The article notes that Giuliani joined Trump's legal team in 2018, representing the president during the Robert Mueller inquiry into Russian interference in the 2016 election, providing context for their professional relationship.

body:
2026 Midterms has MAGA shaking in their boots...
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K457DWBHZNY2SMRBPYVGX6KW_0)

| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K457DWBHZNY2SMRBPYVGX6KW_1)
---
| | | | Peter— With the wheels falling off the MAGA movement and Donald Trump falling out of his golf cart every weekend, Republicans are returning to their old playbook: fear, lies and voter suppression. Trump has declared that he’s _leading a movement_ to eliminate mail-in voting and voting machines before the 2026 midterms — promising to sign an executive order that experts say is not only unconstitutional, but a blatant attack on democracy. **They’re shaking in their boots.** Because they can’t divide us anymore. Their nonsense doesn’t resonate. Their conspiracy theories don’t hold water. Their shaky platform — built on fringe influencers, right-wing media, and out-of-touch billionaires — is collapsing under the weight of their Dear Leader. But here’s the thing: we don’t win just by being right. We win by organizing, mobilizing, donating, and voting. This is our moment to come together —**not as Democrats or Republicans, but as Tennesseans ready to build a future that actually works for working families.** Let’s be the party of fiscal responsibility. Of quality public schools. Of affordable housing. Of healthcare access for all. Let’s be the party for the people.

clean_body: 2026 Midterms has MAGA shaking in their boots... | | | | Can't see this email? | | | | | | | Peter— With the wheels falling off the MAGA movement and Donald Trump falling out of his golf cart every weekend, Republicans are returning to their old playbook: fear, lies and voter suppression. Trump has declared that he’s leading a movement to eliminate mail-in voting and voting machines before the 2026 midterms — promising to sign an executive order that experts say is not only unconstitutional, but a blatant attack on democracy. They’re shaking in their boots. Because they can’t divide us anymore. Their nonsense doesn’t resonate. Their conspiracy theories don’t hold water. Their shaky platform — built on fringe influencers, right-wing media, and out-of-touch billionaires — is collapsing under the weight of their Dear Leader. But here’s the thing: we don’t win just by being right. We win by organizing, mobilizing, donating, and voting. This is our moment to come together —not as Democrats or Republicans, but as Tennesseans ready to build a future that actually works for working families. Let’s be the party of fiscal responsibility. Of quality public schools. Of affordable housing. Of healthcare access for all. Let’s be the party for the people. | | | Chip in $26 for the 2026 midterms and help us fight back against this voter suppression campaign! Together, we can make sure every voice is heard — and every vote is counted. — Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | | | | | Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer | | | | | No longer want to receive these emails? . TN House Democratic Caucus PO Box 198082 Nashville, TN 37219

| Peter,
Pennsylvania's State Constitution requires that every ten years State Supreme Court Justices face a reelection vote.
The three Democratic Justices responsible for the Democratic majority on the PA Supreme court are up for reelection this Nov. and MAGA has launched an unprecedented full scale assault on them to ensure they are removed.
Their removal would mean a full GOP redistricting of the PA congressional map, a total abortion ban, and no accountability for MAGA vote rigging in 2026 and 2028. PA will go so far to the right it will be unrecognizable.

---
Friend, **I said what I said.** ** ** As you may have seen, a reporter wrote that I told members of our Victory team that if they did not perform, they would be fired. **Let me be perfectly clear:** I am 100 percent serious. This election is too important to accept anything less than results. The liberal media is so desperate to protect Abigail and her Democrat allies that they are now attacking me for expecting greatness out of our team. They want to paint accountability as cruelty because they know the truth: if Republicans win, their entire agenda collapses. When the Chairman put his trust in me to lead RPV, I promised that every dollar coming in would be spent wisely and only on one thing: winning Republican victories this November. I refuse to be an Executive Director who coasts along. I will never accept mediocrity when so much is at stake. If Democrats take power, **Virginians will pay the price.** They will raise taxes, cripple small businesses with radical regulations, push their dangerous gender ideology into our schools, defund law enforcement, and turn our communities into laboratories for the far left. They will undo every safeguard we have fought to put in place. **That cannot happen. Not on my watch.** ** ** I will continue to push until every job in our Victory effort is done and done well. If you do not perform in your job, you get fired. That is how the real world works, and it is how we must operate if we want to win. **We are not backing down.** With your help, we will stand strong, hold our team accountable, and deliver Republican victories this November. Please consider making a generous contribution today. Every dollar will go directly to ensuring we win this fight.

---

clean_body: | | | | An honest, open letter. Friend, I said what I said. As you may have seen, a reporter wrote that I told members of our Victory team that if they did not perform, they would be fired. Let me be perfectly clear: I am 100 percent serious. This election is too important to accept anything less than results. The liberal media is so desperate to protect Abigail and her Democrat allies that they are now attacking me for expecting greatness out of our team. They want to paint accountability as cruelty because they know the truth: if Republicans win, their entire agenda collapses. When the Chairman put his trust in me to lead RPV, I promised that every dollar coming in would be spent wisely and only on one thing: winning Republican victories this November. I refuse to be an Executive Director who coasts along. I will never accept mediocrity when so much is at stake. If Democrats take power, Virginians will pay the price. They will raise taxes, cripple small businesses with radical regulations, push their dangerous gender ideology into our schools, defund law enforcement, and turn our communities into laboratories for the far left. They will undo every safeguard we have fought to put in place. That cannot happen. Not on my watch. I will continue to push until every job in our Victory effort is done and done well. If you do not perform in your job, you get fired. That is how the real world works, and it is how we must operate if we want to win. We are not backing down. With your help, we will stand strong, hold our team accountable, and deliver Republican victories this November. Please consider making a generous contribution today. Every dollar will go directly to ensuring we win this fight. | | Sincerely, Ken Nunnenkamp Executive Director Republican Party of Virginia | == \- PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

name: Jordan Wood
subject: insulted, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I want to share something deeply personal with you.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f6ffd3e-17d3-4e98-99fb-3c228931397b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, I want to share something deeply personal with you. Since I launched my Democratic campaign to replace GOP Senator Susan Collins, I’ve received such heartwarming support from so many of you. I am incredibly grateful. But to be honest, Peter, it hasn’t all been positive. Some are telling me I don’t deserve to run for office. Or serve in the Senate. Or even be a father – because I’m gay. [Please read this very closely, Peter: These hateful attacks never stopped me before, and you better believe they won't stop me from fighting for every type of family in the Senate now. Our latest poll shows me within ONE SINGLE point of flipping this critical Senate seat for Democrats – but a massive Super PAC just rushed Susan Collins an unprecedented $5.6 MILLION to take me down. I’m urgently asking 1,000 supporters to split a $3 donation between me and Blue Amp Action in the next 4 hours to help me rescue our shot to bring this win home and ensure every type of family has the representation they deserve in the Senate >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d2ccf68-86d7-4a8f-98ba-777448288194/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb374ff3-5fd8-4544-b9fc-a96dce55b2fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
_Jake, Jordan, and Ella_ I was in second grade when Susan Collins was first elected to the Senate. Now, 30 years later, my husband and I just became new dads to our baby girl, Ella – and Susan Collins is still in the Senate. I never planned to run for office myself — but after watching Collins make things *worse* for our families by voting for Trump’s dangerous cabinet, Supreme Court nominees, and even his ACQUITTAL — I looked at my daughter and made the pressing choice to fight for her future. Peter, no matter how many hateful attacks are thrown at me, I need you to know that nothing will deter me from fighting on your behalf in the Senate. [But the harsh reality is – unless I can compete with Susan Collins’ earth-shattering sum of cash, our chance to make history and gain a critical Senate seat for Democrats will be over. So I’m humbly asking 1,000 supporters to split a $3 donation between me and Blue Amp Action in the next 4 hours to close the fundraising gap and show the haters what we’re made of. Can I count on you to help me FLIP this Senate seat blue and hand Collins and her MAGA financiers the humiliating defeat they so desperately deserve? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T100990cc-8d8b-42ed-bf59-f255fdfec4e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $3](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39bbd0ec-6c63-4843-9bf8-b4e256e97d78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0d2b353-6e33-4064-a3c6-a9d71d2720de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | | | Thank you,
Jordan

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b784032-6534-423d-8084-f7f71411634b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Judge rules LA troop use broke federal law
