body:
A district court says the Posse Comitatus Act was violated
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K45A62PKKD49DJTNFHM6HSAX_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, A federal judge ruled that the administration’s use of troops alongside federal agents in Los Angeles violated the Posse Comitatus Act. The court found soldiers and military vehicles were used to create perimeters, block traffic, and support law enforcement activity. It is a district court ruling. Further legal steps may follow. What does this mean for future operations? name: Your America News
subject: These Are The Rolls Royce Of Hearing Aids And They're Under One Hundred Dollars
body:
Shoppers are going nuts over these low cost hearing aids that are virtually invisible. Discover how these affordable hearing aids are changing the lives of people everyday.

| With New Wireless Charging Hearing Aids now priced under **$100,** old time hearing aid retail stores are furious!
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb543tjmk43plk3enhtfc0o4l78m9at81l2dpa8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs)
| The biggest names in retail hearing aids like Miracle Ear, Siemens and Oticon have been around for nearly 100 years. And their outdated retail model, and outrageous pricing game has largely stayed the same -- and gone on for too long consumers say. Especially in tough economic times, people no longer can, or want, to pay $5,000 to $10,000 for hearing aids that you can get for $100 -- offering the same crisp, clear hearing, and even wireless charging. Not to mention, traditional, old fashioned hearing aid companies require customers to make an appointment to visit a hearing aid retail center in order to get what they need at sky high prices. But now, one company has disrupted the hearing aid industry and ushered in a New Era of Hearing Aids with a way to get high-quality hearing aids with NO visit, and without spending thousands of dollars. [Oricle](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi3vj0rg2ufrs24rd5o7jlgm3e67veb997oieboo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs) Hearing's goal was to merge quality with affordability in the world of hearing aids. And to help people discover the joy of clear conversations without the hefty price tag.
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zej3g424s8nmaqf7a11t163c4633je4pskc6mb60_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs) | | People often ask if $100 hearing aids can really be as good as $5,000 prescription hearing aids. An Oricle spokesman said, "Our hearing aids don't have all the bells and whistles of $5,000 hearing aids, but they DO provide all the features you NEED to improve your hearing. And they cost 95% less than prescription hearing aids. But best of all, they work WELL for our 150,000+ customers. And if anyone doesn't like them, they can return them for a refund." [Oricle](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr54fqbrb906e7l55f2jvrb5e6c895ja526leuio_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs) now has a reputation for unrivaled sound excellence along with something new, convenient and fast USB wireless charging. So you can charge them at home, in the car, on a plane or anywhere you need some more battery life. And [Oricle](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z09bla2eao2svu8l570jitnauievfqptitt2nmtg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs) hearing aids have an impressive, fast-charging, 20-hour, all-day battery life so most people simply choose to charge them at night while they sleep. That way, they never run out of sound and avoid "battery life anxiety." With [Oricle's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8arcpvmanhiqurmv794ouq3tvp1q08bqu6cqfig_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs) revolutionary technology, anyone who needs hearing help can rediscover the joy of hearing every word with perfect clarity. Thanks to their advanced capabilities, [Oricle](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmj3oua9208eou7v72fdbn8e79n097vhte9prrro_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs) users can now have consistent and superior audio clarity. And there's no need for a doctor or hearing test to hear every word in unmatched comfort. Here is what some of the hundreds of thousands of people say who have used [Oricle](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0pe1ioivmkqvl76dvrm7fdb8qd1q7bteaifbsno_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs) Hearing Aids, and can now hear again without spending thousands of dollars: "I'm so grateful! I got tired of hearing loved ones telling me to talk louder, I said that's it we're buying these! A miracle I tell you. They are as good as any of her friends $2000+ hearing aids. Now she tells me I talk too loud and says she can hear me just fine. She is happy and I am relieved! Even if you can afford the big priced hearing aids, you have to try these!" - Sarah Smith "This is the best hearing aid for the money. I was skeptical because of the low price. I had misplaced my other set I got from Costco for $2500. So I decided to give these a try in hopes I would find my lost Costco set. After using the Oricle set, they are so much better! Even if I find my Costco set, I'll never use them again." - Ryan Miller "Outstanding hearing aid value (It's about time!) My wife says these are comparable to her behind- the-ear hearing aids of which she lost 3 sets. Because she wears a hat most of the time as well as glasses, she continually knocks them off so she stopped wearing them because of the hassle and expense of losing them as well as the batteries always having to be replaced." - Keith Williams
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0khgrolgjpebj5ok569g7lpq7gg32iseevijdio_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs)

| [Oricle](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztnku3b9aivk3kt48qu8r4i2j20es8mjs3b44dno_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs) now offers something giant hearing aid companies cannot, better affordable hearing in seconds. Advanced [Oricle](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za3h66g62ue6fu2eir4amps4r61i3otd1h3pnj7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap34cjh2bs) engineering offers people who need a hearing boost a lifetime of better hearing with advanced features like ... Perfect Volume Tuning ... Premium Sound ... Discover how these affordable hearing aids are changing the lives of people everyday. | With New Wireless Charging Hearing Aids now priced under $100, old time hearing aid retail stores are furious! | The biggest names in retail hearing aids like Miracle Ear, Siemens and Oticon have been around for nearly 100 years. And their outdated retail model, and outrageous pricing game has largely stayed the same -- and gone on for too long consumers say. Especially in tough economic times, people no longer can, or want, to pay $5,000 to $10,000 for hearing aids that you can get for $100 -- offering the same crisp, clear hearing, and even wireless charging. Not to mention, traditional, old fashioned hearing aid companies require customers to make an appointment to visit a hearing aid retail center in order to get what they need at sky high prices. But now, one company has disrupted the hearing aid industry and ushered in a New Era of Hearing Aids with a way to get high-quality hearing aids with NO visit, and without spending thousands of dollars. name: Thomas Massie
subject: I only reach out like this when I must
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqt9olb1mmadh2sj7pr9g3iembml4rce3efjigag_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap32chh2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7tvgcp1ibv9kgsg1pkaqi7amld0sne6e1o8mqjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap32chh2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl3cjtebjgc4skvt3dd902mavgo3lthmofsqk5l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap32chh2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zne10ekau01iq8mqnajubkhmgdkp223chrel0q88_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j6ap32chh2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie
---

name: Her Bold Move
subject: RE: Safe places to give birth are vanishing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
What used to be maternity care deserts are now nothing more than barren wastelands.| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114458043/567098029/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250829SafeB_N_HBM_NO_10_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImExODRjZjFiLTA1ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9p-3Eb3QqckwbjjFakU5KdmdNY_8SBXsksui6g3LvPs=)
---
Hi Peter,

Safe places to give birth are becoming more and more scarce.

Between 2010 and 2022, over 500 US hospitals closed their obstetrics units, and 50% of ALL rural counties now lack hospital-based labor and delivery care. In fact,**1 in 3 counties have no OB/GYN at all.**

An analysis by the _National Partnership for Women and Families_ found that, after Trump signed his so-called Big Beautiful Bill, which strips away access to healthcare for millions of people, **150 more rural maternity units are at risk of closing.**

**When you consider what this actually means for millions of American women – who are already dealing with deadly assaults to their reproductive healthcare needs – this is horrifying.**

[**Too often, women in these rural, red districts are left behind by institutional Democratic support. We are working to get them the essential help they need by supporting women running for office in their parts of the country. Join us in this fight by rushing $25 today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250829SafeB_N_HBM_NO_10_G_N_L1&amount=25)

clean_body: What used to be maternity care deserts are now nothing more than barren wastelands.| | | | | = Hi Peter, Safe places to give birth are becoming more and more scarce. Between 2010 and 2022, over 500 US hospitals closed their obstetrics units, and 50% of ALL rural counties now lack hospital-based labor and delivery care. In fact,1 in 3 counties have no OB/GYN at all. An analysis by the National Partnership for Women and Families found that, after Trump signed his so-called Big Beautiful Bill, which strips away access to healthcare for millions of people, 150 more rural maternity units are at risk of closing. When you consider what this actually means for millions of American women – who are already dealing with deadly assaults to their reproductive healthcare needs – this is horrifying. At Her Bold Move, this hits close to home for us for many reasons. When we interview candidates for endorsements, we always ask candidates to name a major issue impacting the women of their districts. Countless candidates list maternal care deserts as one of the top issues. This often leads to emotional conversations as they talk about what they’re seeing on the ground in their corners of America. body:
| | | **I’m Donald Trump’s worst nightmare: a mom, social worker, and proud Latina immigrant running to defeat a MAGA Republican in the Virginia House of Delegates.** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6Kzp34Lr9eF0g2FjY2MZfUs-hgNcLY9SOPsCOa8SYeAlyThn7av862gs5c5GzlSMJXTS-lR8vpBEtkbL_UjxGlqeWj3izZ2S-5JJK2yFt0ZUp8m5H76TuyCMKlrz6qJR332So90L9OT-8E-NCNDxOy-UPtH2Z-FXCmD2gepZv4_dJ3weEmIihd7521JYuPNCqw/4jk/e81Yrw-iR8a4pUwpylD3Qw/h0/h001.VDACR74tSqFM2hwpa85A4dbJHvgJoDTlOEL8lAqmUXU)
** [**With Labor Day behind us, we’re in the FINAL SPRINT to November’s election. Help us deliver Trump a big defeat and expand the 51-49 majority in the Virginia House of Delegates - donate to WIN a toss-up race.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviCv8NaoKR4YxlI0dJnVv0vaZDDIG4IklEJhuZV7uLPd-E3oj-wTVY6EYnqgoMYsDM17h6CCg_mC-kwMs0zFuzZVAH4OqXdLbIWeET-9EwrywjB-Pk6OESsQxPRcFHEfmRml7s8mLbFAXII_5IkLGNDFk3kPoeBR3snatQzBuyMMxNzrNBaTyBb73tpX0mLdJpQ/4jk/e81Yrw-iR8a4pUwpylD3Qw/h1/h001.lyv2vTYXvmtXtp4bmiWMRsuj8Tbho9lCywNrsXBjFN4)
* * *
We’re in the final post-Labor Day sprint to November’s Virginia elections ... _so allow me to reintroduce myself._ I’m Elizabeth Guzman, running in a toss-up, red-to-blue race for the Virginia House of Delegates. I immigrated from Peru with $300 in my pocket, working three minimum-wage jobs at the same time as I finished my education, becoming a social worker and union leader. But when Donald Trump was elected President in 2017, my young American-born son asked me whether we should go back to Peru after Trump and MAGA Republicans disparaged Latinos like us. After all our hard work achieving the American dream, I wasn’t going to let anyone tell my children that they didn’t belong here. I unseated an entrenched Republican incumbent, becoming the first Latina immigrant elected to the Virginia House of Delegates in its 400-year history. I sponsored and co-sponsored laws that raised the minimum wage, gave teachers and firefighters the right to unionize, and kept abortion safe and legal in Virginia. **This “DLCC Spotlight” race is one of America’s marquee red-to-blue pickup opportunities.** In 2023, $4.1 million was spent in this district ... the 8th most expensive House of Delegates race EVER. We’re on the air with TV ads RIGHT NOW. We’re sending tens of thousands of mailers every week. We’re knocking doors and responding to well-funded Republican attacks. [**Early voting starts in just a couple weeks, and we need your help to fully fund our get out the vote blitz. Help deliver Trump and MAGA Republicans a huge defeat by donating today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdxB9B_-Pj2UssOlSG4Io0evX2PNn_AWmY41uED1Qod-cHbX4srZhtLXhbV-RGgdnteF0OIUJWB_fzFA0KnJLA39mbj7c0ENKb9YGxJLZsTQ-gnNIWJMLz1A7tGyfz1PjFNcIYrNxkkrlxbaV_c2cVnvVrdnV3v5WnAG82wZlf763FQ3E8GRCCgyTpD7_KIJhzYpYc4HjlRSUfY9rCVhfo63NiqQNNvQtp6m-kkXs3pFRrZdH7MywRnS1_66_D78mA/4jk/e81Yrw-iR8a4pUwpylD3Qw/h2/h001.Mzt9sACQT2ypbwAQp-I80XmmW7swWs6EFf-R77k9E4I) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | I’m Donald Trump’s worst nightmare: a mom, social worker, and proud Latina immigrant running to defeat a MAGA Republican in the Virginia House of Delegates. We’re in the final post-Labor Day sprint to November’s Virginia elections ... so allow me to reintroduce myself. I’m Elizabeth Guzman, running in a toss-up, red-to-blue race for the Virginia House of Delegates. I immigrated from Peru with $300 in my pocket, working three minimum-wage jobs at the same time as I finished my education, becoming a social worker and union leader. But when Donald Trump was elected President in 2017, my young American-born son asked me whether we should go back to Peru after Trump and MAGA Republicans disparaged Latinos like us. After all our hard work achieving the American dream, I wasn’t going to let anyone tell my children that they didn’t belong here. I unseated an entrenched Republican incumbent, becoming the first Latina immigrant elected to the Virginia House of Delegates in its 400-year history. I sponsored and co-sponsored laws that raised the minimum wage, gave teachers and firefighters the right to unionize, and kept abortion safe and legal in Virginia. This “DLCC Spotlight” race is one of America’s marquee red-to-blue pickup opportunities. In 2023, $4.1 million was spent in this district ... the 8th most expensive House of Delegates race EVER. We’re on the air with TV ads RIGHT NOW. We’re sending tens of thousands of mailers every week. We’re knocking doors and responding to well-funded Republican attacks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. name: Thomas Massie
subject: I only reach out like this when I must
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq1b38bufreqe95jbkv3ofdvcv5hdpa9pqjsl8qo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j66o34cjh2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6jra1dvoc79ivkha6s9esf3ps5ga89sblunlk80_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j66o34cjh2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zaajd9vuftl07manfflljkk78dcsfqs9eoem38mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j66o34cjh2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z072eaobi7rnh43htugo2d6psfq58mrn8g3jkorg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j66o34cjh2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie
---

clean_body: I wish I were reaching out today with better news. | | | Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary. The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent $1 MILLION on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of ALL-OUT WAR on me and those who support me... Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely. But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest. Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING! They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. Sincerely, Thomas Massie | | | Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072 | Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Massachusetts Republican Party
subject: SATURDAY: MassGOP's First Fall Candidate and RTC Training Session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Republican Party Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee
body:
Will we see you there?
| | |
---
| |
---
| Peter,
This coming Saturday is right around the corner. Have you signed up to join our first training session of the season?
Republicans will be gathering in Worcester to learn more about what YOU can do to help elect Republicans up and down the ballot in 2026.
Candidates and activists can learn about filings, fundraising, deadlines, and data, all in one place! A big focus of our training will be Numinar, the MassGOP's official voter contact software for the 2025-2026 cycle.
Using Numinar, volunteers can send "relational texts" to their friends for Get Out the Vote. Campaigns can target Trump supporters and voters who have signed past MassGOP petitions.
This is important: [RSVP here or at the link below](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JZVGINlaILvvJAoUevoYcK091CX5JC_pUMyAQ5izh73Cji6hG0CLACzwPJip_ZiDoqGz2CDwrrkMilyBSZFMuiYJe02Za757sHslSZA8YxPK31NO_-b1Ccxo9AyUzWPJkracuAp4_sSC4NxQq0jyzjOw2KppsCFMaigtNTeHEMRAI8holun0E-1QLRkEMBYlQJtawtsx7FeX8-bVkbc49lsa8Np_6WrBjIda4B-OZ9GWkv3vtErUqF3e_ZtaQbhZ7oEP74gaTJg=&c=--sF-5EWDkxYToBietrtSl0l4T2G7Jf7dW7sjXRrAy3KYaLVsbhU9A==&ch=Ycekr_HPufAiY55ZOJWVZ3Q1A3MsNlPlvEslO9Ku5obyzxUSpEfWKw==) so we can set up your email to learn the system before we begin! In the meantime, log into Numinar or email [data@massgop.com](mailto:data@massgop.com) for support.
Data takes practice, so [visit our YouTube page](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JZVGINlaILvvJAoUevoYcK091CX5JC_pUMyAQ5izh73Cji6hG0CLAD_CBp3P6daxkUZRYO6304UfIiHLGr8zKybhAIciviuWpFrqZUxmbFO8a4jxhFYtowp8QSdlWs6ej-7FpOhnjvpScx8rdNK713f7m6n0Mt-JYc7QBZ2E8k7Qa7hnHYzS4Ih1OGwdiNY5BMl8kSPMme5VaHEI0zeiCfcc7N9MiG_a&c=--sF-5EWDkxYToBietrtSl0l4T2G7Jf7dW7sjXRrAy3KYaLVsbhU9A==&ch=Ycekr_HPufAiY55ZOJWVZ3Q1A3MsNlPlvEslO9Ku5obyzxUSpEfWKw==) to learn the quick-and-dirty basics.
See you Saturday!
Mark Steffen Political Director, MassGOP [mark@massgop.com](mailto:mark@massgop.com)
PS: As a very special treat, representatives from RumbleUp will be teaching Republican Town Committees how to sign up for your own texting numbers! Don't miss this incredible opportunity to learn how to grow your committees before the MassGOP's 2026 Convention.

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: I’m a new face
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7d440c93d56e4475ae66c425126e6750&_e=pge2iaMiKIJQGk1x5HGM4q4kxTrZbQsdYSvKUcDe57XwQlGXaXts-4LFFheKfw5Rd1Svjdr5laRXV1MVbv35rlS_Nxv-a6lm8RVUJ24xNZ7nFEQWiG8lHmQ9pnCBQxSJvLWfOGXYQqzF1ciZQ7QKqBChIHdGWfphJZnaKMNUgWXqdI6u3OSMoxNVokg81GMTr_yCvHoIh-MOny58XaLKINsk_w2yFOlT7_1Q2yJxTGB_wOpJGa_G0DNeu0Bluo27dSCHwW49wjBn1ak6HFbRhsVtB_vNOVNAWg-Tl9VpoB5s1mkFxzBKUDkFKcWYPfwwbhfDCV7jxNgyTUpkKPwaYrMdYsIICYKwXi_GrKdVXSSztVJsxF0_wAImg_o6uVjBxxKSHBl7-1ggQTvDM-TOPrYniOt5dYwhmP_-Ocxer-0fukLcsSU9d_-Jg37HZMnypdy7GDGFZWoBSXT2IQkkG8nnUyHlGKZmv0ltjH9YTFXODvR7ql_LkBbcNNFVZG_YlRilyoSqvGVp2AXF-RXnoQ4kViyKNIjzXoe91SjBqcyzOfWhqbuR1eVSfLoht-0aRlS8xqC5eqqMZg-Q-3EhD7P26kOnv-kWQoTm-ERCutvavZvpptILIgtdUGSesRn9leyylj3rn_bkSuWVwqw05lYlzD9AeL7-7pp7y9cokgBBna7Ounvpq8nBlLMZ0lfCFuDcEZkRBo89EafLdwBx13iTckEUl1eRDT4IpxwWogxkvniw03aJ3Jw9Hwxrgx9PhCBdzf14dWJ2WDWckoQ__Q%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

You may not know me yet, but my name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a lifelong Minnesotan, former Navy SEAL, and Marine Corps veteran running for U.S. Senate in 2026. I’m stepping into this fight because Minnesota—and our country—needs a new voice to stand up for our values, and I’m asking for your help to make it happen.

I grew up in Bloomington, Minnesota, playing hockey and learning teamwork from my working-class parents. _**On my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after 9/11, I enlisted in the Marine Corps to serve our nation.**_

**Over 21 years, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries as a Marine and Navy SEAL, putting my life on the line to defend our freedoms.** I earned my undergraduate degree from the University of Minnesota, a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love.

Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. _**This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate.

**_ **But here’s the challenge: I’m a new face, and the Democrats are already raising millions to keep this seat.** I’ve noticed you haven’t been active lately, Peter, and I get it—the news can feel overwhelming, and it’s easy to think the fight’s already won. But it’s not. Right now, donations are slowing, and the other side is **quietly building its war chest**. I’m thinking of patriots like you who’ve supported conservatives before. Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters.

**[I’m asking for just $5 today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7d440c93d56e4475ae66c425126e6750&_e=pge2iaMiKIJQGk1x5HGM4q4kxTrZbQsdYSvKUcDe57XwQlGXaXts-4LFFheKfw5Rd1Svjdr5laRXV1MVbv35rlS_Nxv-a6lm8RVUJ24xNZ7nFEQWiG8lHmQ9pnCBQxSJvLWfOGXYQqzF1ciZQ7QKqBChIHdGWfphJZnaKMNUgWXqdI6u3OSMoxNVokg81GMTr_yCvHoIh-MOny58XaLKINsk_w2yFOlT7_1Q2yJxTGB_wOpJGa_G0DNeu0Bluo27dSCHwW49wjBn1ak6HFbRhmSoUHhAVHTi8IYx-8rU0e_zHC0-uJDdE6072y5SXIfBBHInD7a9tUjiA7ysvEWusQN_YQEMHKb3vEGN9QGNszSJeP3X9eNINHDq0aXFdvi7QekcIm_qQ8a84YaeOCWLFFbgVkTdtM3cDdHwZF63aUVAtpoILZLrc1TSt5f4-XMArt-Mv4dlaCcEHcZnit9MUg3KQ1fp-OWFYMx8ikctUEjPf_mq9cUdobDweFRFh1gc32z3B2ARhhFAzf3BNDP9MNnNKrhTLQO6xSQMfJ4Y-2SUUpBZHcmv_mmUNWgKpg82eBsFVwRc1GWZ_R2ZrVkz8mW4wyZQDe2zz-5ycEZ7deVUFAkZ8sS-gNv4DcmQDEZ9N-nwoS3Na4aLOeqP27cC_Y70M5jOVHzRqXsdpSahVX7M_ikzcthiERVd1bXQUn1pP-NoAQfSP_UICSQEFy6laYZu79Q7q5cPoWc39XngcceFqFzcwtwyVaeBnrl6kJ7cyUMLNfB_GsKzyKd15Npq1Q%3D%3D)** It’s not about the amount—it’s a signal that you’re with me, that you believe Minnesota and America deserve a conservative fighter who’s served our nation and will serve you in Washington.

As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. We need thousands of grassroots supporters, _**not Hollywood elites or mega-donors like the Democrats rely on.**_

[**CHIP IN $5
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7d440c93d56e4475ae66c425126e6750&_e=pge2iaMiKIJQGk1x5HGM4q4kxTrZbQsdYSvKUcDe57XwQlGXaXts-4LFFheKfw5Rd1Svjdr5laRXV1MVbv35rlS_Nxv-a6lm8RVUJ24xNZ7nFEQWiG8lHmQ9pnCBQxSJvLWfOGXYQqzF1ciZQ7QKqBChIHdGWfphJZnaKMNUgWXqdI6u3OSMoxNVokg81GMTr_yCvHoIh-MOny58XaLKINsk_w2yFOlT7_1Q2yJxTGB_wOpJGa_G0DNeu0Bluo27dSCHwW49wjBn1ak6HFbRhtdSZ88QexDtlCE_gsLDECE2mDHOKNIvmTC3O7UeaxlfKSD30QghoA4hV_xKkoUcCqQvc428XPOWjQ2ilICYaDBGzeEcOCjWDO2NB9DntXPktNv8E1zpMJIie4ToETOBNlYCxsT5kczQzx-SGVXNCrMhM0XCjiBSnEnIDmgus15PZFjp92Ixubijozd7kTR8cBFh8kwIy0u96DxPqNmW5pHiXUNpY0Hk-hCn_5_PbICbUpIJhEbySGvIxVwJgf8Jli5Weglhv59hGG6angW7T8icfF7f5OHP8eF4ptOVMzEPhKdTbyzA-tjL8i--Zbk_985xfxcK2yqCOl0OWIPJnMvLasJ8ffjg_tm6LXiWdriZYc0nBFd_vWCvbV-kZO3F_6yZFV3Y3JPuhGnNii3_gI3gvbOK9cXujPV9scG0f4lD8uI2CbF5yJpaA5E2uC-Q2t1-GaMyRRzgWwXiB3jr6I0gsUKEfrd48rQJUJcS2lHL_b9Jg3RAuv_qRdLsoHf7kA%3D%3D)
**Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican for president since 1976, but this race is winnable.** I’m running to secure our borders, support law enforcement, revive our economy, and protect our freedoms. Please, chip in $5 today to help me introduce myself to Minnesotans and fight for our shared values.

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer
Marine Corps Veteran
Proud Minnesotan **_

But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love. Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate. But here’s the challenge: I’m a new face, and the Democrats are already raising millions to keep this seat. I’ve noticed you haven’t been active lately, Peter, and I get it—the news can feel overwhelming, and it’s easy to think the fight’s already won. But it’s not. Right now, donations are slowing, and the other side is quietly building its war chest. I’m thinking of patriots like you who’ve supported conservatives before. Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters. It’s not about the amount—it’s a signal that you’re with me, that you believe Minnesota and America deserve a conservative fighter who’s served our nation and will serve you in Washington. As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. We need thousands of grassroots supporters, not Hollywood elites or mega-donors like the Democrats rely on. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican for president since 1976, but this race is winnable. I’m running to secure our borders, support law enforcement, revive our economy, and protect our freedoms. Please, chip in $5 today to help me introduce myself to Minnesotans and fight for our shared values. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

---|---
**Imagine needing an abortion—but there's no clinic nearby.
No car. No public transportation. No paid time off.
No childcare. No support.** Now imagine discovering that safe, effective abortion pills could have been mailed to your door... **but your state just made it illegal.**

That's the future anti-abortion lawmakers in the U.S. are creating. **They're working to ban medication abortion by mail.** [**We can't let them succeed.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114462649/567109190/1824768205?sourceid=1150867&utm_campaign=26emama-0806aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDgwMTI5Mi0wOTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JX3U4rHHHqcvpHR5o54xOLkdMfd7576bvIvkwGw9VM4=&emci=230a4a11-a982-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d0801292-0988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) | [**ACCESS FOR ALL**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114462650/567109191/1824768205?sourceid=1150867&utm_campaign=26emama-0806aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDgwMTI5Mi0wOTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JX3U4rHHHqcvpHR5o54xOLkdMfd7576bvIvkwGw9VM4=&emci=230a4a11-a982-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d0801292-0988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237 "ACCESS FOR ALL")
---
Medication abortion is safe. It's backed by over two decades of research. And for many, it's the only way to access care. That's why extremists are targeting it.

The Center for Reproductive Rights is fighting back in court, in state legislatures, and alongside our partners across the country. [**But we can't do it without you: your support powers this work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114462651/567109192/1824768205?sourceid=1150867&utm_campaign=26emama-0806aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDgwMTI5Mi0wOTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JX3U4rHHHqcvpHR5o54xOLkdMfd7576bvIvkwGw9VM4=&emci=230a4a11-a982-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d0801292-0988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

Abortion care shouldn't depend on whether you own a car—or your zip code. [**Together, we can make sure it doesn't.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114462652/567109193/1824768205?sourceid=1150867&utm_campaign=26emama-0806aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDgwMTI5Mi0wOTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JX3U4rHHHqcvpHR5o54xOLkdMfd7576bvIvkwGw9VM4=&emci=230a4a11-a982-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d0801292-0988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

With gratitude,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

Federal courts in California and Illinois separately ruled that
Judicial Watch lawsuits may proceed against those states to force them
to clean up their voter rolls. The lawsuits allege that tne states
violated the National Voter Registration Act, which requires states
to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to
remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible
voters” who have died or changed residence.

clean_body: Background on Trump's declaration about voter ID and paper ballots [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] ‘No Exceptions’: President Trump to Sign Executive Order Requiring Voter I.D. in Elections [] Source: Breitbart [] President Donald Trump said Saturday he will take decisive action when it comes to voter I.D. and elections across America. On Truth Social he wrote: "Also, No Mail-In Voting, Except For Those That Are Very Ill, And The Far Away Military. USE PAPER BALLOTS ONLY!!! President DJT.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] July 31, 2025 Federal Courts in California and Illinois Advance Lawsuits to Clean Up Dirty Voter Rolls [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Federal courts in California and Illinois separately ruled that Judicial Watch lawsuits may proceed against those states to force them to clean up their voter rolls. The lawsuits allege that tne states violated the National Voter Registration Act, which requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] August 14, 2025 Supreme Court Sets October 8 Argument for Challenge to Illinois’ 14-Day Post–Election Ballot Counting [] Source: Judicial Watch [] “This is a historic election law challenge. Too many courts have denied candidates their right to challenge unlawful election rules such as the outrageous act of counting ballots that arrive AFTER Election Day. American citizens concerned about election integrity will tune in closely to Judicial Watch’s Supreme Court arguments on October 8,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] August 12, 2025 Judicial Watch Urges Supreme Court to Keep Fifth Circuit Ban on Counting Ballots Received After Election Day [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a brief to the Supreme Court of the United States that opposes the State of Mississippi’s attempt to overturn the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit’s decision, which struck down a law allowing ballots received after Election Day to be counted. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: All eyes on New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
the stakes here are very high
Peter, every single day since he took office in January, it seems like Donald Trump has found new ways to abuse his power and make life harder for our families.
He’s illegally withheld funding that New Jerseyans rely on for child care, for health care, and for access to healthy food.
He’s deployed the National Guard to American cities in a transparent attempt to instill terror and fear.
He signed a devastating spending bill that guts Medicaid access and makes everything from groceries to heating your home less affordable — all to give billionaires a giant tax cut.
And honestly, that’s just a fraction of it.
**As Trump has inflicted all this damage on our country, Republican politicians like Jack Ciattarelli have cheered him on every step of the way.**
There is seemingly nothing Trump can do — no matter how illegal, reckless, or outright devastating for New Jersey families — that would make Jack Ciattarelli say “enough is enough.”
**And Peter, polls show that Ciattarelli is within a few percentage points of becoming New Jersey’s next governor.**
If we’re going to win that race and prevent that from happening, we need to work night and day these next 9 weeks to get our message out.
I intend to do exactly that, Peter — because the stakes for New Jersey, and for our nation, are too high to give it anything less. But I can’t win this race without your help.
**[Let’s send a message that the people reject Donald Trump and Jack Ciattarelli’s disastrous agenda, Peter. Let’s send a message that we won’t stand for their attacks on working families or on the rule of law — and that we’re ready to lead the way with a better path forward. Please rush a split donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94239?refcode=em20250902-9341&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9341%2E614464%2ElYHfYg)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94239?refcode=em20250902-9341&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9341%2E614464%2ElYHfYg)**
Thank you,
Mikie

name: Pennsylvania Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Our courts have been our strongest checks against the MAGA agenda
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
November’s election will ask voters to retain three justices known for standing up to Republicans’ anti-democratic policies – these elections will decide the court’s balance of power and so much more. | | |
---
| |

body:
An error was detected in your Audit

Friend,

If this error goes unresolved the following issues _could_ arise:

**[❌INCOMPLETE VOTING RECORD
❌UNCOUNTED GOP AFFILIATION
❌EXCLUSION FROM KEY POLLING DATA](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlr64oibtt89u0sm6ghu0519hchp7buo5urfpsa8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j61pr6cdh2bs)**

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Democrats’ path to the Senate majority:
body:
---
Derek, Trump’s agenda is historically unpopular, and Democrats have a real chance to take back the Senate — _but to do it, we have to win in states like Ohio._ And in good news, legendary former Senator **Sherrod Brown recently announced that he will enter the race for Ohio’s Senate seat.** But here’s the thing: Republicans are going to spend _millions_ of dollars on this race, so it’s absolutely essential that Democrats are ready to organize and fight back — in states like Ohio and beyond. **That’s why the DNC is investing in every single state party, but it’s going to take a massive effort from all of us to win tough races like this one. So we’re asking:** **[Can you pitch in $3 now to support Democrats’ work to take back Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250902_4465_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4465_22930333_ALAA-K&akid=4465%2E22930333%2EALAA-K)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250902_4465_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4465_22930333_ALAA-K&akid=4465%2E22930333%2EALAA-K)** To win back the Senate, Democrats have to defend Jon Ossoff’s seat in Georgia. We have to hold open Democratic seats in states like Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire. We have to flip an open Republican-held seat in North Carolina. And we have to win in states like Maine, Texas, and Ohio. Sherrod Brown jumping into Ohio’s race is a HUGE boost, but winning races across the map will require strong statewide organizing programs nationwide. **[So, Derek, could you pitch in $3 to help Democrats all over the country? Your donation will help us organize everywhere, scale up our voter outreach operations _early,_ and ultimately, take back Congress and check Trump’s power:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250902_4465_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4465_22930333_ALAA-K&akid=4465%2E22930333%2EALAA-K)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250902_4465_fr&refcode2=4465_22930333_ALAA-K&akid=4465%2E22930333%2EALAA-K)**

name: Wes Moore
subject: Want to hop on a call, Peter?
body:
I’m hoping to give some of you a call.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=530%2E1086043%2ECAphQs)
Hey Peter, it’s Wes.
In case you missed it, **[I’m planning to FaceTime a few supporters who chip in any amount to our campaign. If you donate today, you might just end up on a list of supporters I’ll personally call to say thank you.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250902-1?refcode=em-20250902-1&refcode2=530_1086043_CAphQs&akid=530%2E1086043%2ECAphQs)**
I love talking to you. Getting an idea of what is on your mind. What’s keeping you up at night. What I need to prioritize.
Not only that, it’s important that I get to show thanks for your generosity. It’s because of people like you that we’re able to fuel our mission to leave no one behind.
**[So, what do you say, Peter? Would you like to get a call from me? Chip in your first donation right now, and you might hear from me soon!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250902-1?refcode=em-20250902-1&refcode2=530_1086043_CAphQs&akid=530%2E1086043%2ECAphQs)**
**[Chip in Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250902-1?refcode=em-20250902-1&refcode2=530_1086043_CAphQs&akid=530%2E1086043%2ECAphQs)**
Elevate,
Wes
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250902-1&t=2&refcode2=530_1086043_CAphQs&akid=530%2E1086043%2ECAphQs)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=530%2E1086043%2ECAphQs)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=530%2E1086043%2ECAphQs)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

Country star John Rich is no stranger to the spotlight. As an award-winning songwriter, he’s written and produced over 40 top 10
singles. John is also an entrepreneur and the host of "The Pursuit" on Fox Business. With all his success, John has never
forgotten everyday Americans. A member of Moms for America's Advisory Council, he has worked tirelessly as an advocate for
American values and patriotism. His new song, "The Devil and the TVA," is all about standing up for the little guy and using his

10 Awful Ideas Democrats Cling to No Matter How Much It Hurts Them

Yes, to an open border, socialism, LGBTQ everywhere, all the time, crime denial, DEI, lots of abortions, paid protesters, and
terrible singing. These are among the many truly awful ideas that the Democratic Party seems determined to embrace despite the
culture’s shift back to common-sense policies in America. This week, we’re taking a cringeworthy look at ten of the things that
they just can’t let go of, even if it hurts them.

clean_body: We sat down to talk with John Rich, award-winning songwriter, country star, and member of Moms for America's Advisory Board. He's still here to fight for everday Americans. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] September 2, 2025 • Newsletter John Rich: Fighting for Everyday Americans Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Country star John Rich is no stranger to the spotlight. As an award-winning songwriter, he’s written and produced over 40 top 10 singles. John is also an entrepreneur and the host of "The Pursuit" on Fox Business. With all his success, John has never forgotten everyday Americans. A member of Moms for America's Advisory Council, he has worked tirelessly as an advocate for American values and patriotism. His new song, "The Devil and the TVA," is all about standing up for the little guy and using his platform for good. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] 10 Awful Ideas Democrats Cling to No Matter How Much It Hurts Them Yes, to an open border, socialism, LGBTQ everywhere, all the time, crime denial, DEI, lots of abortions, paid protesters, and terrible singing. These are among the many truly awful ideas that the Democratic Party seems determined to embrace despite the culture’s shift back to common-sense policies in America. This week, we’re taking a cringeworthy look at ten of the things that they just can’t let go of, even if it hurts them. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. name: Urgent MAGA Reports
subject: Coordinated Effort Launched to Silence Karoline Leavitt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JEFF CRANK FOR CONGRESS
body:
Karoline is not backing down — but she shouldn’t have to fight this alone.

---
| | | | | | **BREAKING: Coordinated Effort Launched to Silence Karoline Leavitt**
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp3pu7ogupfpqrllra6afmg60kk7u1fbeffod4ro_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j69or4clh2bs)
---
| | | | | A powerful political machine is mobilizing to push Karoline Leavitt off the national stage. Their mission? Strip away one of the boldest pro-Trump voices from the White House and dismantle the America First message she champions every day.

**Karoline has stood firm -- without hesitation -- since day one. Whether defending President Trump or calling out extreme left-wing policies, she's refused to play politics and never backed down.**

That's why she's now under fire.

High-dollar, anti-Trump operatives are pouring money into a ruthless campaign aimed at silencing her voice -- and, by extension, the voices of millions of Americans who believe in putting our country first.
---
| | [STAND WITH LEAVITT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztilb7hv91a3e6mcvebeh96u1vadjecuj0ocitm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j69or4clh2bs)
---
This isn't just political posturing. It's a calculated attempt to control the narrative and eliminate anyone who dares to challenge it.

Karoline is not backing down -- but she shouldn't have to fight this alone.

If you believe in standing up for truth, for the America First movement, and for fearless leaders who actually fight for us -- now is the time to act.

[➡️ Donate $5, $10, or whatever you can to help us counter this attack and protect Karoline's voice in Washington](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze1cm426mvgj08e16emofm7vb3rgs4sssf3be950_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3j69or4clh2bs "➡️ Donate $5, $10, or whatever you can to help us counter this attack and protect Karoline’s voice in Washington")

Together, we can stop this coordinated takedown in its tracks and show the political establishment that grassroots patriots don't back down.

name: Donald John Trump
subject: I want to try and get to Heaven.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I believe He saved me for a reason, and this is why I think He did it!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
Friend,
**I want to try and get to Heaven.**
Last year I came millimeters from death when that bullet pierced through my skin. My triumphant return to the White House was never supposed to happen!
But I believe that God saved me for one reason: **TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
I wasn’t supposed to beat Crooked Hillary in 2016 — but I did.
I wasn’t supposed to secure the border & build the greatest economy in history — but I did.
I certainly wasn’t supposed to survive an assassin’s bullet — but by the grace of the almighty God, I did.
SO NOW, I have no other choice but to answer the Call to Duty, but I can’t do it alone.
Friend, you’ve been with me through everything.
You were there when they launched: the Russia Hoax, the first Impeachment, the second Impeachment, the rigged 2020 election, the Raid on Mar-a-Lago, the Arrest and Mugshot at the Fulton County Jail, the Removal from the CO ballot, the sham cases in DC / FL / NY / DC, the first Assassination attempt, the second Assassination attempt, and so much more!
Just because I won in a HISTORIC landslide and have unleashed the Golden Age of America, **THAT DOESN’T MEAN WE CAN TAKE OUR FOOT OFF THE GAS!**
The forces that hate our country don’t want a secure border or safe cities or high paying jobs. The Radical Left Lunatics want to STOP MAGA, but we’re not going to let them NO MATTER WHAT.
**Let me make this SOLEMN PLEDGE to you: I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
I put my life on the line willingly because this is what I was made to do, but our movement, the beautiful MAGA movement, is powered by YOU.
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.
This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
**_[So if you’re with me all the way to the end, join with MILLIONS of your fellow PATRIOTS by chipping in $15 to keep the wins rolling in!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[GIVE $15](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Sincerely,
Donald John Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: BREAKING: Trump to send troops into Chicago
body:
BREAKING: Trump’s authoritarian crackdown just escalated — and Chicago is next.
We need you in this fight right now.
Chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can to help us support resistance in every targeted city. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=090225_1]
In the past week, Trump has:
* Mobilized 1,700 National Guard troops across 19 states — bypassing governors to seize control.
* Threatened Chicago directly , calling it “our next” target after D.C
* Named New York as another city on his list.
This isn’t about safety. Crime in Chicago is down. This is about control. It’s about testing whether he can use the military as his personal police force to intimidate Democratic-led cities into submission.
If we don’t respond with overwhelming grassroots pressure, he will escalate further. And once he normalizes this, no city will be safe.
We are raising funds so we can help defend Chicago, New York, and every city in Trump’s crosshairs — but we cannot do it without you. Chip in now — $15, $25, or whatever you can — to help stop Trump’s authoritarian takeover before it spreads even further. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=090225_1]

body:
I'm determined to make every moment count.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114471697/567129231/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjc0MmMxMzctMTI4OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bBdWomeGmeGCYrUfHVTHSndhTLAugceLFfDuM3QBIeI=)
Peter, we have only nine weeks left until Election Day.
_And I'm determined to make every moment count._
I know most messages we send are packed with details about how competitive this race is — and it's true. The whole country really is looking to us to lead the way.
_But right now, I'm just thinking about all of you, about the remarkable community we've created in this campaign._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114471699/567129233/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjc0MmMxMzctMTI4OC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bBdWomeGmeGCYrUfHVTHSndhTLAugceLFfDuM3QBIeI=)
We wouldn't be in such a strong position to flip Virginia blue if not for the enthusiasm and dedication of top supporters like you, Peter. I'm so grateful.
The job's not done yet, of course. September has to be our strongest month of fundraising yet to stay on track to win.
[_**So, would you consider making a donation of $25 or more to our campaign today? I mean it when I say that every dollar helps us travel across the Commonwealth, from Dumfries to Danville, meeting voters face to face. clean_body: I'm determined to make every moment count. = Peter, we have only nine weeks left until Election Day. And I'm determined to make every moment count. I know most messages we send are packed with details about how competitive this race is — and it's true. The whole country really is looking to us to lead the way. But right now, I'm just thinking about all of you, about the remarkable community we've created in this campaign. = We wouldn't be in such a strong position to flip Virginia blue if not for the enthusiasm and dedication of top supporters like you, Peter. I'm so grateful. The job's not done yet, of course. September has to be our strongest month of fundraising yet to stay on track to win. = = = = = = = Honored to have your support, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Marc Elias
subject: I'm heading to the Supreme Court to fight for free and fair elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, Marc Elias here. After the 2020 election, **I beat Donald Trump 64 times in court -- and now, I'm headed to the Supreme Court to fight for free and fair elections.**

[**Before I explain, I have to ask -- will you chip in $5 to the DSCC to stand up against GOP leaders' blatant disregard for the law and fight for our democracy by flipping the Senate blue? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250902-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250902-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21058%2E9716520%2EodliOR)

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250902-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250902-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21058%2E9716520%2EodliOR)
---

As we speak, Donald Trump's cronies are trying to _rewrite_ this country's campaign finance laws to suit their own needs. They're ignoring _decades_ of precedent, attacking our country's values, and shredding bedrock legal principles _**to rig the rules for their own benefit.**_

**Here's how we fight back:**

First, we're headed to the Supreme Court -- where I will _**personally**_ deliver arguments to the justices on behalf of the DSCC and Democrats across the nation, urging the Court to reject the GOP's cynical schemes.

I'm planning to expose the Republican case for what it is: A corrupt effort to drown out the voices of everyday Americans by opening the floodgates to _even more_ money in our politics.

But no matter the outcome, our second step is clear: We MUST flip the Senate blue. The DSCC is the _only_ committee dedicated to electing a Democratic Senate, and by supporting their work, we can put a much-needed check on Trump's dangerous agenda.

**So I’m asking for your help as we work to stop Trump's allies, flip the Senate blue, and defend democracy itself:[Please, will you chip in $5 or more today to support the DSCC's efforts to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250902-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250902-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21058%2E9716520%2EodliOR)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Students Need Skills, Not Politics
body:
Beth Ann Rosica | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **NEA’s ‘Everyone Is Welcome’ toolkit pushes politics, not academics**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0448deab55&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| ''As the new school year begins, four national organizations teamed up to offer teachers across the country “Everyone is Welcome Here” toolkits. While the title of the kit sounds positive and uplifting, the **topics appear discriminatory and potentially exclude the vast majority of students** in schools. The kit focuses on teaching **inclusive sex education, reading banned books, protecting transgender students,** and climate action for the planet..."
---
| [Read Article Here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9ea6ee1494&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read Article Here")
---
|
---
|
## About Beth Ann Rosica:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dfe88ad56d&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
**Beth Ann Rosica** holds a Ph.D. in Education and has dedicated her career to advocating on behalf of at-risk children and families. She became politically active during the extended school closures, speaking out about the detrimental effects on children.

Beth Ann led the local grassroots movement to open schools and eliminate mandatory masks while assisting school board candidates across the state and country with their campaigns. She has a consulting business and covers education issues for _Broad + Liberty_. Beth Ann resides in West Chester, PA with her husband and two teenage sons.
---
|

clean_body: Beth Ann Rosica | B+L Featured Columnist | | | | | | | | NEA’s ‘Everyone Is Welcome’ toolkit pushes politics, not academics | | ''As the new school year begins, four national organizations teamed up to offer teachers across the country “Everyone is Welcome Here” toolkits. While the title of the kit sounds positive and uplifting, the topics appear discriminatory and potentially exclude the vast majority of students in schools. The kit focuses on teaching inclusive sex education, reading banned books, protecting transgender students, and climate action for the planet..." | "Read Article Here" | | About Beth Ann Rosica: | | Beth Ann Rosica holds a Ph.D. in Education and has dedicated her career to advocating on behalf of at-risk children and families. She became politically active during the extended school closures, speaking out about the detrimental effects on children. Beth Ann led the local grassroots movement to open schools and eliminate mandatory masks while assisting school board candidates across the state and country with their campaigns. She has a consulting business and covers education issues for Broad + Liberty. Beth Ann resides in West Chester, PA with her husband and two teenage sons. | | | We at are proud to provide readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Proud of what we built together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Labor Day may be over, but the fight continues |
#
---
First things first: _**thank you**_. Because of grassroots supporters like you, we hit our August fundraising goal! That means we’re ready for the fights ahead — and I couldn’t be more grateful. I also hope you had a great Labor Day. For me, it was a reminder of the generations of workers who organized, fought, and sacrificed to secure fair wages, safe workplaces, and the right to be treated with dignity and respect. In Michigan, we know that story better than anyone. The auto workers who stood together in Detroit put the world on wheels— _and built America’s middle class._ That spirit of solidarity has shaped our state, our economy, and the entire country. As governor, I’ve worked to honor that legacy. We’ve raised wages, expanded paid sick leave, restored workers’ rights, repealed the retirement tax, delivered free school meals for every child, and invested in childcare so parents can get to work without worrying how to make ends meet. **But there’s still more to do.** Because when unions are strong, Michigan is strong. And I will always fight like hell to make sure every Michigander can build a good life, where hard work is rewarded, families are supported, and the next generation can dream even bigger. Thank you for being part of this fight. More soon. — Gretchen Whitmer

name: Brianna Titone
subject: Labor Day Weekend Reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer
body:
As we come off of the long holiday weekend, I wanted to reach out and share a little bit about what it means to come from a working family and why that shapes everything I want to do as your next State Treasurer. | | | [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/fy1071REpR5zPGrUKY2nxY2BArXjdWKulMTXJmIhygsCg6IG72SwTZe1zzwm93NKJZdaXi0Vcw9w2JVKSYP-gdBagNr6wWyq_z9_t8iPzPHIn-hiY0lv86l3fQFXYpaObQoQ7U8uZ5fBEOvbfIUMbu9uI1Yo5uJfvgwgU5KsT389LwmSmU3mVDYRKUBTDGwyaEb9_B31Y50Ww7zFaVGkZ6B7-QkbtOIPuuHLiUi3k2KhxVr5plKuzcCA9yyqf_5E0VxkoJJg78u76Vzb1VH7yRMAsplPXvVSrMpDh60Gk7kSdk927TT7Ood3OsJUsDd1rxprY0zGwJrA_A30FYyqZ51h6vxVSghXe59zNrSIiX2pq_OVzYt81VB8AIDr8y_tfQKc-Myjqb8qqZkwSRtV3TO6kL3-0uq5pDGi2kLDxjwUwqw5ZCPto0R8PFGuk0fiCgv0FFv1PHlhIP65BNOSjXiSSbRcvw5NVQOjz6H80tzyiJkjZeokYkKb1ZXSLuMxyQYiWeWzBJFNmloK3CtiB-rDD8jExnVTj_xhIB6skVKP5ONfgFmSp1iECsZjXPnK6FloQPOrBlW_EhgFe75dqgoo2fYVwzT_6XB5ulSbU1HGhX_MekOuF-pk3PHPIZpmkga5ZRG-TRI2QpO3jun1MRV-FRiYpppqI-r9h9eKVg6VP2KcV-wNjGLCH_mxxnQj1leHMrzidJHaLEryAQFYy_r84fuKaoESMj-jO7f8D-IXNlB-6pFaANQVGUZGGarPeA8D0VjqcOA44C9gwRYdR3bwu7QrBBsT85IfaV3rSVJviMNIKbUErGEXWxrrRNjWj-OxFMyBrzfuGhww_6mt1JCMQmTUw1NC9JHW08_o4a3clmFUiSC2sfeH5xnfH7qCGrCIH8EwGavyGkBSb8KSk9XmVbzE3ONcTNTfkLJLXIUVv_xa-2C-UHTa/GafFBm7HE_gzpLCCe_b2sP5tx4KAaKKD/12) Hi Peter, I hope you had a wonderful Labor Day! As we come off the long holiday weekend, and recognizing the contributions of workers across the country, I wanted to reach out and share a little bit about what it means to come from a working family and why that shapes everything I want to do as your next State Treasurer. [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/22O1o0b2S86oRh2AL-68nhV7jqvoOe87Mh4Wy5r1kr-0qf_pwWHp9qLSYRh5nI4nP6VoexjLiUOwyKg5DkXPE9FLVAz-00C5B2PwV5B6b1PXTuDErPTYeG_Ry5Q8dTo9N6S-KBn1vaikQW99eQFe3gI8vckz10x18zGdaEoCwheTW0_pS3rhsJRdAKgaDUboIsrvZbfjtTcHzsW8d21MdfhiVznXIeXIvIYhVdtq7_2N6s1R37FbxPVyoen0mPkXvJOp-O2AgKfgXrQ6j2ngc8P6skitHjW1twY4L8EjDal0eRUnIVpJHRtLxXmLwawxov8aO4dNL-zof3F4j26AtcvJVVCgHZ4-RbqGYEvp3HiyiJM7pEBDyslY7KIkZl-4ExUF8fdThJYBrk1Xg6ihsh4mBg0ahxSFdyTqSIOu-yjWOxZhnRSGB2_eu9unJlpInAq67z0kEDKIhsM9iDXcCAFRODmHgy-5A5pQqxgSJ9_H8Ee5P0Zf3L0SKp76y-MV1tiSnVMW5ni_6R_xVX7EEvRF3nrKbNavl_nPbcIZ01F43AxOxsWsDUQxrkdxscVi_eccXDWDqBpnp46a4N5Ent-BCVx5eIGlTTslstFnjNzm1Bde_jMEkS95l9x62lV9JhLYjivAVnqo92_jrAzbNGj21wmFTiMv2f58vedGOYTClag-ZNNJcHrgb9R3QZGTBMUBZzsrfEpdSEzb5v7AjBoHyV0RX4DuqSdtspv7AZVGyuN0cN9r1-HTohzuHpBotMEnArnfr7IFow6QlemHrOdw50fsx8tx47ej5zJZ_9G2JSdprvQgjf_BscxUzhFY7of19YkwgR6PmuhlvFGIe0vpzAWWdWh1pf_WutP5dtBT45GaCStyfAmCToDPgZN_RoHOHEDl0KzZ0_Hq0_Jbckkh90zazQCUUOZqCb20MnZWEMWLvKhjqhAV/pPMQOH3uF3rVVw9Qahx3Bmnl9ZU85b2g/12) My parents were children of Italian immigrants who understood hard work. They watched their parents build a life in this country from the ground up. We lived in a small apartment above my grandparents' home until my dad and his friend could build our house with their own hands right next door. Mom was an IRS collection agent. My father worked as a state tax collector by day and served as president of his union at night. From an early age, they taught me that good jobs don't just happen; someone has to fight for them. Someone has to show up, do the work, and refuse to back down when it gets tough. **My parents also taught me that when working people stick together, we can build something better for everyone.** Now, as I run for State Treasurer, I carry all of that with me. When I talk about financial security and ensuring retirement for all Coloradans, I'm thinking about every working family that deserves that same stability we had. When I promise to fight for small businesses and make sure taxpayer dollars are spent wisely, **I remember that someone has to be willing to do the hard work of making sure everyone gets a fair shot.** [**If you're ready to join me in this fight, please consider donating to my campaign for State Treasurer today.**](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/cFYCp-9BZtnuFxm9t3POs8qOX5gvKbZzpIdOADrDzmFAu8BdNceBXxXoXOvl1WCYgzfzlZPCwP_xV5Ijcl9bUPPk41JAMjDtOIw0tScy-4vzFICPTVrUtHYEN9rnI4Ly-Fzfwf0g1FmzLkcyyVhXyoo72FN4C61ND-obpxXa67eSKklf9or_H6_eL-ABxEFvhJ3Wgtm1MBvAjxh4SyBlo5XqTI6hyALD15P0POD6_raoECx1zKM_wBSn5ko9k0fMtu_2zTZDMM2bYNAM6uIbQWsnZ5FGcqyiA4aF8EuzBlQyNXRJdRRONUV0LJovhIFyp_Wt_pNAQ3hJIO5up8q-P34O2FaFH-YwSH6uFBzIQ347y8lgwCkL4C5zHHM9EbnHyg99ePkr4Y5WxPGZVJV_lcAEWBXVn9x-CLpEidOQaycyBMuvUQCvb4klf4djEkjAyuigm4UrgsY6yTLxJSJhETBiZ_182sVU06bNpTP3uozM38kG0zL94i_5oYe0DS-MoaicvBNOvMH5mtU2BUOV4LAQEkLU4mHR3bNyA49ADoaxNSWfFQZUOxqF0ZiO5njGABNU31nP8ED3weLrQzhfZ8C5ibveNkuc8gyeTpd72SB9799hjdHQmiPfWUzk_X0wq6GPOuPG-NA3R4klub8NPGgbapiVOlFpbX-w29YCe-ZO8MXdgaLrlmpm6MX9tM65_T6CTZ2OPcFVX4EGLAIc0nhw1oBi6lrblSLcDpBjoqp9kgLleOXMzlWP7Zl-vZvW5RdirL0ux_gxUxtHWk56QeiL7LLUD7SNQIRF7UWvT1BeMmzWkDMfCVqX3Xnf8BAuD6Luk91DD34xs4BLpBNOwRhjZJMte4y4QneVZfNRlZ4D7bxEb5t0uo9wucOpBHeMMcwPZa5HJB-VSOO5XFLuSDlHPSzTe_tXuTeHrkMp2ssaRI5acBvzsTqu/jgsgqorN4wyi53j_lAzXD346hUTpv0Rb/12) Colordans deserve someone who knows their struggles. I've lived them, and that’s why I’m taking on this fight. Thank you, Brianna
* * *
Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. clean_body: As we come off of the long holiday weekend, I wanted to reach out and share a little bit about what it means to come from a working family and why that shapes everything I want to do as your next State Treasurer. | | | Hi Peter, I hope you had a wonderful Labor Day! As we come off the long holiday weekend, and recognizing the contributions of workers across the country, I wanted to reach out and share a little bit about what it means to come from a working family and why that shapes everything I want to do as your next State Treasurer. My parents were children of Italian immigrants who understood hard work. They watched their parents build a life in this country from the ground up. We lived in a small apartment above my grandparents' home until my dad and his friend could build our house with their own hands right next door. Mom was an IRS collection agent. My father worked as a state tax collector by day and served as president of his union at night. From an early age, they taught me that good jobs don't just happen; someone has to fight for them. Someone has to show up, do the work, and refuse to back down when it gets tough. My parents also taught me that when working people stick together, we can build something better for everyone. Now, as I run for State Treasurer, I carry all of that with me. When I talk about financial security and ensuring retirement for all Coloradans, I'm thinking about every working family that deserves that same stability we had. When I promise to fight for small businesses and make sure taxpayer dollars are spent wisely, I remember that someone has to be willing to do the hard work of making sure everyone gets a fair shot. Colordans deserve someone who knows their struggles. I've lived them, and that’s why I’m taking on this fight. Thank you, Brianna Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. **** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: Only 4 days left to register for the Autism Walk 2025!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Only 4 days left to register for the Autism Walk 2025!**
---
| [ ](http://)
---
| Last week to register! Join us for a day of **movement, music, and miracles** as we come together to support families impacted by autism! Whether you're walking **in person** at Huntington Beach Central Park or **virtually** from your own community, your steps matter. Walk as an individual, create a team, join an existing team, or just simply sponsor a walker. Rally your friends and family to support the cause from anywhere in the world! [Click HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=71e8e49bc7&e=3a42edfdc4) to Register!
---
| |
---
**Date:** Saturday, September 6, 2025

**Location:** Huntington Beach Central Park West, 18381 Goldenwest St, Huntington Beach, CA 92648
[_(See our website for parking and map)_](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=04c98b15e1&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [REGISTER NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=fb24ab9d56&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER NOW")
---
|
---
|
---
| We’re excited to announce that **tickets are officially on sale** for the **Autism Health Summit 2026** – happening **April 24–25, 2026** at the beautiful **Legacy Resort & Spa in San Diego, CA**! **Early Bird Special – Save 10%**
Register now and receive **10% off** your ticket with promo code **EarlyBird10**. This limited-time offer is valid through **Nov 1st only** , so don’t wait! You can also apply through your California Regional Center for approval. **Event Dates:**
* **Friday & Saturday, April 24–25** – Full conference with expert speakers, panels, and networking
* **Sunday, April 26** – **Optional Vendor Day** : An extra opportunity to connect with exhibitors and explore products, services, and resources that support the autism community

This one-of-a-kind, parent-driven event brings together top doctors, therapists, researchers, and educators to share the latest in integrative health, biomedical treatments, therapies, nutrition, and more. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, or healthcare professional, the Autism Health Summit is designed to inform, inspire, and empower. Don’t miss out on a transformative weekend of learning, connection, and hope. Sponsorships are available [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=63a2662329&e=3a42edfdc4). **Reserve your spot today and save 10%** at: [www.ahsconference.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=ad61bed17d&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [BUY TICKETS](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=4fd5c01f5e&e=3a42edfdc4 "BUY TICKETS")
---
|
---
| **Warrior Mom is Now on Audible!**
---
|
---
| We are thrilled to share some exciting news— _Warrior Mom: A Mother’s Journey in Healing Her Son with Autism_ is now available on **Audible through Amazon**! Whether you’re driving, walking, or simply prefer to listen, you can now experience this inspiring story in a whole new way. This audiobook is a heartfelt journey of hope, resilience, and determination—created to inspire families and advocates everywhere who are seeking answers and strength on their journey with autism. If you’ve ever wanted to dive into the Warrior Mom story but haven’t had the time to sit and read the book, this is the perfect way to join. You will be encouraged, inspired, and reminded that no challenge is too great when fueled by love and perseverance. For more information and to grab your copy today, visit **[www.WarriorMom.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=b5b5a63a5d&e=3a42edfdc4)**.
---
| [GET YOUR COPY](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=ab06cd44ec&e=3a42edfdc4 "GET YOUR COPY")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
