name: President Barack Obama
subject: We can’t lose focus on what matters.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We need you to be part of the effort to fight back.
|
---

Peter, what’s happening in Texas right now demands our attention.
What we’re witnessing right now is a power grab. Politicians are gerrymandering district lines in order to unfairly pick their voters instead of the other way around.
These folks are going out of their way to silence the will of the people, and deliberately undermine our democracy.
**But let’s be clear:** the American people have the power to stop it. But it depends on how much each of us are willing to stand up for the democratic ideals and principles that generations of Americans fought for. If we care about them as deeply as we claim to, then we are going to have to step up.
That’s exactly why Eric Holder and I started All On The Line. This grassroots movement is using every tool at its disposal to defend democracy in Texas and anywhere else we need to be. [**For those of us who believe in fairness in our elections, it’s an all-hands-on-deck moment. Will you make a donation today to help us fight for fair maps?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114475745/567143221/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ObamaAugNOR_email_20250902-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR-BHO_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250902-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR-BHO_&utm_campaign=ObamaAugNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjOWRlMWY2LTE3ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T1oLzfu-M3NZFg8iH21eFq2h1rUzZRU8xRfWk2BPcrA=)

The other day, I got a chance to speak to the Texas lawmakers who left the state to help highlight how brazen and cynical this mid-decade redistricting is. I told them I could not be prouder of what they had done to help focus the attention of the nation on this issue.
We can’t lose focus on what matters. This isn’t just about the politicians trying to game the system. It’s about who gets hurt in the process. It's about making sure we protect the voices – and the votes – of the American people.
By definition, gerrymandering comes at the expense of voters. Politicians deploy “cracking and packing” strategies to chop up the electorate so they can maximize the number of districts they think they can control. And when this happens, it ends up diluting the voting power of communities of color. Right now, some people in Washington, D.C., want to go even further — changing the rules of the census in violation of the Constitution to purposely undercount minority populations so they can aggressively redraw district maps across the country.
We need you to be part of the effort to fight back. Speak out, talk to your friends, make sure people know what’s at stake. If we don’t respond effectively, then the politicians behind these power grabs won’t stop in Texas. They do not appear to believe in this idea of an inclusive, expansive democracy. They want to restrict it, and they’re not that shy about saying so.
[**This is a moment for us to come together and make sure no one gets away with attacking the foundations of our democracy. Will you join us and help support this work?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114475752/567143228/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ObamaAugNOR_email_20250902-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR-BHO_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250902-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaAugNOR-BHO_&utm_campaign=ObamaAugNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjOWRlMWY2LTE3ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T1oLzfu-M3NZFg8iH21eFq2h1rUzZRU8xRfWk2BPcrA=)
Thank you,
Barack Obama

clean_body: We need you to be part of the effort to fight back. | Peter, what’s happening in Texas right now demands our attention. What we’re witnessing right now is a power grab. Politicians are gerrymandering district lines in order to unfairly pick their voters instead of the other way around. These folks are going out of their way to silence the will of the people, and deliberately undermine our democracy. But let’s be clear: the American people have the power to stop it. But it depends on how much each of us are willing to stand up for the democratic ideals and principles that generations of Americans fought for. If we care about them as deeply as we claim to, then we are going to have to step up. That’s exactly why Eric Holder and I started All On The Line. name: God help us
subject: Something horrible is approaching for Democrats
body:
The consequences of losing this key court won’t only be felt by Pennsylvanians, they will reverberate through the nation
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QJVN5nYs9473CgB1x3tjN2ibnP--zhA7rkyDuEnRY2mnBf_lqYFr4aYpCZ4zB7sblV38j5JFVsn5djGDLRiqaPkBrNdGqfrl8by-Up48u7RglM7P052DdTPIc9DcF-GHwsghNudTkTLvtxw5NM2069NZF-Kszx1TzrfWaNxAfhvCeRl2kvcJrPHtxhbeaVpVrp3mpsIYB7eU6Q7sPw2f1fXJeuR6yq57zlN2oSgdxDw=&c=xf1dCGcX0UGSl7z10yxNfJYaPnKoe7fi9gRL0gmWaeO-t84HnONF2w==&ch=8hX8CQlPuljd1wot3i9MfvePjtUY4OZwjDYE-vkEfbUVlDOjVxcJxA==)

| Peter,
Something horrible is approaching for Democrats and if we are caught unprepared it will derail any chance of us surviving Trump's second term with our democracy intact.
There is a very real prospect of Democrats losing their majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in the upcoming November 2025 Supreme Court Election.
For Pennsylvanians it will mean their Dem members of Congress will be cut out of their districts and an extreme abortion ban. But the consequences of losing this key court won't only be felt by Pennsylvanians, they will reverberate through the nation and god help us if we lose here...

There are 63 days until this key November election and the situation on the ground for Democrats is dire. We are being outspent by MAGA ten fold and if the election were held today there is a very real chance that Democrats would lose it.

clean_body: The consequences of losing this key court won’t only be felt by Pennsylvanians, they will reverberate through the nation | | | | | == | Peter, Something horrible is approaching for Democrats and if we are caught unprepared it will derail any chance of us surviving Trump's second term with our democracy intact. There is a very real prospect of Democrats losing their majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in the upcoming November 2025 Supreme Court Election. For Pennsylvanians it will mean their Dem members of Congress will be cut out of their districts and an extreme abortion ban. But the consequences of losing this key court won't only be felt by Pennsylvanians, they will reverberate through the nation and god help us if we lose here... | | == | Dems losing the Pennsylvania Supreme Court removes the only thing standing in the way of MAGA rigging Pennsylvania in the 2026 midterms and the 2028 presidential election where Trump plans to seek a third term. Nineteen electoral college votes -- gone forever. There are 63 days until this key November election and the situation on the ground for Democrats is dire. We are being outspent by MAGA ten fold and if the election were held today there is a very real chance that Democrats would lose it. == | | == | | == | | | | == Let's mount our comeback while we still have time. Defend our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

## In an emotional 1-on-1 interview, one of America's most respected business magnate and investor, CEO of SpaceX, Tesla, Inc. and Twitter, Inc., [Elon Musk](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12695310/VaHR0cHM6Ly9nby51c21hZ2F6aW5laW5zaWRlci5jb20vYTBkNmE0ZGItYTQxMS00ZmJlLTg3ZDctNDkwYjZjYjI4NDk5/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsV0dLQ29SYg/gaLcZpw/sev4ddf4603), revealed that he wouldn't be where he is now.

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12695310/VaHR0cHM6Ly9nby51c21hZ2F6aW5laW5zaWRlci5jb20vYTBkNmE0ZGItYTQxMS00ZmJlLTg3ZDctNDkwYjZjYjI4NDk5/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsV0dLQ29SYg/gaLcZpw/sev4ddf4603)
## He went on to say that he honestly didn't expect things to get this big and he knew he would receive scrutiny from fans and sponsors for this, but he felt it was a time...

Here is what He said: ["This was a really, really difficult decision to tell the truth..."](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12695310/VaHR0cHM6Ly9nby51c21hZ2F6aW5laW5zaWRlci5jb20vYTBkNmE0ZGItYTQxMS00ZmJlLTg3ZDctNDkwYjZjYjI4NDk5/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsV0dLQ29SYg/gaLcZpw/sev4ddf4603)

# Trump reveals his 11 lessons for success in America
## _[Every American needs to listen to this...](https://substack.com/redirect/587b7458-5e26-41ff-9cf4-dd19b6f77863?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/587b7458-5e26-41ff-9cf4-dd19b6f77863?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump **[posted a special message to X](https://substack.com/redirect/587b7458-5e26-41ff-9cf4-dd19b6f77863?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Sunday evening, revealing 11 important lessons he has learned from a lifetime of pursuing greatness.
Trump believes all Americans are capable of greatness if they follow these steps:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/00ee8027-9027-4d4e-8a2f-75238003619f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**" Let me share some of the biggest lesson I've learned from a lifetime of building dreams..." **
1. If you think you are too young to do something great "you are wrong! In America with drive and ambition, young people can do anything!"
2. Love what you do, "I rarely see someone who is successful that doesn't love what he or she does."
3. Think BIG, "If you're going to do something, you might as well think big."
4. Work hard
5. Don't lose momentum
6. Have the courage to be an outsider and "take certain risks."
7. Trust you instincts and have common sense
8. Believe in the American Dream
9. Think of yourself as a winner, "Our heroes are the ones who take charge of their own destiny despite the odds."
10. Be an original, "God only created one of you, so don't try to be someone else."
11. Never ever give up, "Nothing is impossible,... In America, the impossible is what we all do best."

* * *
# Airbnb founder abandons the Democratic party and torches them on the way out the door
Airbnb co-founder Joe Gebbia **[abandoned the Democratic Party for Trump,](https://substack.com/redirect/310cefcf-8524-4c9b-beb0-393072e2ab54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** citing a border crisis that he believes allows "criminals and dangerous people" into the U.S., a shift revealed in a candid podcast interview.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/310cefcf-8524-4c9b-beb0-393072e2ab54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Gebbia's Political Journey** : Initially a Democrat, Gebbia's concerns about border security led him to engage with Trump adviser Jared Kushner, reshaping his political stance.
* **Influence of Kennedy** : Gebbia's support for Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s health-focused platform partially inspired his move toward the Republican Party.
* **Border Crisis Concerns** : Gebbia criticized the Democratic Party's border policies, feeling they failed to enforce laws effectively, prompting his ideological shift.
* **Impact on Tech** : His decision reflects a broader trend of tech leaders reevaluating political affiliations amid national policy debates.

* * *
* * *
# Bessent confident SCOTUS will back Trump on tariffs
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent **[expressed confidence](https://substack.com/redirect/8341ef83-8730-4960-89c1-e257569ff5a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that the Supreme Court will uphold President Donald Trump's use of a 1977 emergency law to impose broad tariffs, while noting the administration has prepared a backup plan if the court rules against them.
* **Legal Strategy:** Bessent is preparing a legal brief for the solicitor general that emphasizes the need to address long-standing trade imbalances and reduce fentanyl imports as justification for the emergency tariff powers.
* **Court Ruling Challenge:** A federal appeals court ruled Friday that most of Trump's global tariffs were illegal, saying he exceeded his authority in using emergency powers, though the tariffs remain in effect during the appeals process.
* **Trump's Response:** Trump responded on Truth Social declaring "ALL TARIFFS ARE STILL IN EFFECT!" and called the court "Highly Partisan," while expressing confidence that the Supreme Court will help use tariffs to "benefit our nation," leaving his "reciprocal" tariffs on dozens of trade partners in legal limbo.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7808ee2e-36f4-49ab-93fc-667c585540b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
* * *
# Stocks are now more expensive than they were during the Dot-Com bubble
Wall Street's record-breaking rally **[faces growing scrutiny](https://substack.com/redirect/26c6da3c-32c5-40d2-ae23-b4b5ee464183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as lofty stock valuations spark investor concerns, with markets hitting all-time highs despite warnings of overvaluation and potential economic turbulence ahead.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2e2a1985-9a44-47da-bf4c-0daf6d2458b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Historic Market Peaks** : The S&P 500's surge to record highs, driven by AI enthusiasm, masks concerns about unsustainable valuations, with investors questioning long-term growth.
* **Valuation Metrics Soar** : Price-to-earnings ratios for major indices hit levels unseen since the dot-com era, signaling potential risks if earnings fail to match expectations.
* **Sectoral Shifts Emerge** : Investors rotate toward rate-sensitive sectors like small caps, anticipating Federal Reserve rate cuts, while tech giants face pressure from high expectations.
* **Volatility Looms Ahead** : Historical data suggests September and October could bring market fluctuations, urging investors to diversify portfolios to mitigate risks.

* * *
* * *
# By-now-pay-later giant Klarna eyes $1.27 BILLION US IPO
Swedish fintech giant Klarna aims **[to raise up to $1.27 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/7634be91-e5c7-4fe1-80d1-1da0b4cf8c48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in its long-awaited U.S. IPO, listing on the NYSE to capitalize on surging demand for buy now, pay later services.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6bcbb957-6e9c-4750-9fed-a804905093f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Fintech valuation soars:** Klarna's IPO could value the company at up to $14 billion, a rebound from its 2022 low of $6.7 billion, reflecting renewed investor confidence in fintech.
* **Shareholder-driven offering:** Existing shareholders will sell 28.8 million shares, while Klarna offers 5.56 million, signaling a strategic move to unlock value for early backers.
* **Financial performance mixed:** June quarter revenue rose 20% to $823 million, but net losses widened to $53 million, highlighting challenges amid expansion efforts.
* **Tariff-related delays overcome:** Klarna paused its IPO in April due to market volatility from Trump's tariff plans but now moves forward as markets stabilize.

* * *
* * *
# The Powerball Jackpot just hit $950 million (Not Financial Advice!)
The Powerball jackpot **[skyrocketed to $950 million,](https://substack.com/redirect/f292a1ee-434f-4733-bea9-b42593d11b01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the largest of 2025, after no one matched all six numbers in Wednesday's drawing, sparking frenzy among hopeful players nationwide on Saturday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f292a1ee-434f-4733-bea9-b42593d11b01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **No Jackpot Winner** : No ticket matched the winning numbers--9, 12, 22, 41, 61, red Powerball 25--extending the jackpot's climb since the last win on May 31, 2025, in California.
* **Massive Cash Option** : The $950 million jackpot offers a cash value of $428.9 million, with winners choosing between a lump sum or 30 annual payments increasing 5% yearly.
* **Odds Remain Daunting** : The odds of winning the jackpot are 1 in 292.2 million, while the chance of winning any prize is 1 in 24.9, per Powerball officials.
* **Recent Notable Wins** : A Massachusetts player recently won $2 million in a single drawing, highlighting smaller but significant prizes as the jackpot continues to grow.

* * *
* * *

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Churches Are UNDER ATTACK In America
body:
Right now there is a MAJOR escalation of attacks upon Churches in the United States of America. Since 2018 there has been an increase of over 700% ac
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12659.1.b80ca236c4fda0d51b1e93d31dcb89ef) |
---
Right now there is a **MAJOR escalation** of attacks upon Churches in the United States of America. Since 2018 there has been an **increase of over 700%** according to the **Family Research Council**. In 2018 there were 50 reported attacks on churches (**less than 1 per week**). In 2024 there were 415 reported attacks on churches (**more than 1 per day**). I want to **offer two thoughts**. **First to the Pastors** reading this.
Take measures at your church to prevent these attacks. At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12660.1.ac5a7b12fb761d6de4abce866d5af2c4), I am beyond grateful for our security team that watches over the House every service to make sure our people are _SAFE_. But we also partner with local law enforcement every service as well. The police car stationed at the front of our church, I believe, will prevent 99% of bad actors from even attempting something they should not. **We must be as wise as serpents and as harmless as doves.** **Second to Believers** reading this.
Don't you dare stop attending church! God has not given us a spirit of fear but instead one of power, love and a sound mind (**2 Tim 1:7** ). We are told in **Hebrews 10** that as the Day of the Lord gets near that many believers will stop attending church but we are command not to stop gathering together because we need one another. **Do not let the enemy intimidate you from going to the House of the Lord**. Although the stats are _disheartening_ , history proves that whenever the Church is attacked, she always _flourishes_. These attacks will backfire on the enemy and the Church of the Lord Jesus Christ in America will prevail and be even more effective because of them. **Pray for the Body of Christ and the local churches throughout America.** Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
---
## Progress At Sheridan.Church
---

---

Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/8KhQu-efqGY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12662.1.585c881c8bc47bebf96b51ec5c520912) Please consider giving towards the mission of [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12663.1.84bbb55ea0982829e54434ce592e85ad) by visiting: [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12664.1.e5d03d2150db578f61134d1ebd893f5f) or mailing a check to 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145 Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12665.1.01960ba16517e0945535161a9939f11e)
---
---
|
---
This September is **IGNITE 2025** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12666.1.8e62030482b3c3c8130ba4a47dbc5ccc)! **IGNITE Service Schedule:** -Wednesday, September 3 @7pm CT: **Jackson Lahmeyer** -Sunday, September 7 @10am + 6pm CT: **Perry Stone** -Sunday, September 14 @10am CT: **Darryl Strawberry** -Sunday, September 21 @10am CT: **Dr. Randy Caldwell** -Sunday, September 28 @10am CT: **Bishop Darrell Hines** September will be an _INCREDIBLE_ month at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12667.1.3e68416bf753de8f92fa7359db7a8338)!
---
---
|
---
Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12668.1.bbc527c641f08608d6711f45037064bf) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12669.1.e4175e23a807fa6dda79026c776b9178)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12670.1.d195879794be231d2edae7c6d28e0b05)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12671.1.03b0c2e3d55e93c6e77f8c1f22a1956c). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12672.1.f3cfca539d841098c183c03c2dfd1432) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12673.1.e9bcf8291f8a1b91d810e9da65cc4c59) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24266685.12674.1.b4dbc4e8ae67786acb550e203110d0fe) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

The police car stationed at the front of our church, I believe, will prevent 99% of bad actors from even attempting something they should not. We must be as wise as serpents and as harmless as doves. Second to Believers reading this. Don't you dare stop attending church! God has not given us a spirit of fear but instead one of power, love and a sound mind (2 Tim 1:7 ). We are told in Hebrews 10 that as the Day of the Lord gets near that many believers will stop attending church but we are command not to stop gathering together because we need one another. Do not let the enemy intimidate you from going to the House of the Lord. Although the stats are disheartening , history proves that whenever the Church is attacked, she always flourishes. These attacks will backfire on the enemy and the Church of the Lord Jesus Christ in America will prevail and be even more effective because of them. Pray for the Body of Christ and the local churches throughout America. Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer Progress At Sheridan.Church | Check Out What Is Happening At Sheridan.Church!! Watch it here: Please consider giving towards the mission of by visiting: or mailing a check to 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145 Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer | | | This September is IGNITE 2025 at ! IGNITE Service Schedule: -Wednesday, September 3 @7pm CT: Jackson Lahmeyer -Sunday, September 7 @10am + 6pm CT: Perry Stone -Sunday, September 14 @10am CT: Darryl Strawberry -Sunday, September 21 @10am CT: Dr. Randy Caldwell -Sunday, September 28 @10am CT: Bishop Darrell Hines September will be an INCREDIBLE month at ! | Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My FIRST book, is out and has reached #12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth! I have been blown away by the response! THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the Limited Edition Signed Book here: It is also available on \+ . Amazon : Barnes & Noble: I really want to thank MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced. | Get your here: Thank you, | | ©2025 Jackson Lahmeyer | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: Johnny =?UTF-8?B?4oCcSm9leeKAnQ==?= Jones
subject: This is never an easy conversation
body:
First responders go by a lot of names... But you and I know them by the one name they won’t call themselves: hero.

|
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsbgv2o28bepg7atfu4ji77bg4hvf9o910lohfoo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9uvkqugqos6d0g35niu3mepoq0t29ve53c0gr70_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)

Friend,

First responders go by a lot of names...

... firefighter.
... paramedic.
... police officer.
... disaster response technician.
... border patrol agent.

**But you and I know them by the one name they won’t call themselves: hero.**

First responders are the hometown heroes who keep us safe. They go to work every day, even though that means confronting the worst situations imaginable. It’s what makes these men and women heroes. They know what they signed up for and do it anyway.

However, their service and sacrifice are almost always overlooked by the Radical Left.

It’s time to restore trust and honor to our first responders.

That’s why I wrote my latest book, _Behind the Badge_ , dedicated to telling their story.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv5e4n831b4a22124slj5l253k05keffa6su8jc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)
I am also teaming up with **the Kash Foundation** to support our first responders and veterans.

While activists take cheap shots at our first responders, the Kash Foundation is restoring faith in their service, defending their dignity, and standing up for them when attacked by the media and activists.

[I believe in the mission of the Kash Foundation, and I am helping them raise money to support our veterans and first responders by raising $20,000 before the end of the month.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zijpcao12jgl7a4o3lhqn06l07dohc4kbgiqukg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)
[DONATE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq3kb894lsaliau4afce0lft0sbk81mq9eaa0s3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)
I know these men and women. I grew up with them, and I served with them. I know the trauma they endure and the victories that they get to save lives every day.

**And it’s a shame the little thanks first responders get sometimes.**

The one thing they all have in common is that each one of them felt compelled to help their fellow citizens, regardless of the risk.

Too often, government officials are setting up our first responders to fail and being used as political punching bags for the Radical Left.

It’s time for you and me to protect them.

The Kash Foundation has been able to:
* Provide financial support and care for families of those who fall in the line of duty. They help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.
* Provide scholarships to the children of those who gave everything. They provide scholarships that help those kids, so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future.
* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, they help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

**Let’s let our first responders know that we have their backs!**

[Please show first responders that they have your support by donating any amount you can spare today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq9uknfejtulltbh1imk9q1odiutdafdjjgjp2ag_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)
[DONATE $10](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm2drorrr2fdtfj5on0c3lrbsa4fjprrd6fd3un0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)

[DONATE $35](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z89u6q9afinb6sa6gge24g4b8a54cq6j93rolsrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)

[DONATE $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg3hm3c26gf1hcfh48tcis8l1gj23aebagb1m8d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)

[DONATE $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsk4vpiqvla6ur009qd0q6if4ecebebch1h49sgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)

[DONATE $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbc2dq4u63mbd1j0uqhqigf01616re9k6gph3ra0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)

[DONATE $1,000](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zelbt4urqh0lbqh94kj5r0ngvoptoou9v8i76btg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)

[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zidj50v45l128kin2huequv5239fm9gka3umnuio_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c3gmap71c9h2bs)
You and I owe everything to our first responders. It’s time to make sure we have their backs, because they will always be there when we need them.

God Bless America,

Johnny “Joey” Jones

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Department of War. Epstein. What a week already.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.nTQp_FEIcSHl649vCJCicpBeFu_hgbqC7UpFkHz6Yod6PUnYMm22dlWej4ZGEx3iXRqUorPSqFLc4mfYEil7iRDwneGujCOouyjB_g0aJvjWHlVgDuFI00B6gMchROxGWA5XoaIBRJcoyTXTeClT1HZqfWVJhgMviufAcK832zMHweSZO627lb1NIKZnEEgpnjl0F31aj6jRHL1EwrFoFOFuCtTVc87A5VsCemW22vSPqWCq0AZAdtZzjA92jiXzVbpu96VptFECeHg8dT0j3YQeAyyVFFSEwqWzHuxqaRaFZPjHMVaZnzEg6CufaGtR/4jk/MJvRwVBNT4ub8XrNOsXQYw/h0/h001.sP2pRhGkPvfIc9iLy7Ms-UXqyoKrcHnH0BfK6RY_9CQ)
---
Friends, Trump wants to rename the Department of Defense to the Department of War. That announcement is coming today. **That 's not a joke -- it's his plan. He says it's "stronger," that "we won everything" back when it had that name. But we know what this really is: a not-so-subtle shift toward authoritarian power, aggression, and intimidation-- abroad and at home.** **And while Trump escalates, MAGA leaders in Congress are stonewalling demands for justice.** Right now, survivors of Jeffrey Epstein's abuse are preparing to speak publicly -- demanding that sealed files be released and the truth finally exposed. But Republican leadership is dragging its feet, hoping the outrage fades and the names stay buried. **They 're protecting the powerful and punishing the brave.** **[This is a breaking point. And it's exactly why No Dem Left Behind is doing the work that too many others ignore.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1cUH2EHjE04v5-Qva94gckLSm9DeXSviit_djIbaVDAjidD-btSmbXeTKylIE38ol_DLT6VUKHGvGrIKINxGYL7ukYCS3MnxViWM-d834nGZ-1BvDkMcIe-jtuE_Sb6fl3DV58osAi8mVJUjCa93ddjJnTZmmfM67bC82_s4cf71lskkKFwyhB_0xl2IogHqiy02m0eJxHV7gQt-pn-fOBmubyvaCCOmBxI-0GthhTE6VlCnmncbV3jaK77919obVgU4LV_Zyr9LnXqyZM6tIS2F8n1s66lIOdSCSa1ImpFMTNQhYGdACUL81I2TgGhJW8n3FZhWN8wTmsSbhoet3N8/4jk/MJvRwVBNT4ub8XrNOsXQYw/h1/h001.GDkw_YlEkOzh2sMrMvrWdOy6jQp8Q_PSSby7wurgWVo)** We're backing Democrats in **uphill battles** -- not safe blue districts where the outcome's guaranteed, but the tough seats where MAGA money floods in and the fight is steep. These are the races that can break the far-right's grip on power -- but only if we show up early and strong. [**Please, chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us expose the truth, defend democracy, and fuel the candidates who are fighting like hell in the places that matter most.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1cUH2EHjE04v5-Qva94gckLSm9DeXSviit_djIbaVDAjM8DjGZQzZ59AxFsjI_E4utduzfeyQn-CGqMka7QOKpUWW9O6qVUAZS92KfYDhFTZgTQxPFysi-tyo2u1S6V6sMsH5apD-50Yh5GOYeI3-exBE14GGSnANvfHe25Krb8c3obJ34j-UF4bVzomCx1DvhmxqmIl1i-hgYQN7I2o3Pw0ig5fLAav5uMCEWWwwPJxCIal4LyGdCi7FVbcpjYMvsP-B_7GCeI7okj1kF82xyxt_R6u25qN_bnpnQDOvBYDDK1xduwg4DSoQ0AcOHr9xM7MBW4yzIoG-hkrHAoEiDs/4jk/MJvRwVBNT4ub8XrNOsXQYw/h2/h001.l2VES5L_68D2sz9J08Oy8EXsYFY-OyJvik0BcPkDueE)

clean_body: | | Friends, Trump wants to rename the Department of Defense to the Department of War. That announcement is coming today. That 's not a joke -- it's his plan. He says it's "stronger," that "we won everything" back when it had that name. But we know what this really is: a not-so-subtle shift toward authoritarian power, aggression, and intimidation-- abroad and at home. And while Trump escalates, MAGA leaders in Congress are stonewalling demands for justice. Right now, survivors of Jeffrey Epstein's abuse are preparing to speak publicly -- demanding that sealed files be released and the truth finally exposed. But Republican leadership is dragging its feet, hoping the outrage fades and the names stay buried. They 're protecting the powerful and punishing the brave. We're backing Democrats in uphill battles -- not safe blue districts where the outcome's guaranteed, but the tough seats where MAGA money floods in and the fight is steep. These are the races that can break the far-right's grip on power -- but only if we show up early and strong. The other side is betting on fear, silence, and unchecked power. Let's prove them wrong. ## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/15bad8c6-fac0-4ef6-bc5f-87f22f4d8aef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Coming up today I'm joined by Roger Stone to talk all things MAGA. Wednesday I'm talking with Ian Prior about schools that are still resisting the President's order to stop allowing men in women's sport and and former California Republican Chair Jessica Patterson discusses the effort to stop Gavin Newsom's redistricting efforts. Thursday, we've got a great panel featuring Mehek Cooke, Tony Katz and Michelle Backus. Friday, we're finishing the week strong with pollster Chris Wilson on the latest trends and campaigns. Don't miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!

## Trump makes DC safe, Democrats complain...
You'd think people would stop being shocked when President Trump delivers results.
He's been doing it since he got into office--the first time.
Yet everyone is amazed when he does what he says he's gonna do.
His efforts to curb crime in D.C. are just the latest example.
Lax policies had let criminals run wild throughout the city; all it took was a little law and order to make the city safe again.
The National Guard is deployed to secure D.C., and suddenly crime rates plummet.
Stopping crime in American cities isn't fiction.
Trump has shown it can be done in DC in a matter of weeks.
So the real question is, what's stopping other mayors from following suit?
D.C. is the perfect template; why aren't leaders of other major cities working to make their cities safe too?
Let's break it down...

Democrats must do their job and uphold the law

# _Opinion_ | Federal Law Enforcement Delivers Safety:

# Connecticut Leaders Must Step Up

---
| | **By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**
The surge in federal immigration enforcement in Connecticut under President Trump’s second term is no accident—it is a testament to Washington’s renewed commitment to law and order. The men and women of federal law enforcement—ICE, the FBI, Homeland Security—have brought with them courage, resolve, and a tireless pursuit of public safety, ensuring that our neighborhoods are protected from **threats posed by criminal aliens and those who flagrantly disregard American law.** While critics have turned every operation into a spectacle for social media and political grandstanding, the facts tell a story of positive action and decisive leadership.
Consider August 2025’s **Operation Broken Trust,** a sweeping four-day ICE effort that resulted in the arrests of 65 undocumented individuals across Connecticut[1][2]. Notably, 29 of those detained had criminal charges or convictions, ranging from kidnapping and assault to sex crimes and drug trafficking. These are not harmless individuals—they are threats to families, schools and businesses in every part of the state. Federal authorities worked swiftly, at personal risk, to remove these dangers, using intelligence and cooperation with international law enforcement to apprehend several with foreign warrants on their records. It was exactly the sort of action that the public expects when the safety and order of its communities are jeopardized.
The numbers do not lie. **ICE arrests in Connecticut soared in 2025: 405 detentions** in just the first seven months—a 134% increase over the same stretch in 2024, and a dramatic jump from the historically modest figures of prior years[3][4]. Unlike some previous sweeps, these arrests targeted courthouses, worksites, and homes—places long treated as sanctuaries from accountability under the prior administration[4][5]. Washington has sent a clear message: sanctuary policies and activist obstructionism will not supersede federal law.Yet, in stark contrast, Connecticut’s political class has responded with opposition, not cooperation. **Senate Majority Leader Bob Duff condemns ICE as heavy-handed when federal agents detain serious offenders—painting law enforcement as villains for using non-lethal force on a man in Norwalk who resisted arrest[6]. Mayor Harry Rilling protested the presence of ICE agents near a police station, twice demanding they vacate city property—even as criminal warrants were being served[6]. The city’s police chief, James Walsh, worried more about public perception than public safety, lamenting that ICE’s visibility might “deter people from coming in.”[6]**
This is not leadership—it is abdication.
**Governor Ned Lamont** and**U.S. Senator Richard Blumenthal** have **doubled down,** invoking **Connecticut’s Trust Act** to shield non-citizens, launching investigations into “aggressive” ICE tactics and pushing back on the “sanctuary state” label[6][7]. Their concern is not for the law-abiding public, but for the continued comfort and protection of those who may endanger it. Meanwhile, as ICE agents face jeers, protests, and even formal rebukes, criminal aliens walk free—or back into the revolving doors of local justice.
The question, then, is why Connecticut’s leaders persist with these misplaced priorities. Why defend the status quo at the expense of neighborhood security and public trust? Part of it may be political calculus—catering to loud activist groups, law firms, and municipal associations determined to curtail federal authority. Part of it may be misjudged compassion, assuming that every individual swept up in an ICE operation is a benign victim rather than a potential threat. But that **compassion is ill-suited** **for those with warrants for sex trafficking, armed assault, or repeat DUIs.**
The reality is harsh: More than half of those arrested in recent sweeps had no criminal record—true. But nearly half did, and many of those crimes were serious and violent[1][2]. When Connecticut officials cry foul about mass deportations and courthouse arrests, **they are not defending the innocent but obstructing the removal of the guilty.** Their resistance sends a dangerous message: that ideology matters more than safety, and that the rule of law is negotiable.
**It is time for a reckoning.** Connecticut’s elected leaders, starting with Governor Lamont and the mayors of the state’s largest cities, must stop playing politics with law enforcement. Local officials should end the practice of denying ICE access to municipal facilities, and instead work hand-in-glove with federal agencies to keep our towns and cities safe. Lawmakers should revisit and revise the **Trust Act,** ensuring that true criminals do not hide behind legal technicalities and municipal red tape.
Let federal authorities do their job; let them pursue those who threaten our communities and flout our laws. It is not only sound policy—it is safe policy.
**Connecticut owes its citizens real security,** not press releases and partisan posturing. When it comes to law and order, the priority must always be protection and peace for those who call this state home. **Anything less is a betrayal of the public trust**[6][7][3][4][5].
**Sources**[1] Norwalk ICE arrests stoke anger among city, state officials and immigrant rights advocates https://www.ctpublic.org/news/2025-08-20/norwalk-ice-arrests-stoke-anger-among-city-state-officials-and-immigrant-rights-advocates[2] ICE arrests 65 people in CT in four-day operation https://cthosp.org/daily-news-clip/ice-arrests-65-people-in-ct-in-four-day-operation/[3] ICE arrests, deportations in CT up sharply in Trump's second term https://ctmirror.org/2025/08/28/ct-ice-arrests-deportations/[4] ICE arrests are up in Connecticut. Here's where migrants were ... https://www.ctpublic.org/news/investigative/2025-07-03/ice-arrests-connecticut-where-migrants-were-apprehended[5] Connecticut Mirror on Instagram https://www.instagram.com/p/DN6QdmJDpiw/[6] More Than 450 Arrests of Illegal Immigrants and Suspected Drug ... https://www.dea.gov/press-releases/2025/02/27/more-450-arrests-illegal-immigrants-and-suspected-drug-criminals-across[7] Immigration Prosecutions Jump in March 2025 - TRAC https://tracreports.org/reports/761/

**PHOENIX, AZ –** Following the release of a new [Noble Predictive Insights](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=1f47e24706&e=ebfb0fda52) poll showing Trump-endorsed conservative business leader Karrin Taylor Robson leading Congressman Andy Biggs by **10 points** in the Republican primary for Governor of Arizona, media outlets from across Arizona and the country are taking note of the momentum behind KTR’s campaign.
**WHAT THEY ARE SAYING:**
* [ KTAR: “New poll on Arizona governor’s race shows 10-point gap in Republican primary.”](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=59116e8c48&e=ebfb0fda52)

* [Newsweek: “Republicans' Chances of Dethroning Katie Hobbs as Arizona Governor: Polls” ](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=ae9ab1403d&e=ebfb0fda52)

* [State Affairs: “Robson celebrates 10 point lead over Biggs in latest poll.](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=00187ac4e3&e=ebfb0fda52)

* [News 13](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=30de583cf9&e=ebfb0fda52) (TV)

* [News 13](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=7873fdd34f&e=ebfb0fda52) (TV)

* [Arizona’s Family News](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=8deb0ccc3d&e=ebfb0fda52) (TV)

You can find the full poll here: [NPI POLL ](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=9e177f7a05&e=ebfb0fda52)

| | In just the last three months, Karrin has:
* Completed over 100 campaign stops across all 15 counties in Arizona, meeting voters in every corner of the state.
* Launched a $2 million media campaign highlighting her complete and total endorsement from President Donald J. Trump.
* Built a powerful grassroots coalition of conservatives, law enforcement, farmers, parents, and veterans.

The Noble Predictive Insights poll is the latest sign that Karrin’s message is breaking through with Republican primary voters. In polling, fundraising, and grassroots engagement, she is the undisputed frontrunner of this primary.

body:
Do you support this?!
| **PLEASE DON’T LOOK AWAY:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20250902_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21085%2E878179%2EUS0sF5) → Donald Trump wants REVENGE on mail-in voting after it handed him a HUGE DEFEAT in 2020.

→ His executive order is one of the worst attacks on voting rights in HISTORY.

→ **If we don’t show MASSIVE support for vote-by-mail, MILLIONS of Americans risk having their ballots _thrown in the TRASH!!!_** | [**So we need to hear from YOU:
DO YOU SUPPORT VOTE-BY-MAIL?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20250902_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21085%2E878179%2EUS0sF5) | [YES, WE MUST PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20250902_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21085%2E878179%2EUS0sF5)
---
[NO, I AGREE WITH TRUMP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20250902_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21085%2E878179%2EUS0sF5)
If we don’t receive 5,000 responses by midnight, our momentum to save vote-by-mail will be lost. **Please respond ASAP!**

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: 🚨 Trump’s illegal troop deployment ruled unconstitutional
body:
Donald Trump’s attempt to use the U.S. military as his own personal police force just hit a major roadblock. A federal judge ruled that Trump’s deployment of the National Guard in Los Angeles violated the Posse Comitatus Act — a law that prevents presidents from sending troops into our communities for political gain. This is a MAJOR victory, and we need to make it clear RIGHT AWAY that the American people stand behind this ruling and expect the administration to follow it. That’s why we’re asking you to go on record immediately. Do you support the court’s ruling that Trump’s National Guard deployment in Los Angeles was illegal? name: Dan Goldman
subject: After Dobbs, Trump’s Supreme Court is coming after marriage equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Ten years ago, the Supreme Court’s landmark decision in _Obergefell v. Hodges_ made marriage equality the law of the land, as it always should have been under a Constitution that guarantees equal protection under the law. _**Now, Trump’s hyper-partisan Supreme Court has been asked to overturn it.**_ That should set off alarm bells for _everyone_ who believes in equality, civil rights, and individual freedom. Republicans across the country are inciting hatred and unleashing deeply shameful attacks against the queer community, including innocent children. We cannot sit back and let these attacks roll back decades of progress. I am a proud supporter of the _Equality Act_ , which would protect LGBTQIA+ Americans from discrimination in housing, employment, education, and more. This legislation is long overdue. name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: Nancy Mace First to Support Trump
body:
Mace became one of Trump’s earliest hires, joining his campaign in South Carolina when few in the political establishment believed in him. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/nancy-mace-first-to-support-trump?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/nancy-mace-first-to-support-trump?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
| | **NANCY MACE HIGHLIGHTS DECADE OF LOYALTY TO PRESIDENT TRUMP** _The Only Candidate with a Proven Record of Support
for President Trump Since 2015_ While some candidates in the South Carolina Governor’s race are only now trying to attach themselves to President Donald J. Trump, the record is clear: Nancy Mace has been with President Trump from the very beginning. In 2015, **Mace became one of Trump’s earliest hires** , joining his campaign in South Carolina when few in the political establishment believed in his chances. She went on to serve the campaign in multiple states, helping build the foundation of the MAGA movement. “There is nobody else in this race who can go further back as a supporter of President Trump,” **said Nancy Mace.** “I didn’t wait until it was popular, I was with him from day one.”
**A Documented Record of Trump Loyalty**
---
| **Mace on Team Trump in 2015:** Mace worked for President Trump’s campaign during his first run, making her one of his earliest employees on his very first Presidential campaign.

**Endorsed by President Trump in 2020 and 2024:** President Trump’s endorsements helped Nancy Mace win decisive victories and strengthen the America First conservative movement in Congress. **Trump Team Joins Mace for Governor:** Austin McCubbin, former South Carolina State Director for Trump’s campaign, and other top Trump allies are now supporting Mace’s gubernatorial run.

**Trump Boosts Mace’s Governor Campaign:** This summer, President Trump shared internal polling showing Nancy Mace with a massive lead over Pamela Evette, underscoring his confidence in her candidacy.
---
| [Donate](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=54fec3cb07&e=ddc57b5ede "Donate")
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| [Donate](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=10bff8524f&e=ddc57b5ede "Donate")
---
| Pamela Evette claims to be a “Day One Trump supporter” — but that refers only to Trump’s third presidential campaign. **Nancy Mace** **was with Trump on Day One of his very first campaign in 2015.** “Nancy Mace was one of the first hires for President Trump’s 2015 campaign while the nice lady from Ohio was busy sipping cocktails at the country club trying to manage her husband’s alleged fraud problems,” **said spokesperson Sydney Long.** “She’s embarrassed President Trump posted our polling showing Nancy Mace with a massive lead. Next. ” **Nancy Mace** has backed President Trump across all three election cycles — 2016, 2020, and 2024. As Governor, she will continue to carry the America First torch in South Carolina by securing the border, defending parental rights, protecting law and order, and putting South Carolinians first.
---
| [Donate](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=4fe732e8af&e=ddc57b5ede "Donate")

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Gearing up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
folks,
We're gearing up to engage voters across the country ahead of elections this year. That means meeting voters where they are , from young voters to voters of color to disabled voters who need mail-in ballots to cast a ballot.
With essential elections up and down the ballot in 2025 and next year’s midterm elections fast approaching, our work to mobilize these voters is more important than ever. That’s why we’re making it a priority to help potential new voters make a lifelong habit of voting, return lapsed voters to the process, and make sure long-term voters can still participate.
This work doesn't happen overnight , and getting people in every corner of the nation excited to vote requires a lot of resources. We started months ahead of these elections to make a worthwhile investment to reach voters wherever they are — online, on college campuses, and more.
Our mission is simple: The more people who vote, the more our government looks like what we, the people, want it to be. But to reach these voters and get them involved, we need your help .
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us reach every voter we can ahead of their next election? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=090225_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=090225_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=090225_1&amount=35]
There's a lot we've started doing, but your support will give us the resources we need to keep it going from now, through the 2025 elections, and into next year's critical mid-terms.
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Turnout Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=090225_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=090225_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=oHenkdM5Vea3cO1%2FWZ4FHNL7UBaZtKDqSll2BIzsexXxWpz71KiH%2FO0DUcOlGud%2BDgI7kYbtx5sOl08zkGsUJvWTVySpbOynbwX%2BimnImZ6zM%2FEd9y4hyR340mZ9zxwy42EQb5W86eby25Tt6Wy6mTsU1yL5lieWjpg%2FIGJnUY0cXQwRYVQlo7NmLEAL%2FwKYvuoZhojt7fdMq6ckHcSLWfIYLPm3MdhB3JoWbtvm14grvhtAB5OWAcGn%2FY5ik5pGJ2dW0gEOy55UwQ2%2B4xda6JAGnrH%2BtKowaQl8XyJpjM8qGlrPNGnXw2RYAwW0dHkX4PSxfnCxLQmUdWgtWVNSS0cOayomMJlLtPcLkaQPxkAImq3xt5%2Fi1wL%2BHCquoTE9hOYXdPfUsNP4BAk85Fhg4IJ4%2BGyyKYR23HOK2OPPLp8%3D .

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: People > profits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
This is what I’m hearing from Arizonans. |
---
Trump’s Big Ugly Bill hands out massive tax breaks to his billionaire besties, and in a surprise to exactly no one, _this bill is already hurting Arizona families._ Our office has heard from hundreds of people: veterans, Medicaid recipients, and families who know how bad this policy is. Arizonans across the district are writing to our office to tell us about family members who are waiting on SNAP benefits to help make ends meet, veterans who rely on CHAMPVA funding to receive life-saving medication, and families who are _terrified_ that losing access to Medicaid could force them to have to pay out of pocket for essential care while the bills pile up. Every single Arizona Republican voted to rip away care from the most vulnerable among us. **These aren’t just numbers, Peter, they’re LIVES. ** In the last couple of months since Republicans passed their big ugly budget, I’ve been criss-crossing the state to spread the word and make sure Arizonans know which of their representatives voted for this disastrous law. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114482429/567163488/1289792659?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250902_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc1ZTEwOS0yODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWBnKhcaa5U391N5b4fv85-QF3t52qyTlIMTM51s0yU=) We need a House majority that will fight to make care more, not less, affordable. As the Democratic Freshman Class President, I’m supporting Democrats across the country so we can win back the House and get things done for working people. **[So please, pitch in right now to help us flip the House blue:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114482430/567163491/1289792659?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250902_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc1ZTEwOS0yODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWBnKhcaa5U391N5b4fv85-QF3t52qyTlIMTM51s0yU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114482431/567163492/1289792659?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250902_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc1ZTEwOS0yODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWBnKhcaa5U391N5b4fv85-QF3t52qyTlIMTM51s0yU=)

clean_body: This is what I’m hearing from Arizonans. | Trump’s Big Ugly Bill hands out massive tax breaks to his billionaire besties, and in a surprise to exactly no one, this bill is already hurting Arizona families. Our office has heard from hundreds of people: veterans, Medicaid recipients, and families who know how bad this policy is. Arizonans across the district are writing to our office to tell us about family members who are waiting on SNAP benefits to help make ends meet, veterans who rely on CHAMPVA funding to receive life-saving medication, and families who are terrified that losing access to Medicaid could force them to have to pay out of pocket for essential care while the bills pile up. Every single Arizona Republican voted to rip away care from the most vulnerable among us. These aren’t just numbers, Peter, they’re LIVES. In the last couple of months since Republicans passed their big ugly budget, I’ve been criss-crossing the state to spread the word and make sure Arizonans know which of their representatives voted for this disastrous law. = We need a House majority that will fight to make care more, not less, affordable. As the Democratic Freshman Class President, I’m supporting Democrats across the country so we can win back the House and get things done for working people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: Will you answer the call?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2074a788lcvttv05tmw2swka25xjz1tbgcw0u72g8u9kpzq1x764i7gus0t6retzftu5arwrgco52obb4pv&__stmp=t1z3gv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1z3gv&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol39h5cvq5prgslq24d2b8qtdt4b330ib9juih6ty7cwuupjxtadlt1qrjdejx7akqtqxxvp306af6elj3q6uut6msp8jzcqy4l082zjrv619z8xul1z9br60hsvhldeqljthhlhrvtx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1z3gv&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1z3gv&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1z3gv&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1z3gv&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol39h5cvq5prgslq24d2b8qtdt4b330ib9juih6ty7cwuupjxtadlt1qrjdejx7akqtqxxvp306af6elj3q6uut6msp8jzcqy4l082zjrv619z8xul1z9br60hsvhldeqljthhlhrvtx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1z3gv&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1z3gv&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Donald John Trump
subject: You were on my mind the other day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I wrote you this letter to show my deep appreciation for you!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
[FULL TRUMP MEMO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**Friend** **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)** **Top Patriot in your county**
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Dear Friend,
As I was flying aboard Air Force One the other day, I couldn’t help but reflect on the incredible journey we’ve taken together.
We’ve been through it all — rallies that shook the political establishment, victories the experts called impossible, witch hunts that tried to break us, and endless attacks from the radical left.
And in spite of every storm we’ve faced down, one truth has remained: YOU never left my side.
You’ve been there when the Fake News said we were finished. You stood strong when the Democrats thought they could divide us. You gave me strength when the weight of these battles was heaviest. And together, we showed the entire world that this movement cannot be stopped.
[Now, more than 200 days into this historic fight to save America once again, I want to hear directly from you. >](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I want to know what you think about our progress, our victories, and the road ahead. That’s why I’m asking you — personally — to take my 200 Days Survey.

**[TAKE SURVEY>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)** ****
Your voice has always been the heartbeat of this movement. When history is written about these times, it won’t just be about me flying on Air Force One or fighting in courtrooms — it will be about millions of patriots like YOU who refused to quit.
[So today, I’m asking you to make your voice heard again. Take the survey. Show the world that this movement is stronger than ever. >](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Together, we will finish this fight. Together, we will Make America Great Again.
Sincerely, Donald J. Trump 45th and 47th President of the United States of America
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

subject: It's Official: I have filed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_sept25?refcode=0902_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_sept25?refcode=0902_e]
Friend,
Today, I officially filed to run for Congress in Texas’ 18th Congressional District and I couldn’t be more excited to share this moment with you!
I’ve dedicated my life to serving this community. I’ve seen the strength, resilience, and potential of our district and I’m running to ensure that every person in TX-18 has the opportunity to thrive.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_sept25?refcode=0902_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_sept25?refcode=0902_e]
Too many members of our community are being left behind. I will fight for affordable healthcare, good-paying jobs, quality education, social security and a system that enables everyone to thrive!
I’m honored by the support we’ve already received, and I’m ready to get to work. But I can’t do this without you.
Chip in $20 to help us convert today’s milestone into a victory! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_sept25?refcode=0902_e&refcode2=f3d23974-2a88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413]
Onwards,
Amanda K. Edwards
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_sept25?refcode=0902_e]

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: We have to have our troops’ backs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Fighting for the high-quality, accessible care our troops deserve.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4954%2E35263%2Exedtq4)
Peter, Roughly 130,000 men and women in the National Guard and Reserve do not have health insurance. _This is unacceptable, and I am determined to change it._ That’s why I have introduced the _Healthcare for Our Troops Act_ , a vital piece of legislation that would finally provide the high-quality, accessible care our troops deserve. While Trump and his allies work to dismantle health care access for millions, we are fighting to expand it where it's needed most. **Our troops have our backs. It’s only right to have theirs with the health care they deserve — that’s what my new legislation stands for.** **[Please sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of my _Healthcare for Our Troops Act._ Every signature helps send a message that we won’t back down until our troops have the care they deserve. ](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/healthcare-national-guard?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250902_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4954%2E35263%2Exedtq4)** | | [SIGN ON](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/healthcare-national-guard?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250902_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4954%2E35263%2Exedtq4)
---

Tammy

body:

| [|

Candidate for Congress, TN-07

# [The Toll Comes Due: Trump, Epstein, and the GOP's Summer Cover-Up](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=172576980&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNTc2OTgwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTY4MzkwNzQsImV4cCI6MTc1OTQzMTA3NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cUk28IS0R2UWaJX_y4EGyugMpQWDuKUwdCEDtOUoRGI)
### Epstein's victims will be heard this week.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Sep 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=172576980&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNTc2OTgwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NjgzOTA3NCwiZXhwIjoxNzU5NDMxMDc0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KKonIzWpC49Jr7bHZvmj96mGPBMQzbccyCyWDekjahw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

It feels like a lifetime ago that Republicans shut down Congress to bury the Epstein controversy. Now they're back in session--and the cover-up is cracking wide open. The toll is coming due--for Donald Trump, for Speaker Johnson, and for every Republican who played along with this insane scheme.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/603f4a99-945d-4dfb-96e8-bf331e845aa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/603f4a99-945d-4dfb-96e8-bf331e845aa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
They've spent the last month flailing, trying to memory-hole the fact that they promised to release the full, unredacted Epstein files. Pam Bondi said they were on her desk. Kash Patel claimed he'd release them as soon as he became FBI director.
Then, over a sleepy summer holiday weekend, they tried to gaslight the entire country--pretending the files never existed and shutting down the investigation. They wanted us to forget.
We didn't.
Thanks to relentless pressure from influencers across the political spectrum--and Democratic leaders like Rep. Robert Garcia, who refused to let it slide--the public still remembers. And this week, Republicans are going to feel the heat when Reps. Ro Khanna and Thomas Massie give Epstein and Maxwell's victims a platform, a microphone, and a chance to be heard. For too long, their pain has been buried and denied beneath politics and power.
## The Timing Isn't an Accident
That's why today's timing matters.
Trump has a "major announcement" scheduled for this afternoon. Nobody knows exactly what it is, but here's what we do know:
* **Epstein 's victims are testifying this week.** Their stories will be raw, painful, and impossible to bury.
* **Over 2,000 Marines are deployed on U.S. Navy fleets off the coast of Venezuela.** That could give Trump cover to make some dramatic "defense" move.
* **It 's the start of September.** New economic data is dropping--likely showing higher prices, weaker job growth, and the worst conditions since his last term.

Stack all of that together, and the pattern is obvious: when the danger is close, Trump creates chaos to change the subject.
So when he walks out today, be prepared. Whatever headline he tries to grab, it's designed to distract from the truth closing in on him--from the Epstein cover-up to the collapsing economy.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/603f4a99-945d-4dfb-96e8-bf331e845aa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/603f4a99-945d-4dfb-96e8-bf331e845aa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## The Cover-Up and the Circus
With Congress back in session, the Oversight Committee already has access to some portion of the Epstein files--though we don't know how much or what's been blacked out. We do know Bondi and the FBI worked to identify Trump's name and likely redacted it. And we know Trump's spiraling over it.
That's the pattern: as soon as accountability gets close, the circus starts. Crime stunts. Military theater. Press conferences with no purpose but to dominate the news cycle.
And let's be clear: none of it helps ordinary Americans. Not one bit. It doesn't lower grocery bills. It doesn't ease rent or student debt. It doesn't make families safer. It just wastes taxpayer dollars, insults local law enforcement, and treats service members like political props.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/603f4a99-945d-4dfb-96e8-bf331e845aa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/603f4a99-945d-4dfb-96e8-bf331e845aa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Eyes on the Ball
We have to keep repeating it: Trump is a liar. He is morally bankrupt. He's manipulating tariffs and the federal government to enrich himself while working Americans suffer. He's ignoring the real issues, putting money in his own pocket, all while using the Department of Justice to go after his enemies and bury Epstein's crimes.
Why? Likely because he's in those files--or his allies are. Even RFK Jr. has admitted to flying on Epstein's plane twice.
Expect Trump to act out. Expect today's announcement to be another glorified distraction. Expect chaos. But don't get rattled.
Stay locked in.
Don't let Democrats run from these issues either. We don't have to fight on Trump's skewed terms--we can bring our own. Real immigration policy without cruelty. Real community safety without militarization. Real economic security for working families.
Trump's bill is coming due. Republicans delayed this showdown for a month--but now it's here.
Let's have it. Let's remind the public--especially the skeptics--that this entire operation exists for the benefit of one man: Donald Trump.
Not to fix our broken economy.
Not to help the victims.
Not for you.
For him.
The toll comes due right fucking now.
Use this moment. Stay loud. Show people who he really is, what he's doing to this country, and why he cannot be trusted with power.
With urgency,
--Mike.

body:
Here are three reasons why you should make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia.
#
Peter, if you've been waiting to make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia, now's the moment. Here are three reasons why:
✅ Our race is the biggest election since Trump returned to power.
✅ Republicans have spent over $1 million on TV and digital ads so far.
✅ And if we win big here, it will give a big boost to Democrats heading into 2026.
Here in Virginia, there is no limit to how much individuals can donate to candidates for office. For that reason, our opponent has been raking in money from far-right megadonors.
_Our average online donation is around $30, but what's more important is the number of people who pitch in._
**[If you're with us, don't wait another day!
