This is the situation I’m caught in:
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5e2e56305d224379b34aa5e257df2f95&_e=psOR5XWW4vId7gcWM1BENGJ933elLFqz_ZQQjT-2qoC0EXLT1DNSJKBnp8Jn3CKEAqnw6y16j5ptpPsqtuS8-vCL84Q--MTOBJlPkwT53c2o8Tr5SPlUYhDF7k9p9NwLKPdbLOMKpGkst2h42Ls4AWt-C3eWjlmGwlAjZQd_Cg3V8qpndHzgGKe63ifO6qJZkKKMlYCCgMAIxattphBtsALgpvzD7pXdkfEyIAwXkMa_fAXBkgwLXmaMAGF1eso39-TRVch31KjIqFAfRyFnA9oyKlWP17qIzI0xOYj-oFTqbWWaAmZHwi5Vbg_8ip2jceo3mGPL44ZDwVtOwtVZhMIUPe-pelf79Iw8oGKZ8C1wZciudSRpMNSrqB4QcztU_9-P8gM4NyVeplR89Se9gBzVJyr8vQ7WBjJFK31rBJjSEmn69DgLwWMvU9QgRgGJOiYowRbNY-FwzcLu6nx5LwH9Y7YJWxqK4_k4cvCpOc4802wtUNEnuMYHCe0j2rmIBZFW33PG5wXGTaVlqsCUEMlMtR56yPB8VXIDsZqwzoLXmukmnalzY3lgq9xm8vlvDU9xqRVTJU7esuFcvpJDNatGTep69C0O8GbylgYxGw0bybhtbBHkCiZ4rRjCv3DZIV7_6vCIEyAIkUd5-18CiQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.

The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. name: Wesley Bell
subject: All I have to say is: Thank you.

body:
As we close out August, I want to take a moment to say thank you, Peter.

Because of your support, we’ve not only managed to hit our crucial end-of-month fundraising goal, but surpassed it.

Every dollar we raise, especially in off-years, helps us fund this grassroots campaign as we look ahead to 2026. From running digital ads and hiring staff to opening campaign offices and buying yard signs, every dollar counts.

Now, as we head into September, I’m asking you to continue to help me build on our momentum. If we can get an early start on this month’s fundraising goals, we’ll be ready for whatever challenges come our way.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Our first ad is on the air. Please watch.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Right now, all across California people are learning about Trump's attacks on our democracy and efforts to rig the next election before a single vote is cast.

Folks,
Thanks to the support from almost 400,000 individual donors -- our campaign to pass the Election Rigging Response Act is **ON THE AIR!**
Right now, all across California people are learning about Trump's attacks on our democracy and efforts to rig the next election.
**[Here's one of the ads we're running right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em-ad?refcode=em250829&noskip=true&refcode2=2512_4767699_dOYMX7&akid=2512%2E4767699%2EdOYMX7)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em-ad?refcode=em250829&noskip=true&refcode2=2512_4767699_dOYMX7&akid=2512%2E4767699%2EdOYMX7)
Like we said, it was a difficult decision to go up on the air this early, but given the fact our opponents have already started spending we had no choice.
We're going to be counting on folks like you who understand the stakes of this election to make sure we can stay on the air through the end.
The first votes will be cast in just about a month. Let's go out and win this.
Team Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
I have heard the calls do "Do something!" and I agree. If Texas wants to redraw their maps, California will fight fire with fire.
God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
[**Please make a contribution to help us get it done. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. I need to know you're with me as we press forward.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em-ad?refcode=em250829&refcode2=2512_4767699_dOYMX7&akid=2512%2E4767699%2EdOYMX7)

body:
**This team is truly incredible.**

Because of you, we reached our August fundraising goal, and now, we’re ready to step into even more critical, high-stakes races across the country.

Look, what gives me hope isn’t just that we reached our August fundraising goal — _it’s knowing that folks like you believe in this work and are willing to stand shoulder to shoulder to get it done._

But Peter, September is here, and we’re one step closer to the November elections. If we can get a head start now, we’ll be in the best position to support good candidates and good people at every level, _nationwide._

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Recently, Trump called for me to be prosecuted
body:
Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75b4f2f6-617e-45d4-bf07-5f24211aba15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | Peter — this is Adam Schiff. Blue Amp Action said I could reach out with this urgent message: Donald Trump recently went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted. Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d64203e-7def-4ae1-898c-9c61e5be806c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot. I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem. [Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: rush a split donation between me and Blue Amp Action to help us fight back and keep holding Trump accountable.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9ac8e54d-994b-4059-99ff-055d2d738ac1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

---
| | [DONATE $25 NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10ffa8c8-2a88-4382-9513-db27c82231d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33373f25-ba8f-4482-a1a2-2eb333bf3009/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat. But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job – not now, not ever. Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth. He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will. [Please, rush a split donation to help me and Blue Amp Action fight back today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta48827b1-dded-4ede-aefc-8a230608af17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator. Thank you for standing with me, Adam
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do!

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: The Left is coming for me… again.
body:
Democrats are begging for cash to defeat me. AGAIN. |

body:
Wrapping up August, Getting to all corners of NEPA, and heading back to Washington D.C.!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1fe06b7569d5/robs-nepa-rundown-12773407?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| | Good Morning and Happy September,
The August district work period just wrapped up and Rob is heading back to DC to continue delivering for the good people of PA’s 8th Congressional District. All August, Rob went to every corner of the district to meet with constituents, small business owners, elected officials, and many more to hear directly from them about what is affecting them and what they need out of this Congress. As he heads back to Washington, every vote he takes will be made in mind with making sure it’s good for NEPA.
Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | Whether it was Honesdale, Wayne County, or Hazleton, Luzerne County, Rob was everywhere throughout the month of August! Below is a photo with Hunter from Hillstead Farm in Wayne County. I am proud to support small family agribusinesses like his!
---
|
---
|
---
| | Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti announced today that she is launching her campaign for Congress against Rob while she campaigns for another term as Mayor. Portland Paige is a political climber and far-left extremist who has backed open borders, defuding the police, and even supports taxpayer-funded sex change operations for illegal immigrants. We must stop her and her radical agenda. **Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**
---

**To:** Texas Democrats
**From:** A grateful Democrat
**Subject:** THANK YOU! Dear Texas Democrats,

**THANK YOU for standing strong and fighting back against Trump’s plot to RIG the 2026 elections in his favor!**

Your brave decision to jeopardize the GOP’s redistricting process was an incredible act for our democracy.

**I know Trump and Texas Republicans want to EXPEL and even ARREST you for daring to speak out against their cheating.**

Right now, it’s crucial that ALL of us Democrats stand together, especially now that the new maps have passed. I want you to know I have your back and am on the right side of history!

[**So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you for your resilience, help Democrats FLIP the House, and stop Trump from attacking our democracy EVER AGAIN! >>**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93553?t=9&akid=21086%2E878179%2EzwaldM) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93553?t=10&akid=21086%2E878179%2EzwaldM)

**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21086%2E878179%2EzwaldM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21086%2E878179%2EzwaldM).**

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: Workers across Pennsylvania are fighting, and workers are winning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | Peter, **Yesterday was Labor Day, a day when we celebrate working people and honor their contributions to making our country a better place.** We know that sometimes wins can feel impossible, and the news coming out of D.C. has been overwhelming. So we wanted to highlight a couple of massive wins for workers that happened in Pennsylvania last week. **In Pittsburgh,** over 1,000 nurses at UPMC Magee Medical Center voted to unionize with SEIU Healthcare Pennsylvania. It’s the largest nurse union election in recent Pennsylvania history. **And in Philadelphia,** workers with the Pennsylvania Federation of Teachers agreed to a new contract that provides 3% raises, guaranteed parental leave, and an easier path to increase future pay. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCaeKdHoPC8FI1Yx2tHv6EnpRCtlDdGbJQHxClO3WfCpNrugpNaAMro5BNu7frOZbh618TMQCvPNQsDiRNDdCdLCxeSd8ZWGnMIbsL2qBdJrgT0NV57FDiFNUyArKnhszdiGiPs9j8Jxm15XrkRbZBOFB09J5mfYltaeu6QPQxO-zzB3a32hhsFfLQTpoQC-rzFqB0Ft6QICDeMxiAlsxoLgtYOo2sW_0gJ7MWkZ1rqe-TCBFeMWOH-AZnHCpdY4d5zMczsbzG4xDdNxlm_nHc75JhbMig8qYUtiydfWqa3N6INI-r_NovF7iyOJ2xuS2rEZFNCvuC3dplt50peTIyWKoGBTcJtf2nZmWgRkOJWFshXpboZu0mSi0YOdheRDaR2vTuB-AX9LsBHycEXGKnyzEW3rz2WwF08OTLKN7bDls/4jk/j2PanD5PSFqziXFczFW1yw/h0/h001.wh1eko9yiIPjjcgerNsqqtaF1eBMkVP4uKaaP6SQylI)Together, these victories prove what organizing can achieve: **better pay, stronger benefits, and fairer conditions for working people across our state.** They also remind us of a larger truth, Peter: this country was built _by_ the working class, and it's on us to rebuild it _for_ the working class. But while workers are organizing, the billionaire class is working overtime to strip away their rights. Not every fight ends in victory, but when workers win, it proves that organizing works — **and that's how we keep building the movement behind Labor Day, every day.** **[If you can, chip in today to help us keep this momentum going. Every contribution strengthens our ability to support workers, defend their rights, and ensure that victories like these continue across name: Rob Bonta
subject: A decision in our National Guard trial
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250902&t=1001&akid=1933%2E1088799%2E1Siitx ]Rob Bonta

We secured a major victory.

Today the court handed down a major victory in our case against Donald
Trump and Pete Hegseth’s unlawful deployment of 4,000 federalized National
Guard troops and 700 Marines for civilian law enforcement in California.

Bottom line: Military troops cannot police our communities.

The court affirmed that Trump's use of troops for law enforcement was a
violation of the law, and a blatant disregard of the Posse Comitatus Act —
a bedrock of our democracy that dates all the way back to when the King of
England used his military to police the American colonies.

Donald Trump is not King. We are a nation of laws — and no one is above
them. Not even the president.

Trump’s power is not boundless. But as long as he keeps testing the
limits, I’ll need your help to keep fighting back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250902?refcode=em20250902-1933&refcode2=1933_1088799_1Siitx&akid=1933%2E1088799%2E1Siitx ]Will you chip in right now to power our fight to hold Trump accountable
to the law?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250902?refcode=em20250902-1933&amount=5&refcode2=1933_1088799_1Siitx&akid=1933%2E1088799%2E1Siitx ]Donate $5 »

Let’s be clear: Trump’s brazen violation of the law here
wasn’t about public safety. If it were, he wouldn’t pull Guard members
from fighting wildfires or stopping fentanyl. He wouldn’t disrespect our
troops by treating patriots like pawns in his political games.

These actions were nothing more than political theater and public
intimidation to serve Trump’s own power and his anti-immigrant agenda.

That’s why today’s ruling matters so much. This extreme administration is
hell-bent on trampling our rights and freedoms — but I will hold them
accountable, no matter how many battles it takes.

I sincerely hope this decision makes Trump think twice about his threats
to deploy troops to Oakland, Chicago, and New York — but if it doesn’t, I
can promise you this: we will take him right back to court.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250902?refcode=em20250902-1933&refcode2=1933_1088799_1Siitx&akid=1933%2E1088799%2E1Siitx ]The work to counter Trump’s extreme overreach is far from over, and I
need your help to keep pushing for justice. Will you chip in right now to
stand with me?

Thank you so much for being in this fight.

More to come,
Rob

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250902?refcode=em20250902-1933&refcode2=1933_1088799_1Siitx&akid=1933%2E1088799%2E1Siitx ][IMG]

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

clean_body: [ ]Rob Bonta We secured a major victory. Today the court handed down a major victory in our case against Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth’s unlawful deployment of 4,000 federalized National Guard troops and 700 Marines for civilian law enforcement in California. Bottom line: Military troops cannot police our communities. The court affirmed that Trump's use of troops for law enforcement was a violation of the law, and a blatant disregard of the Posse Comitatus Act — a bedrock of our democracy that dates all the way back to when the King of England used his military to police the American colonies. Donald Trump is not King. We are a nation of laws — and no one is above them. Not even the president. Trump’s power is not boundless. But as long as he keeps testing the limits, I’ll need your help to keep fighting back. [ ]Will you chip in right now to power our fight to hold Trump accountable to the law? [ ]Donate $5 » Let’s be clear: Trump’s brazen violation of the law here wasn’t about public safety. If it were, he wouldn’t pull Guard members from fighting wildfires or stopping fentanyl. He wouldn’t disrespect our troops by treating patriots like pawns in his political games. These actions were nothing more than political theater and public intimidation to serve Trump’s own power and his anti-immigrant agenda. That’s why today’s ruling matters so much. This extreme administration is hell-bent on trampling our rights and freedoms — but I will hold them accountable, no matter how many battles it takes. I sincerely hope this decision makes Trump think twice about his threats to deploy troops to Oakland, Chicago, and New York — but if it doesn’t, I can promise you this: we will take him right back to court. [ ]The work to counter Trump’s extreme overreach is far from over, and I need your help to keep pushing for justice. Will you chip in right now to stand with me? Thank you so much for being in this fight. More to come, Rob [ ][IMG] Rob Bonta Attorney General of California

Hi there, it's LBR HQ. We have a few harrowing numbers we want to get your eyes on: **66¢**
That's how much a Black woman is paid for every dollar a white man earns on average. **33%**
That's how much Black women running for office on average raise compared to their white counterparts. **5**
That's how many Black women have _ever_ served in the Senate. Until this year, when Lisa and Angela Alsobrooks in Maryland were sworn in, the Senate had _never_ had two Black women serving at the same time. body:
I’m so sorry, I think you missed this?
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
You took home the top prize, but you didn’t even accept it?
Friend – there must have been a miscommunication here.
**_[I’m reupping this one last time just in case you missed it.>>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[TRUMP AWARD](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
|
---
|
---
Friend,
Congratulations!
You just won the Gold Medal in Trump World.

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Honoring you with the Golden Trump Award is my way of saying THANK YOU for your unwavering support!
**JD Vance received it.** **Top Trump Cabinet members received it.** **Now it’s YOUR TURN.** ****
Only **1% of supporters** will EVER be chosen. That’s why I’m sending you a **LIMITED-EDITION TRUMP FLAG PIN** to mark this historic moment — but only if you accept your award **_BEFORE MIDNIGHT._**

[ACCEPT AWARD NOW ](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
WE’RE SHIPPING YOU THIS GOLDEN TRUMP BADGE AS PROOF YOU MADE THE CUT!
**_[I hope you don’t let this once-in-a-lifetime honor slip away.>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[CLAIM GOLDEN TRUMP AWARD](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Friend, once again, thank you so much for your support, and congratulations!
Donald J. Trump
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[GOLDEN TRUMP AWARD](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Why I’m supporting Chris Pappas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I’ve had the privilege of serving alongside Chris Pappas for years.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250902_1_hassan?refcode=em20250902-2161&amount=5&refcode2=2161_582294_CH6Nnq&akid=2161%2E582294%2ECH6Nnq)
Senator Maggie Hassan here.
I’ve had the privilege of serving alongside Chris Pappas for years. I know firsthand how deeply he cares about New Hampshire — and how hard he works to make government work for the people it serves.
Chris has fought to lower the cost of prescription drugs, expand access to health care for our veterans, and protect reproductive freedom. He has never lost sight of our Granite State values: listening, working hard, and putting people before politics.
**That’s why I’m so proud to support Chris for the United States Senate.**
Let’s be clear: Republicans see New Hampshire as one of their best chances to flip a Democratic seat. If they succeed, our path to taking back the Senate majority becomes almost impossible. We cannot let that happen.
Chris has beaten the odds before — _in one of the toughest congressional districts in the country_ — but this will be his toughest race yet.
He’s up against Scott Brown and a flood of outside money. The only way Chris wins is if we stand together and fuel this campaign with grassroots support.
[**So I’m asking: Will you chip in $5 today to help Chris Pappas win this race and keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250902_1_hassan?refcode=em20250902-2161&amount=5&refcode2=2161_582294_CH6Nnq&akid=2161%2E582294%2ECH6Nnq)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250902_1_hassan?amount=5&refcode=em20250902-2161&refcode2=2161_582294_CH6Nnq&akid=2161%2E582294%2ECH6Nnq)**
I know Chris. I trust Chris. And I couldn’t be prouder to support him in this fight for our future.
Thank you,
Maggie Hassan
U.S. Senator for New Hampshire
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250902-1?t=1&refcode2=2161_582294_CH6Nnq&akid=2161%2E582294%2ECH6Nnq)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2161%2E582294%2ECH6Nnq)

clean_body: I’ve had the privilege of serving alongside Chris Pappas for years. Senator Maggie Hassan here. I’ve had the privilege of serving alongside Chris Pappas for years. I know firsthand how deeply he cares about New Hampshire — and how hard he works to make government work for the people it serves. Chris has fought to lower the cost of prescription drugs, expand access to health care for our veterans, and protect reproductive freedom. He has never lost sight of our Granite State values: listening, working hard, and putting people before politics. That’s why I’m so proud to support Chris for the United States Senate. Let’s be clear: Republicans see New Hampshire as one of their best chances to flip a Democratic seat. If they succeed, our path to taking back the Senate majority becomes almost impossible. We cannot let that happen. Chris has beaten the odds before — in one of the toughest congressional districts in the country — but this will be his toughest race yet. He’s up against Scott Brown and a flood of outside money. The only way Chris wins is if we stand together and fuel this campaign with grassroots support. I know Chris. I trust Chris. And I couldn’t be prouder to support him in this fight for our future. Thank you, Maggie Hassan U.S. Senator for New Hampshire New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114488069/567182545/961986198?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_090225_WAPO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDYyODk5My0zYjg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_LV0DVz5svV2Ab2jzjGpIM7_13HFb3FQkt52-elgPdM=) If you spend time in southern New Mexico, one thing is immediately clear: **immigrants make our communities stronger.** They’re our neighbors, our coworkers, our small business owners. They’re helping this region thrive — and they’ve been doing it for generations. But here’s the problem: Washington has allowed our immigration system to become a mess. And the way this administration is handling the border? _It’s not working._ It’s built on chaos — not solutions. And it’s failing the very communities that understand the border best. We need to fix what’s broken — **but we need to do it the right way.**
* It means listening to the people who actually live and work in border communities.
* It means securing our ports of entry with technology that can stop fentanyl before it hits our streets.
* It means delivering real resources for cities and towns doing their best to support migrants and keep people safe.

I'm pushing Congress to step up. I helped lead a new framework to move us toward bipartisan, realistic immigration reform — because voters have lost faith that either party can get this right. And honestly? **I don’t blame them.** But I still believe we can restore trust — by leading with common sense. Not political theater. We’re heading into our end-of-quarter fundraising push with **strong momentum** , and I’m proud of the campaign we’re building. But with recent reports indicating that Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate will enter this race at any second, we need to be prepared for whatever comes next. [Will you chip in $10 today? Your support helps us stay ahead — and keep fighting for solutions that actually reflect the values of southern New Mexico.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114488072/567182548/961986198?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_090225_WAPO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDYyODk5My0zYjg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_LV0DVz5svV2Ab2jzjGpIM7_13HFb3FQkt52-elgPdM=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = If you spend time in southern New Mexico, one thing is immediately clear: immigrants make our communities stronger. They’re our neighbors, our coworkers, our small business owners. They’re helping this region thrive — and they’ve been doing it for generations. But here’s the problem: Washington has allowed our immigration system to become a mess. And the way this administration is handling the border? It’s not working. It’s built on chaos — not solutions. And it’s failing the very communities that understand the border best. We need to fix what’s broken — but we need to do it the right way. It means listening to the people who actually live and work in border communities. It means securing our ports of entry with technology that can stop fentanyl before it hits our streets. It means delivering real resources for cities and towns doing their best to support migrants and keep people safe. I'm pushing Congress to step up. I helped lead a new framework to move us toward bipartisan, realistic immigration reform — because voters have lost faith that either party can get this right. And honestly? I don’t blame them. But I still believe we can restore trust — by leading with common sense. Not political theater. We’re heading into our end-of-quarter fundraising push with strong momentum , and I’m proud of the campaign we’re building. But with recent reports indicating that Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate will enter this race at any second, we need to be prepared for whatever comes next. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. **** Medicare and Medicaid were signed into law as part of the War on Poverty—promising that aging, illness, or low income would never stand between Americans and care. Fast forward sixty years and Trump’s administrator of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid, Dr. Oz says “It’s your patriotic duty to take care of yourself. Healthy people don’t consume healthcare resources.” That’s dangerous cruelty dressed up as policy, and it signals more cuts to Medicare and Medicaid as well as betrays a program 83 percent of all Americans support. Needless to say, our leaders have lost the plot, and they are steering our nation down a cold and reckless path. The recently passed Big Brutal Budget gives huge tax breaks to the rich, paid for by ripping $1 trillion from Medicaid, Medicare, and the ACA—the largest health care cuts in U.S. history—and triggers another $490 billion cut to Medicare. The human cost is staggering - coverage stripped from more than 15 million people, hundreds of rural hospitals shuttered, 51,000 preventable deaths every year, and 1.2 million jobs lost in just a few years. On the 60th anniversary of these life-saving programs, let’s fight back. ** Thanks for your support. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114488523/567184072/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU4YzRiNS0zYzg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbHv-TUhtzSP-K28tBxiebJ4BvGrsEt6vfKxxj4FG7A=)

Peter, did you see the news?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114488524/567184073/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250902_joni_fnd_gq_act___IUTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250902_joni_fnd_gq_act___IUTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5e58c4b5-3c88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU4YzRiNS0zYzg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbHv-TUhtzSP-K28tBxiebJ4BvGrsEt6vfKxxj4FG7A=)
We won’t lie, this news has us thrilled. Not because it means Christina is going to run for Senate (trust us, the fight to kick Mariannette Miller-Meeks to the curb is too important to give up), but because this is proof that Iowa is changing.

For years, out-of-touch politicians like Joni Ernst and Mariannette Miller-Meeks have turned their backs on Iowans. Remember when Ernst told people terrified of losing their healthcare that _“we all are going to die”_? Or when she tried to walk it back with a half-hearted, sarcastic “apology” from a _graveyard_? Don’t think Mariannette Miller-Meeks is any better – instead of answering to her constituents about her Medicaid vote at the Iowa State Fair, she offered them a boiled egg on a stick.

**[We told you something is brewing in Iowa, and this is proof. Republican leaders are running scared because they know their representation of the people of Iowa has been abysmal. We’re gaining ground, but momentum only matters if we keep building on it. Make a contribution today to help Christina defeat Miller-Meeks and prove Democrats can win big in Iowa.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114488525/567184074/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250902_joni_fnd_gq_act___IUTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250902_joni_fnd_gq_act___IUTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5e58c4b5-3c88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU4YzRiNS0zYzg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbHv-TUhtzSP-K28tBxiebJ4BvGrsEt6vfKxxj4FG7A=)**

In January, Democrats flipped a critical Iowa state Senate seat right here in our congressional district. Three months later, Democrats won a seat in the state House. In March, a Democrat in southeast Iowa – again, right in our backyard! – narrowly lost a state House district that Republicans won by more than 25 points last November. And just last week, Democrats picked up ANOTHER state Senate seat in a special election, destroying the Iowa Republicans’ supermajority!

As we look ahead to our own race, our enthusiasm is growing. Christina lost the race for IA-01 in 2024 by just 799 votes. Every top election group is calling this race a “Toss-Up,” and the latest PPP Poll has Christina ahead by 4 points. With the current trends in Iowa, we know Mariannette Miller-Meeks is shaking in her boots.

Joni Ernst stepping aside tells us Iowa Republicans know they’re vulnerable. But the only way to turn that vulnerability into a win in IA-01 is by getting Christina’s vision for our district in front of every voter in this district. That means reaching folks in small towns and rural communities, on doorsteps and at kitchen tables, so they know Christina is ready to fight for them.

**[Are you with us? Chip in $10 today to help Christina finish the job and unseat Mariannette Miller-Meeks>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114488526/567184075/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250902_joni_fnd_gq_act___IUTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250902_joni_fnd_gq_act___IUTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5e58c4b5-3c88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU4YzRiNS0zYzg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbHv-TUhtzSP-K28tBxiebJ4BvGrsEt6vfKxxj4FG7A=)**

subject: We're waiting on you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
The Left won’t like your answer...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Trump Poised to Remove Noncitizens from Census🚨**BREAKING NEWS:** President Trump is again leading the charge to protect the integrity of our democracy – **this time by ensuring that only U.S. citizens are counted in the official U.S. Census.**
Peter, for far too long, blue states have inflated their political power by counting illegal immigrants in their census totals, gaining extra congressional seats and electoral votes as a result.
_That ends now._
This bold move strikes at the heart of the Democrats’ scheme to manipulate our system and tip the scales in their favor.
This is about restoring fairness, upholding the rule of law, and ensuring that American citizens, **not illegal aliens** , determine our political future.
But make no mistake: the Left is desperate to block this effort, because without inflated census numbers, they’ll lose their power. That’s why we need every Patriot to step up now. **
****[Sign our Official Petition to Remove Illegal Aliens from the U.S. Census:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**[ SIGN THE PETITION
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Don’t let them rig the system any longer. Demand a fair, lawful count now.**_Stand with President Trump and defend the integrity of our elections and the U.S. Census._**
Thank you, Peter,
Conservative News Alerts (via Team Downing)| |

clean_body: This email is a list of facts about Roy Cooper. | | 1️⃣ Roy might be the world’s #1 biggest fan of Diet Sun Drop. (No, this is not a paid promotion.) 2️⃣ All of Roy’s education came from right here in North Carolina public schools. 3️⃣ Roy would walk over broken glass to watch the Carolina Hurricanes win another Stanley Cup or protect North Carolina’s Medicaid Expansion. 4️⃣ As Governor, Roy stood up to extremist Republicans over and over — fighting to protect our communities and for North Carolinians’ rights to abortion care and the ballot box. 5️⃣ Roy’s electoral record?Undefeated. = = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. name: James Carville

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Hey folks – it’s James Carville.
I’ve seen a lot of campaigns in my day, but the Attorney General’s race in Virginia is shaping up to be HOT.
Why? Because Donald Trump’s loyal foot soldier, Jason Miyares, is running for reelection. And MAGA billionaire donors are already pouring MILLIONS into his campaign. They know that with Miyares in office, they have a devoted Trump ally to carry out his agenda.
That’s why Democrats need Jay Jones to win this race – there’s no question about it. Jay is committed to protecting abortion rights, standing up for small businesses, and keeping Virginia out of Trump’s circus.
I’m not one to sugarcoat things, so here’s the truth: If Democrats elect Jay Jones in this battleground race, it’ll TERRIFY Republicans.
And they know it, too! It’s why their gaggle of billionaires and corrupt special interests are dumping millions into this race, to the point that they’re now outraising Jay Jones by an 8-to-1 margin.
Here’s what has me fired up – Jason Miyares only won his last race by 0.81% (less than a POINT), and recent polling has shown that this will come down to the margin of error. That means every single dollar, every single grassroots donation, could decide the outcome.
Jay Jones doesn’t need Trump’s billionaires because he has something way better: grassroots supporters like you. That’s why EVERY Democrat needs to step up in this moment and chip in what they can – whether it’s $25, $50, hell even $100 if you’ve got it – to help Jay Jones fight back and win this race. name: Madeleine Foote, LCV
subject: ACT NOW: House Republicans about to give polluters a free pass to destroy our clean water
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI4ODc1MjIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjMwMDAyOTczMQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
TAKE ACTION: Our right to safe, clean water is on the line. Tell Congress to say NO to the PERMIT Act

House Republicans are pushing the most anti-clean water bill yet that would
eliminate Clean Water Act safeguards and cement Trump’s pro-polluter,
anti-environment priorities into law.

Tell Congress to vote NO on H.R. 3898, known as the PERMIT Act, to ensure everyone has access to clean and safe water >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/gryxf4k_ TAKE ACTION NOW >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6fE- Peter — Clean water is a human right, but too many communities still
don’t have safe water to keep their families healthy. Instead of working to ensure everyone has access to clean water, House
Republicans are trying to shield polluters from transparency and oversight,
rubber stamp their dirty pipelines, and jeopardize our drinking water, all in
the name of higher polluter profits. HR 3898, the “PERMIT Act,” is a dangerous bill that would gut the Clean Water
Act, giving polluters a free pass to dump into our critical waters and destroy
our wetlands, threatening our health and the environment. When Congress returns next week, Republicans plan to push through the PERMIT Act
to help boost the profits of their polluter allies. We need to stop this bill in
its tracks. Contact your representative TODAY to insist that they vote NO on the PERMIT Act >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_ Here are just some specifics of what the dangerous PERMIT Act will do if
passed: It would allow polluters to dump toxic “forever chemicals,” aka PFAS, into waterways without telling regulators or the public.It would fast-track projects that destroy wetlands and worsen flooding.It would strip states and Tribal Nations of their power to protect their own water resources.It would exclude millions of miles of streams and millions of acres of wetlands from federal protections. TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT-w0q_ If the PERMIT Act is signed into law, it will decimate over 50 years of clean
water protections. It would greenlight more toxic discharges of pollutants like “forever chemicals”
into rivers and lakes, weaken safeguards against oil and gas pipelines, and
prioritize costs to polluters instead of using science to set safety standards
to protect our health. The result? More pollution, more flooding, more threats to the water our kids
and grandkids rely on for drinking, swimming, and fishing. Urge Congress to reject the PERMIT Act and demand that they prioritize protecting the health and safety of our waters now >> https://links.messages.lcv. Thanks for speaking up, Peter. Madeleine Foote
Healthy Communities Program Director

League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12887522&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMwMDAyOTczMQS2&spReportId=MjMwMDAyOTczMQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12887522&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMwMDAyOTczMQS2&spReportId=MjMwMDAyOTczMQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

name: Anabel, United We Dream
subject: How to be an ally:
body:
Our fight for immigrant justice and dignity has always been powered by the people and our collective action. | | | Peter — Undocumented immigrants across the country should be able to wake up without wondering if they'll be kidnapped or if this will be their last day here. DACA recipients should be able to live a fulfilled life without fear, and continue growing in the country they’ve known all their lives. For many of us, safely getting to work, running to get groceries, or enjoying a day at the park is not something that we have to worry about. **To be an ally to the immigrant community, it’s**** _crucial_****to show up in the ways the people around you need it most. Right now,****_the immigrant community needs you._** Whether you put in the work to understand the struggle, have 1:1 conversations with family and friends, or support United We Dream’s work directly, _there’s space for all of us in this movement._ **Right now, we’re facing a moment meant to break us. But our fight for immigrant justice and dignity has always been powered by the people and our collective action.** **** **** [**Please chip in to help us continue to build our resources for immigrants and allies alike and show we can stay united in this fight.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-Ttol4EgKWXzNAxCFyPJb76LPWMeqkeUiNkPxAqOCVKrjCRWZxy1ZUkx8120Hn4BQr2Esjv8acnnbkMLlQwTFozxLIcKFRrBxxCYWX0Yv-VfUpbL9ruWL_tFRQzNJiMvSESoDxLotPRYt2gsIooRE0o6yb-TXteXrReEm90BNT4oORIWg4loyAemwoNp_rjbbIFM7SdKWEh1su3hm6IfGDkUhuemeZxyhmZiSldN6XlnVgzspXVrbGCmbgFlcbMkN8nK768Q0sbgjUodBcEZfvrtLEmozzuraoju6nB3hhDGWbNPzE7sDDTXSIcB6c21ZXMWmojJ-mWbGntdjzxKP9_35i9ITu9iMGD49qdmUjsRAQ/4jk/YcX4qmv-Roq5YsvQYtxVcA/h0/h001.FDZvhd0-M09eNkxoaB__YK2XVbpOBsv6v20QSFpJjFU) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-Ttol4EgKWXzNAxCFyPJb76LPWMeqkeUiNkPxAqOCVKrjCamqlFXtVA0HltVXZBaoJPTQLUIkcyYtJc7NcMjjqdqYmmJC0kJB_MaHVPoAe82EvJZMxJQCQSb4_a9c05mcQ7D1tQ02BWfUxGP1g5r10bIQOFrKoVePernAH57t2n-M6M2Ynb5vqT137c2aWr4p9aaI8c15gyaOMs3om8Q-T0sqlzHuZ8koU1uW4QyjYvFQmJRmWwLPA1Utn0ALcOqy8bWuMSJJGZ5H9ansrMK_YzikxanuBhVw2y_OzID_UQZL8Aet_X-7oVe2I8b3xOhcdOudBY-8PZ_1igTdAhr2NF66WFyZ2239NH118y_F3dXlCrZOsEN1eD37jY-4z97aNbg/4jk/YcX4qmv-Roq5YsvQYtxVcA/h1/h001.grTxsme5UTnJgCs4IaD0qqBQ2fIAszmrc9BTHLhfk7Y)

Thank you for being there.
— Anabel, United We Dream

clean_body: Our fight for immigrant justice and dignity has always been powered by the people and our collective action. | | | Peter — Undocumented immigrants across the country should be able to wake up without wondering if they'll be kidnapped or if this will be their last day here. DACA recipients should be able to live a fulfilled life without fear, and continue growing in the country they’ve known all their lives. For many of us, safely getting to work, running to get groceries, or enjoying a day at the park is not something that we have to worry about. To be an ally to the immigrant community, it’s crucialto show up in the ways the people around you need it most. Right now,the immigrant community needs you. Whether you put in the work to understand the struggle, have 1:1 conversations with family and friends, or support United We Dream’s work directly, there’s space for all of us in this movement. Right now, we’re facing a moment meant to break us. But our fight for immigrant justice and dignity has always been powered by the people and our collective action. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** We cannot fall into despair. Instead, we must use this moment to build community power through organizing and powerful conversations. If there’s ever a time to join this fight, it’s now. Thank you for being there. — Anabel, United We Dream | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Team Abdul
subject: We should be supporting kids from Pre-K to college
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250902-848&t=1001&akid=849%2E251025%2EI5qCAO ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250902-848&t=1002&akid=849%2E251025%2EI5qCAO ]Abdul for US Senate

Hi Peter,

Back-to-school season is in full swing, and today, we’re thinking about
how education can be made better for the next generation of leaders.

Just like with healthcare access, your quality of education shouldn’t
depend on where you live.

That’s why our campaign is fighting for a government that invests in
improving core aspects of our school system, including:

* Providing universal pre-K so every child starts with a strong
foundation.
* Ensuring all K-12 public school buildings are safe and lead-free.
* Paying teachers more.
* Creating debt-free and tuition-free pathways to higher education for
every student.
* Working with unions to expand vocational and apprenticeship training
opportunities.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/em-school-survey?source=em20250902-848&akid=849%2E251025%2EI5qCAO ]Do you agree with Abdul’s vision for education? Let us know today:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/em-school-survey?source=em20250902-848&akid=849%2E251025%2EI5qCAO ]Add your thoughts ››

Every kid deserves the chance to learn, grow, and thrive. Let’s fight for
that future together.

Thank you,

Team Abdul

No money to hire more doctors or nurses or caseworkers at the VA, but Trump found $1 million a day in the seat cushions for this.
#
Peter,
They just released the return on investment Trump’s getting on the $1 million a day he’s blowing with these National Guard deployments:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sep25.qP0qt0&refcode=em250902-1-120&t=1&akid=34585%2E3013755%2Ey12sGH)
While Trump told Veterans and poor kids and working families that America could not afford their Medicaid or their food assistance, he’s spending $1 million a day to use the National Guard as garbage men and gardeners.
No money to hire more doctors or nurses or caseworkers at the VA, but Trump found $1 million a day in the seat cushions for this.
And the worst part? Trump put these Troops on 29 day deployments, because if they were 30 day deployments he’d have to pay them more.
There has never been a president who has disrespected and denigrated our country, our democracy, our Veterans, or our Troops as Donald Trump, and there are hundreds of goons in Congress greenlighting every ridiculous move he takes.
They don’t have the balls to stand up to Trump now, but we’ll put them in their place next November. VoteVets won’t rest until we kick Trump’s MAGA lackeys out of Congress.

name: Brigadier General James Emory Mace (Ret.), Father of Nancy Mace
subject: I never thought I’d write something like this.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

Hi,

This is Brigadier General James Emory Mace, U.S. Army (Retired).
_TODAY, I WRITE TO YOU NOT AS A SOLDIER...BUT AS A FATHER._

I'm a PURPLE HEART veteran, and I’ve seen battle.

I’ve worn the uniform. I’ve buried friends who never made it home.
AND I’VE FELT THE STING OF A NATION THAT SOMETIMES FORGETS WHAT OUR
SACRIFICES WERE FOR.

_BUT MY DAUGHTER—CONGRESSWOMAN NANCY MACE—NEVER FORGOT.
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]_

Nancy was raised in the shadow of the flag. She saw the uniform. She
lived with the deployments. She knew the cost. AND INSTEAD OF RUNNING
FROM IT, SHE RAN TOWARD IT.

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

When Nancy was 17, she dropped out of high school.

Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy. SHE PICKED
HERSELF UP, TOOK A JOB AT WAFFLE HOUSE, AND FOUGHT HER WAY BACK.

BY 21, SHE BECAME THE FIRST WOMAN TO GRADUATE FROM THE CITADEL, SOUTH
CAROLINA’S MILITARY COLLEGE. A PLACE I KNEW WELL.

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

SUPPORT NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

NANCY THEN MADE IT TO CONGRESS, WHERE SHE REPRESENTED THE PEOPLE OF
SOUTH CAROLINA’S FIRST DISTRICT.

She’s been fighting her whole life; for herself, for her kids, for
the truth, and now...for her state.

TODAY, NANCY IS RUNNING FOR GOVERNOR OF SOUTH CAROLINA. AND JUST LIKE
SHE DID AT THE CITADEL, SHE’S MARCHING HEADFIRST INTO A BATTLE.
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

It’s hard sitting back as a father and hearing the terrible things
the media and the establishment say about her.

_BUT NANCY IS MY DAUGHTER. AND I KNOW THIS: SHE NEVER BACKS DOWN. AND
SHE NEVER STOPS FIGHTING._
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

I WANT TO ASK YOU SOMETHING FROM ONE PARENT, ONE PATRIOT, TO ANOTHER:

_WILL YOU SUPPORT MY DAUGHTER IN THE TOUGHEST BATTLE OF HER LIFE?_
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

SHE’S UP AGAINST A MACHINE THAT WANTS TO _ERASE THE VALUES OF
FAITH-BASED, SERVICE-MINDED AMERICANS WHO BELIEVE IN TRUTH, FAMILY,
AND COUNTRY._

Nancy stood up for me.

She stood up for EVERY veteran who was forgotten.

She stood up when sanctuary sheriffs released illegal alien criminals
onto South Carolina streets.

She stood up when they tried to let biological men compete in
women’s sports.

She stood up when OTHER REPUBLICANS STAYED SILENT.

AND NOW, SHE’S STANDING UP FOR YOU.

But she needs your backup.

_I MAY NOT WEAR THE UNIFORM ANYMORE, BUT I STILL BELIEVE IN ANSWERING
THE CALL._
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

Will you answer it with me today?

WHETHER IT’S $5, $10, OR $15, YOUR DONATION MEANS EVERYTHING RIGHT
NOW.
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov-v2?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

Nancy’s not running to make friends. _SHE’S RUNNING TO WIN._ TO
FIGHT. TO SERVE.

That’s what she learned growing up in our home.

That’s what she learned watching me go off to war.

_AND THAT’S WHAT SHE’LL CARRY WITH HER TO THE GOVERNOR’S
MANSION._

Please, on this solemn day, join me in standing with my daughter.

Yes, Nancy is a warrior. BUT SHE IS ALSO MY LITTLE GIRL—AND SHE
NEEDS YOU, PATRIOT.

name: David Hogg
subject: This is outrageous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
It is infuriating to watch the Trump admin wreak havoc.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250902-1&t=1&akid=2613%2E587540%2EDnGrJh)
Peter, it is infuriating to watch the Trump administration wreak havoc on our government and enact their dangerous, destructive agenda.
We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook that he used for years to stop Obama, to stop Biden, and prevent Democrats from passing our agenda. Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump.
On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump.
And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump. People who will fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security.
That’s where we come in.
**[Can you pitch in $5 to power our mission to elect the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250902_1_infuriating?refcode=em20250902-2613&amount=5&refcode2=2613_587540_DnGrJh&akid=2613%2E587540%2EDnGrJh)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250902_1_infuriating?amount=5&refcode=em20250902-2613&refcode2=2613_587540_DnGrJh&akid=2613%2E587540%2EDnGrJh)**
This is no joke. _Every single day counts in the fight ahead._
**Here’s the truth:** The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling.
**But we’re not going to let that happen.** We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful.
**We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough.**
That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve.
**[Can you chip in $5 right now to help power our game-changing work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250902_1_infuriating?refcode=em20250902-2613&amount=5&refcode2=2613_587540_DnGrJh&akid=2613%2E587540%2EDnGrJh)**
Thank you for being part of this movement,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250902-1&t=2&refcode2=2613_587540_DnGrJh&akid=2613%2E587540%2EDnGrJh)**

Leaders We Deserve

body:
The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call.
| Peter,
---
Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property.
---
_Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself._
---
**Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away.**
---
_In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani._
---
Why? _Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama_.
---
You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone...
---
_**...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama?**_

If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you?

clean_body: The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call. | Peter, Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property. Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself. Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away. In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani. Why? Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama. You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone... ...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama? If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you? As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a solemn pledge to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power. That’s my pledge. Now I’m entrusting you with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America. - Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

clean_body: Soros Plan EXPOSED >> Soros Plan EXPOSED >> | | | | | Patriot, I have some seriously concerning news to share with you. A Soros-funded organization called Texas Majority PAC has appeared in Texas and is plotting to take permanent control of our government by flipping Texas blue forever... Here is what Texas Majority PAC explains to its donors on its website: " ...We have one simple goal: to permanently flip Texas blue , thus releasing our state from Republican control and delivering two Democratic Senate seats and 40 Democratic Electoral College votes.This will effectively end the possibility of a Republican-controlled Senate or White House for generations ... " This is exactly why we can NEVER take our feet off the gas. The Left never sleeps as they ceaselessly plan to take power by any means necessary- can't let them do it. For Liberty, Ted Cruz PS: Please forward this email on to like-minded friends and family- thank you. | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | |

name: Team Taylor
subject: Pop quiz!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Take our quiz to test your knowledge about Wisconsin and the state of our race for Justice.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250902-511&t=1&akid=512%2E294397%2EBhY3vT)
Folks,
In the spirit of schooltime, we’re giving you a pop quiz about Wisconsin! It’s a mix of state trivia, and a few questions that get at the heart of what’s at stake in this election.
Here’s the first question:
[Q1: What’s the official state pastry of Wisconsin?](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/survey/wi-trivia?source=em20250902-511&akid=512%2E294397%2EBhY3vT) Kringle Cream puff Apple pie **[Take our quiz ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/survey/wi-trivia?source=em20250902-511&akid=512%2E294397%2EBhY3vT)**
---
You may know how much Wisconsin loves cheese, but do you know how many _pounds_ of cheese the average Wisconsinite consumes each year?
Or, can you guess how many millions were spent during the last Wisconsin Supreme Court election? (Hint: It’s a lot.)
[**Take our quiz to test your knowledge about Wisconsin and the state of our race for Justice:**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/survey/wi-trivia?source=em20250902-511&akid=512%2E294397%2EBhY3vT)
**[Take our quiz ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/survey/wi-trivia?source=em20250902-511&akid=512%2E294397%2EBhY3vT)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

It’s a mix of state trivia, and a few questions that get at the heart of what’s at stake in this election. Here’s the first question: Kringle Cream puff Apple pie You may know how much Wisconsin loves cheese, but do you know how many pounds of cheese the average Wisconsinite consumes each year? Or, can you guess how many millions were spent during the last Wisconsin Supreme Court election? (Hint: It’s a lot.) Thank you, Team Taylor

* * *
## Did Someone Reboot Trump? Was he Alive and Just Buffering all Week?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e0bec257-85bd-471e-a40f-76a2686b6e06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump hasn't looked good lately. In fact, he--from afar--has looked downright ghastly.
So his featherbrained-trust had a press conference today to prove the rumors of his demise have been greatly exaggerated. (And, yes, **the rumors have been everywhere)**.
I think he at least accomplished that, so far as you could call his appearance proof of life. I mean, he was late, per usual (he'd be late for his own funeral), which was maybe just so whatever drugs they likely jammed into him had a chance to kick in.
You'll also notice, if you watch the press conference, that he was standing in a rigid position. You couldn't see his hands or ankles because he was standing at a lectern, and [I promise you that was by design](https://substack.com/redirect/5993585d-18e7-42d3-b7ae-25c62765a0ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
He also ensured he got a question from the Doocy family of Fox, about the "rumors he was dead." This was so he could dispel the most extreme case--look, I'm not dead!--**and[not have to answer the real question](https://substack.com/redirect/624db392-f242-4b4b-a078-79cd946e80b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**:
**Why has he looked like death the past week? Avoided the media and cameras?**_**What**_**is** _**really**_**wrong with him??**
If you think I'm being too clinical, or harsh, let me put it this way, my friends: If you expect [the slightest ounce of sympathy from me for a dingy, b-list dictator who let 400,000 people die unnecessarily from COVID, rips children from the arms of parents](https://substack.com/redirect/5fa9e20c-497d-4db5-b279-7de9ae06bf25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to deport them and [brought the military onto our streets](https://substack.com/redirect/00eafdd3-5f2f-49d8-b1c3-e2ab32c454da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), you've arrived in the wrong spot.
[No sympathy here. Not a bit. ](https://substack.com/redirect/5fa9e20c-497d-4db5-b279-7de9ae06bf25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[None](https://substack.com/redirect/5fa9e20c-497d-4db5-b279-7de9ae06bf25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/5fa9e20c-497d-4db5-b279-7de9ae06bf25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This MFer, Trump, has committed so many evil acts in just over six months he should change his name to Mola Ram. Or Piotr Szczerek.
As sensitive Sen. Joni Ernst said when talking to Iowans about losing their Medicaid--and perhaps with it their lives--"I mean, we all are going to die."
Ok, back to the topic at hand.
Sure, Trump looked better than has the past week. But if anyone thinks this [rotund broken roomba with bloated-balloon-animal hands and cankles with their own cankles](https://substack.com/redirect/b9ebd1d3-25af-4bac-a905-1066000bd4f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) can dance a jig, well, you should seriously level-set expectations.
Yes, [they successfully rolled the ole guy out with more makeup than Rupaul](https://substack.com/redirect/624db392-f242-4b4b-a078-79cd946e80b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to try and salvage that he is still on this plane of existence. But, as usual, it was all a distraction filled with silly announcements and planted questions.
So, no, [just because he appeared semi-humanoid one day, ](https://substack.com/redirect/5731efb6-4669-4d26-90c0-c4d0cc086dfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[the questions about his](https://substack.com/redirect/5731efb6-4669-4d26-90c0-c4d0cc086dfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/5731efb6-4669-4d26-90c0-c4d0cc086dfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[health](https://substack.com/redirect/5731efb6-4669-4d26-90c0-c4d0cc086dfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/5731efb6-4669-4d26-90c0-c4d0cc086dfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[are not going away](https://substack.com/redirect/5731efb6-4669-4d26-90c0-c4d0cc086dfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.vakfnC4-H9hD4w7jTwf58mTr4kxWEM09VrNLaP8Kg2I?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172590302)
Let's go to the videotape, as we used to say--sorry Gen X here! Trump, a guy who literally cant' **ever** just STFU, hadn't talked to the press in a week. A man who sees cameras like he does porn stars completely avoided them.
Except for a few quick snap pictures [that weren't taken by friendlies](https://substack.com/redirect/624db392-f242-4b4b-a078-79cd946e80b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And in them, how shall we put it? Well, Trump possessed [a general likeness to the animated cousin of two-month old cottage cheese](https://substack.com/redirect/b9ebd1d3-25af-4bac-a905-1066000bd4f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **Why?**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fa1c5920-8e9e-440e-ac65-6d26ce96b809?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He looked so bad in this picture I half thought they'd bring out the Epstein files today to distract from his health.
Furthermore, we've known this guy was on a Stairway to Hades for a while now. We've been writing about it here at Blue Amp. He slurs his words. Forgets where he is.
Looks so bad at times there's a nickname among staffers in Washington for him--and no, I'm not making this up--[Cankles McTacoTits](https://substack.com/redirect/b9ebd1d3-25af-4bac-a905-1066000bd4f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
He thought Nancy Pelosi is Nikki Haley and Alaska was Russia and stealth fighters were invisible and injecting bleach was a good thing. He thinks saying Man, Person, Woman, Crypto-Scam is an accomplishment.
And this is all in the context of a man who eats like a 12-year old, barely sleeps and rage tweets all day and night. Who reportedly treats crushed Adderall like Tony Montana treats a coke-covered desk and engages in roughly the same amount of exercise as a sloth trapped under a grand piano.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8d96fd56-36d4-43a7-8dcd-2dbdf86d31fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
These are not...well, they're not traits four out of five doctors would recommend.
Let's go back, shall we, to a simpler time when rabid Ronny Jackson was not yet a dumbf*k MAGA Congressman, but somehow a White House doctor (I know).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.vakfnC4-H9hD4w7jTwf58mTr4kxWEM09VrNLaP8Kg2I?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172590302)
CNN's Dr. Sanjay Gupta told us all we needed to know about Trump's health once Jackson showed the charts to the press:
> Like most men of his age, President Donald Trump has a common form of heart disease, relatively easy to address if he increases the dose of his cholesterol-lowering medication **and makes necessary lifestyle changes**. Without those changes, the President has a moderate risk of having a heart attack in the next three to five years, [according to the Mayo Clinic](https://substack.com/redirect/bb8bef0f-fa69-4e48-a38e-880c9b15e629?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> His score is 133, and anything over 100 indicates plaque is present and that the patient has heart disease. According to Trump's official medical records, in 2009 his coronary calcium score was 34. In 2013, it was 98.
That was seven years and a Trump-Tower sized engorging of _hamberders_ ago.
Jackson had already beclowned himself, accused of running a "pill mill" for White House staffers, so when he said Trump would outlive Methuselah--possibly even Chuck Grassley--we weren't impressed.
Regarding what Gupta said, I particularly enjoyed the _" necessary life changes."_ As we know, when Gupta said that was right when Trump went vegan, [tookYoga for relaxation](https://substack.com/redirect/00eafdd3-5f2f-49d8-b1c3-e2ab32c454da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and exercise and learned what a vegetable was.
So when Trump is avoiding the press, his oxygen. Has those...well, whatever that vomitous mass is on his tiny hands, as well as the cankles, [the slurs](https://substack.com/redirect/8d74a421-f676-4c93-83ef-10c43742b742?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)...let's just say mini-strokes enter the conversation. Full-on heart disease knocks on the front door.
I, like Ronny Jackson, am not a doctor, so I won't diagnose him. But I do have eyes, and most of the time he looks like shit.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f1254e8a-c003-413c-bd6f-789a8d286248?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last week at his cabinet meeting [when he got the Kim-Jong-Un treatment](https://substack.com/redirect/624db392-f242-4b4b-a078-79cd946e80b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), besides being the usual cringe spectacle, it was funereal.
And what does it tell you about his seeming febrility that the man disappears for five days **and many immediately think he 's dead**?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.vakfnC4-H9hD4w7jTwf58mTr4kxWEM09VrNLaP8Kg2I?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172590302)
Twitter's owned by a Trump clone from 30 years ago who lets Nazis cruise around the platform like it's 1938 Sudetenland. [And even there among Trump's pals](https://substack.com/redirect/5993585d-18e7-42d3-b7ae-25c62765a0ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the belief that Trump had shuffled off this mortal coil was such that **this** has been trending on and off the last 48 hours:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7ed9443b-6acc-461a-bb25-84c1b1673805?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The only person hiding as long as Trump did has been Jake Tapper. Hey Jake, presidential health expert, care to comment on any of this? Or is your beat only the health of former Democratic Presidents that are un-news?
Psst, Jake, here are both Biden & Trump:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dda148ad-9335-472f-8676-16d7b3803827?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Maybe you and your corporate-media, access-panhandling friends--even though somewhere Hillary is probably sending an email!--can cover [Trump's health with the gravity it deserves](https://substack.com/redirect/8d74a421-f676-4c93-83ef-10c43742b742?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? You don't have to be the company butler every day, man!
On a serious note, there are real questions to be answered here about Trump's health. Per usual, independent media will likely have to do the heavy lifting, as corporate media's useless.
But we still technically live in a democracy. Trump still technically represents the people, **and the people have the right to know** what the hell the hands, ankles and death stare from last week equal when combined into his biological equation.
It's like this weird form of of government we're supposed to have. Called liberal democracy.
However we can find the truth, [get past that collection of cryptic, crypt-protecting creepers surrounding him](https://substack.com/redirect/5993585d-18e7-42d3-b7ae-25c62765a0ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--We Must. Like so much else these glorified glory holes aren't telling us, it is our right to know, if indeed this is still a democracy.
