Stop in and watch your body fully drop - System of a Down, "Psycho" | | | Sep 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | We are extending our Labor Day sale just for today to honor the workers who built this country! Just 12 hrs left, so act now on a great deal! | | ---|---|--- A recent pic of Grandpa Concentration Camp ...not looking very good Did Someone Reboot Trump? Was he Alive and Just Buffering all Week? | | ---|---|--- Donald Trump hasn't looked good lately. In fact, he--from afar--has looked downright ghastly. So his featherbrained-trust had a press conference today to prove the rumors of his demise have been greatly exaggerated. (And, yes, the rumors have been everywhere). I think he at least accomplished that, so far as you could call his appearance proof of life. I mean, he was late, per usual (he'd be late for his own funeral), which was maybe just so whatever drugs they likely jammed into him had a chance to kick in. You'll also notice, if you watch the press conference, that he was standing in a rigid position. You couldn't see his hands or ankles because he was standing at a lectern, and . He also ensured he got a question from the Doocy family of Fox, about the "rumors he was dead." This was so he could dispel the most extreme case--look, I'm not dead!--and: Why has he looked like death the past week? Avoided the media and cameras?Whatis reallywrong with him?? If you think I'm being too clinical, or harsh, let me put it this way, my friends: If you expect to deport them and , you've arrived in the wrong spot. This MFer, Trump, has committed so many evil acts in just over six months he should change his name to Mola Ram. Or Piotr Szczerek. As sensitive Sen. Joni Ernst said when talking to Iowans about losing their Medicaid--and perhaps with it their lives--"I mean, we all are going to die." Ok, back to the topic at hand. Sure, Trump looked better than has the past week. But if anyone thinks this can dance a jig, well, you should seriously level-set expectations. Yes, to try and salvage that he is still on this plane of existence. But, as usual, it was all a distraction filled with silly announcements and planted questions. So, no, . Let's go to the videotape, as we used to say--sorry Gen X here! Trump, a guy who literally cant' ever just STFU, hadn't talked to the press in a week. A man who sees cameras like he does porn stars completely avoided them. Except for a few quick snap pictures . And in them, how shall we put it? Well, Trump possessed . Why? | | ---|---|--- He looked so bad in this picture I half thought they'd bring out the Epstein files today to distract from his health. Furthermore, we've known this guy was on a Stairway to Hades for a while now. We've been writing about it here at Blue Amp. He slurs his words. Forgets where he is. Looks so bad at times there's a nickname among staffers in Washington for him--and no, I'm not making this up--. He thought Nancy Pelosi is Nikki Haley and Alaska was Russia and stealth fighters were invisible and injecting bleach was a good thing. He thinks saying Man, Person, Woman, Crypto-Scam is an accomplishment. And this is all in the context of a man who eats like a 12-year old, barely sleeps and rage tweets all day and night. Who reportedly treats crushed Adderall like Tony Montana treats a coke-covered desk and engages in roughly the same amount of exercise as a sloth trapped under a grand piano. | | ---|---|--- These are not...well, they're not traits four out of five doctors would recommend. Let's go back, shall we, to a simpler time when rabid Ronny Jackson was not yet a dumbfk MAGA Congressman, but somehow a White House doctor (I know). CNN's Dr. Sanjay Gupta told us all we needed to know about Trump's health once Jackson showed the charts to the press: Like most men of his age, President Donald Trump has a common form of heart disease, relatively easy to address if he increases the dose of his cholesterol-lowering medication and makes necessary lifestyle changes. Without those changes, the President has a moderate risk of having a heart attack in the next three to five years, . His score is 133, and anything over 100 indicates plaque is present and that the patient has heart disease. According to Trump's official medical records, in 2009 his coronary calcium score was 34. In 2013, it was 98. That was seven years and a Trump-Tower sized engorging of hamberders ago. Jackson had already beclowned himself, accused of running a "pill mill" for White House staffers, so when he said Trump would outlive Methuselah--possibly even Chuck Grassley--we weren't impressed. Regarding what Gupta said, I particularly enjoyed the " necessary life changes." As we know, when Gupta said that was right when Trump went vegan, and exercise and learned what a vegetable was. So when Trump is avoiding the press, his oxygen. Has those...well, whatever that vomitous mass is on his tiny hands, as well as the cankles, just say mini-strokes enter the conversation. Full-on heart disease knocks on the front door. I, like Ronny Jackson, am not a doctor, so I won't diagnose him. But I do have eyes, and most of the time he looks like shit. | | ---|---|--- Last week at his cabinet meeting , besides being the usual cringe spectacle, it was funereal. And what does it tell you about his seeming febrility that the man disappears for five days and many immediately think he 's dead? Twitter's owned by a Trump clone from 30 years ago who lets Nazis cruise around the platform like it's 1938 Sudetenland. , the belief that Trump had shuffled off this mortal coil was such that this has been trending on and off the last 48 hours: | | ---|---|--- The only person hiding as long as Trump did has been Jake Tapper. Hey Jake, presidential health expert, care to comment on any of this? Or is your beat only the health of former Democratic Presidents that are un-news? Psst, Jake, here are both Biden & Trump: | | ---|---|--- Maybe you and your corporate-media, access-panhandling friends--even though somewhere Hillary is probably sending an email!--can cover ? You don't have to be the company butler every day, man! On a serious note, there are real questions to be answered here about Trump's health. Per usual, independent media will likely have to do the heavy lifting, as corporate media's useless. But we still technically live in a democracy. Trump still technically represents the people, and the people have the right to know what the hell the hands, ankles and death stare from last week equal when combined into his biological equation. It's like this weird form of of government we're supposed to have. Called liberal democracy. However we can find the truth, Must. Like so much else these glorified glory holes aren't telling us, it is our right to know, if indeed this is still a democracy. name: Justice Democrats
subject: ICE slammed the door on oversight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, Rep. Summer Lee was denied entry into the Moshannon Valley ICE
Detention Center in Pennsylvania.

Why? Because ICE is doing everything in its power to hide the horrific
treatment of our communities.

Rep. Summer Lee showed up to do her job: to hold the Trump administration
and private prison profiteers accountable.

Instead, she was blocked at the gate — by an institution that uses our
taxpayer dollars to detain and abuse immigrants, all while shielding its
operations from public oversight. This isn’t just outrageous. It’s
corruption — clear as day.

We’re proud to stand with Rep. Summer Lee and the local residents, clergy,
and advocates who rallied outside the detention center. But this fight is
far from over.

We have a choice: Stand back, or fight back.

Justice Democrats is organizing to elect working-class leaders who will
always speak truth to power and challenge the corruption that others
ignore. But to take on billion-dollar corporations and the political
machine propping them up, we need your help.

back against corruption, expose the truth, and elect leaders who will
never stop demanding justice.

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: How I feel right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=TwaSn3ixmV74mGAlsb%2B4IuhBNRYcD307s5%2Fv5mS2eACSgzboOpkSrwyl3RtfliG97cj%2B1%2F%2FUdqMPHHvbqa%2F9aoWXe8vrheVSwu29uLOMP%2BdkUDCVGmoHoZtdlp0m9xth2IM3WnZWInGCaaU%2FjGzasz9AEdd3cDCqTHn8wi%2Bh3m8Nzv9YXDAcDggLKsJoh7opq4WO%2Bwdqhhtdd4FY5M46MPWTK%2Fot14XUZTi1OtV7myy195Dl%2FIfvtG3DhPsu5MbMH6nbklEgAaGC32wKj7g1OYkMOqjglxrbWXkV3dT2RVd8XDMEhjJI8ny4X2zkw3oNmz7yjl01W7M6Iw%2F86FtwoAjNOawmbKsDzhX8eO8qsxHnkIq8U%2Bmm1%2BI%2Bmta5%2BNDtESE0OrK4oE%2BC0UeeRFtagZS%2FirAjoXAwRPzjI8%2BxU7tA4%2BGmggY6KH6WqEXe3ETr]

# [#]
It's Raul.

I wanted to reach out and say thank you. Because of your support, we reached our August end-of-month fundraising goal!

A few days ago, I was fortunate enough to celebrate my birthday surrounded by my family and friends. It was one of those moments that makes you stop and reflect — on the people who’ve stood by you, believed in you, and made all of this worthwhile.

That’s exactly how I feel right now — immensely grateful for your continued support.

Through the highs and lows, you've stuck with me. And your belief in our work here in CA-25 means more than I can say.

Every dollar you gave, every action you took — it’s not just fuel for a campaign. It’s what powers our fight for working families, for access to healthcare, for real economic opportunity, and for a democracy that works for everyone.

I'm going to keep showing up and doing everything I can for this district — because you always show up for me.

And that kind of trust? That kind of partnership? I don't take it lightly.

So, from the bottom of my heart — thank you.

— Raul

P.S. We have another important FEC deadline coming up at the end of the month, and we need to have a strong showing. Will you chip in $10 today so we can keep this momentum going? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-sep25?amount=10]
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] It's Raul. I wanted to reach out and say thank you. Because of your support, we reached our August end-of-month fundraising goal! A few days ago, I was fortunate enough to celebrate my birthday surrounded by my family and friends. It was one of those moments that makes you stop and reflect — on the people who’ve stood by you, believed in you, and made all of this worthwhile. That’s exactly how I feel right now — immensely grateful for your continued support. Through the highs and lows, you've stuck with me. And your belief in our work here in CA-25 means more than I can say. Every dollar you gave, every action you took — it’s not just fuel for a campaign. It’s what powers our fight for working families, for access to healthcare, for real economic opportunity, and for a democracy that works for everyone. I'm going to keep showing up and doing everything I can for this district — because you always show up for me. And that kind of trust? That kind of partnership? I don't take it lightly. So, from the bottom of my heart — thank you. — Raul P.S. We have another important FEC deadline coming up at the end of the month, and we need to have a strong showing. Will you chip in $10 today so we can keep this momentum going? [] [] [] [] [] The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Deb is the real deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I hope you’ll join me in supporting Deb’s historic campaign.
Hi there — it's Elizabeth Warren.
I’m honored to endorse my good friend Deb Haaland’s run to become New Mexico’s next governor, and **[I'm hoping you'll join me in supporting her by making a donation to power her historic campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250902_1_warrenresend?amount=5&refcode=em20250902-4189&refcode2=4189_400544_fUVvhN&akid=4189%2E400544%2EfUVvhN)
**Deb is the real deal.** I watched her fight like hell for working families and stand up to Big Oil in Congress — and I’ve seen the impact of her leadership as Secretary of the Interior, where she defended our public lands, took real action on the climate crisis, and protected people from the big polluters harming our communities.
Now, Deb is running for Governor of New Mexico. If she wins, she’ll make history as the first Native American woman to ever serve as governor in the United States.
This race isn’t going to be easy. New Mexico’s governorship has changed parties every two terms for decades.
National Republicans are looking to flip this seat red, and we can’t let that happen.
**Governors are the first line of defense against the dangerous policies coming out of the Trump administration. In this moment, we need righteous fighters like Deb leading the way.**
Deb is building a movement to make life better for all New Mexicans — to lower costs, protect public lands, and ensure every person has the resources and support they need to thrive. **But in order to win this thing, she needs our help.**
**[If you can, please make a contribution to help Deb win this race and keep New Mexico blue.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250902_1_warrenresend?amount=5&refcode=em20250902-4189&refcode2=4189_400544_fUVvhN&akid=4189%2E400544%2EfUVvhN)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250902_1_warrenresend?amount=5&refcode=em20250902-4189&refcode2=4189_400544_fUVvhN&akid=4189%2E400544%2EfUVvhN)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250902-1&t=1&refcode2=4189_400544_fUVvhN&akid=4189%2E400544%2EfUVvhN)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=2&akid=4189%2E400544%2EfUVvhN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=3&akid=4189%2E400544%2EfUVvhN)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

Governors are the first line of defense against the dangerous policies coming out of the Trump administration. In this moment, we need righteous fighters like Deb leading the way. Deb is building a movement to make life better for all New Mexicans — to lower costs, protect public lands, and ensure every person has the resources and support they need to thrive. But in order to win this thing, she needs our help. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Warren

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: [RESPONSE REQUESTED] Add your name and personally endorse Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
As a team, we want to make sure we never lose sight of how important you are to Mark’s work — and how grateful we are that you have his back.
#

Team —
As a team, we want to make sure we never lose sight of how important you are to Mark’s work — and how grateful we are that you have his back.
In 2020, hundreds of thousands of people signed on to say they were with Mark. Thousands more did the same in 2022.
It meant the world to us, and to Mark.
Now, he needs our help again. He’s got a new mission: _Holding the Trump Administration accountable, combatting Elon Musk’s illegal actions, and getting the next generation of leaders elected to the United States Senate._
**And today, we’re respectfully asking you to sign on and personally endorse Mark Kelly.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally support Mark Kelly? It’s important for Mark to know that he’s got a big team backing him up.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-sept25-endorse/?source=em250902-1-600&akid=6176%2E6688874%2ErFo3Bu)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-sept25-endorse/?source=em250902-1-600&akid=6176%2E6688874%2ErFo3Bu)**
With so much happening now this might seem like an insignificant action. But in times like these, everything we do matters.
When you join the thousands of others who have endorsed Mark it helps us put together a team from coast to coast that can do incredible things. It’s bigger than any one of us, and it sends an important message.
Actions like this are how we’ll get through this — how we’ll turn the tide.
Together.
[**So, please, hit this link and personally endorse Mark.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-sept25-endorse/?source=em250902-1-600&akid=6176%2E6688874%2ErFo3Bu)
Thank you!
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-sept25-endorse/?source=em250902-1-600&akid=6176%2E6688874%2ErFo3Bu)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6176%2E6688874%2ErFo3Bu).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac015a8d4a5343e1becec58bf2c26343&_e=RK_mePbIh4T8OLWBSHPsACPI0fMJqjDMNWsMsGwC8zHxHk4r6-5X8kZrdqUKc8vNjQHfq3J99a8s743UtkeXk_g7Bd41OIBpvFcJ45M_jh_BFkSLrJ3AiiuZmYOHLJL-kSeKrXXOpszus2EqVu1NHND4zVoT1SLNIkJyfcpD3CMvd8Q-0uqXe_PqZjOcRwLeIJe73deMy9jLTFfT9P8wDHUXnUEKYccl7XnK5uVP_tFeLKlELa2Gwpmcb2OmBaMVmGjQKU-EEqgh8Z4UARRgUaTCF2kNTmnQm3FvmvLxEvO9rkX9OK9cCW7M1YWY_3UMWFuqQz4g4dzHz_apAZ_NYMINf3CktYrMLPU8Jqbn9GLUiwr5X5JP4SricnaYqEcS2JXtWsijuVtrse_IVRK65gHEIvqXSm2QKHs6Td48XKRh0NKgeWsyWXvYHp-12OjLRM1o2aukjezppY2oUWCn7EyanaT2y1HWprAMLPSKUe2JMYxJVVm_W4CMeMYFAP1MS_bOfBAWGgXv_3t5llTaITiD1mmWdoaEtlG0zntKLmoEmRP8tJIxBne6GnmlS2mbo0oGKy50fI4t5oGNooSw7CCQBPGW0yGnTDHpMVGrzZjOmJ82sI0y5IP9UXWVcGvussbfek9d1E2XvDaZL2-JZA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac015a8d4a5343e1becec58bf2c26343&_e=RK_mePbIh4T8OLWBSHPsACPI0fMJqjDMNWsMsGwC8zHxHk4r6-5X8kZrdqUKc8vNjQHfq3J99a8s743UtkeXk_g7Bd41OIBpvFcJ45M_jh_BFkSLrJ3AiiuZmYOHLJL-kSeKrXXOpszus2EqVu1NHND4zVoT1SLNIkJyfcpD3CMvd8Q-0uqXe_PqZjOcRwLeIJe73deMy9jLTFfT9P8wDHTf5X2zjpcaSz5I5KoCk0UhyFOQIyzhihH9Uy3LiqYnXm1phxIfqejoEJ8JtlQg844CJev7d0uLyDu24NWKR4nyBE6bDktbqAD2ThAyPJqU-0XAtXPzFR_fSjepCj8j6yObv3s67ubFEbCh9t7u3ERnqHqbXT-FPsXglywEijWpUVgij47QYcDqvWbLC_pc4HJzYxbjjCjQtrfToFZVvxAlVtuuWVj7LFzPpTk_9EiXhLFAv9aVPP3VAyfwoV3XSbXNqkARkNPqiFNbDpdg19qN0uWgTjyEBs4Q54i5KkA4Eu-GlukUgm4VqMpe_UJq1uqS0bfXUBfZ2Kn7blZpEhNpdldYc0K_d4Q0UVploxJwfY_dHOL9MYJMENaArFiXICL97M_chIlkuVR6U4i-qikUJBE8wEZVOSBsN7khrCO38oHN1c3a076ICm24TBbOLQ%3D%3D)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---

body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250902-1506-foote&t=1001&akid=1506%2E342411%2E66e69r ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We talk a lot about building power from the ground up. You’re what that
actually looks like.

Your continued
support isn’t just appreciated — it’s impactful. It’s how
the Squad can continue speaking truth to power and refusing to back down
from the fights that matter most.

Because of you, we’re standing up to corporate interests, defending our
communities, and pushing for the kind of bold change that’s long overdue.
You’re with us — and we see it.

This is what people-powered politics looks like. And we’re just getting
started.

Thank you for being part of this movement,

The Squad Victory Fund

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are standing strong against Trump
and MAGA Republicans’ authoritarianism — but they need all of us in this
fight.

name: Janelle Stelson
subject: Give Scott Perry the boot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson

Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. Congressman Scott Perry is an extremist. → He voted to rip health care coverage away from millions of Americans and gutted food assistance for struggling families. → He made it harder for Americans to receive Social Security that they spent their lives paying into. → He voted to inflate the national deficit by trillions of dollars, forcing working people to foot the bill yet again. → He also played a key part in planning the Jan. 6th insurrection, and he denies the results of the 2020 election to this day. **He cares more about serving himself than the people of PA-10. I always like to pause at the beginning of every month and remember how grateful I am for this incredible community. Your support is proof that grassroots power is real. Whether you chipped in, signed up for a volunteering shift, or stayed up-to-date with our endorsed candidates, you’re an essential part of a movement that refuses to give up, even when the news is exhausting. And let’s be honest: It is exhausting. Every week brings another climate rollback, another climate disaster, or another reminder of how much work we have ahead. **That’s why I want to step away from all the noise for a moment and ask you:** **_What are you fighting for?_** In those moments when the climate crisis feels impossible to solve or when you see our leaders failing us again and again, what makes you refuse to give up? **[There’s no right or wrong answer. If you have a few minutes, I’d love to hear what motivates you to keep going in the climate fight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114491217/567194105/-2028731616?refcode=ea.77e960d3-4688-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.77e960d3-4688-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3ZTk2MGQzLTQ2ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lofbCGiWTfBcHhEcmuMapvhG5mnwou-4zgEF8TH-VZU=&emci=baa30dfd-1f88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=77e960d3-4688-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)** | [**MESSAGE JANE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114491218/567194106/-2028731616?refcode=ea.77e960d3-4688-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.77e960d3-4688-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3ZTk2MGQzLTQ2ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lofbCGiWTfBcHhEcmuMapvhG5mnwou-4zgEF8TH-VZU=&emci=baa30dfd-1f88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=77e960d3-4688-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
I'll go first:
I'm fighting for our natural world — for the songbirds that greet the morning, the towering sequoias that have stood for centuries, the clear, smogless skies above the Santa Monica Mountains, and every creature and moment of wonder that can make us smile.
I'm fighting for the communities on the frontlines of climate disaster, and for our Indigenous siblings who have long been the guardians of our most precious places — people who deserve leaders who put their safety over corporate profits.
And I'm fighting for our children and grandchildren who should never have to inherit a planet that's been poisoned by greed and neglect.
**Now I want to hear from you. What keeps you motivated to stay engaged when the news gets overwhelming and the attacks keep coming?**
[**MESSAGE JANE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114491219/567194107/-2028731616?refcode=ea.77e960d3-4688-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.77e960d3-4688-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3ZTk2MGQzLTQ2ODgtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lofbCGiWTfBcHhEcmuMapvhG5mnwou-4zgEF8TH-VZU=&emci=baa30dfd-1f88-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=77e960d3-4688-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)

In solidarity,
xx Jane

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Let me just say this about JD Vance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

Peter —
JD Vance came to Georgia recently to celebrate defunding hospitals and raising health insurance premiums.
_The same JD Vance who once sold himself as the GOP’s working-class champion, then cast the deciding vote to rip health care and essential services away from millions of Americans._
The VP was also in Georgia to attack me.
I welcome JD’s attacks — a man reduced to running little errands for the President he once compared to Hitler. He has sold out working families to the far-right billionaires who funded his political rise.
And his MAGA bosses sent him to Georgia because they fear us. They know our grassroots power flipped Georgia and delivered Democrats the Senate majority in 2021. They fear we will do it again.
That’s why they sent Vance and it’s why their Super PACs are already unloading millions of dollars in attack ads against me.
But here’s the thing: we’ve beaten them before. And we’ll beat them again—if we have the resources to fight back right now.
So I am asking: [**[**Can you rush a $5 donation to my reelection campaign TODAY so we can respond to JD Vance right away and set the record straight?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250902-1-f&t=2&akid=712%2E5691347%2EgtmXAN) Thank you for chipping in, especially right now. \- Jon Ossoff **[DONATE TO REELECT JON OSSOFF](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250902-1-f&t=3&akid=712%2E5691347%2EgtmXAN)**
Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=712%2E5691347%2EgtmXAN) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=712%2E5691347%2EgtmXAN) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114491295/567194413/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjU1MzY3My00Nzg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfFuroVX2ArQi15oG8XfFmu4BM5I5idaXCUj9b1rNUo=)
---
| Peter, before you click away:

**Becca is traveling to red districts across the country to host town halls, listen to everyday people, and hold MAGA Republicans accountable — and [she’s counting on your support to fuel her in the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114491297/567194415/-289842851?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjU1MzY3My00Nzg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfFuroVX2ArQi15oG8XfFmu4BM5I5idaXCUj9b1rNUo=)**
---
The truth is — only about 18% of people open these emails. But you stuck around, and you need to know how important that is.

Across the country, MAGA Republicans like Rep. Stefanik in New York can’t stop dodging their constituents and escaping accountability.
---
To Becca, this is __unacceptable__. That’s why she’s bringing the fight where it’s needed — in red districts that Republicans keep failing — to hold town halls and ensure voters know who to blame for sweeping health care cuts and rising costs.
---
You’re the key to keeping this momentum going **full-throttle.**

If everyone reading this donated just $5, we would raise enough to fuel Becca’s work in Vermont and beyond. We’d even have enough to support other pro-democracy candidates who are in tough campaigns.
---

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Where are our leaders on Prop 50?
body:
Democracy isn’t optional

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=e0a76fab79&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,**You’ve seen the headlines about Proposition 50** , and Arnold Schwarzenegger’s loud opposition to Governor Newsom’s plan to put it before voters this November.**Prop 50 is straightforward: it stops politicians from abusing their power to rig elections. It protects voters, not politicians.****For these reasons, I am absolutely voting YES on Prop 50.** But instead of standing with Californians, **Arnold Schwarzenegger—a man who left office with a critically low approval rating of just 23 percent—is siding with the same anti-democracy forces undermining elections nationwide.** That’s not leadership, that’s putting politics above the very democracy he once championed.**So where are California’s elected Democrats?** Their silence is more than disappointing – it’s dangerous. If Democrats won’t speak up when our democracy is on the line, when will they?**Our communities deserve fair maps and fair voices, not backroom deals.** Voters deserve leaders who fight for fairness and accountability, not ones who shrink from tough choices. That’s why I support Prop 50, and why I’ll never stop pushing for a government that answers to the people.**Let’s make it clear together: California voters will not be silenced. Sign on today – stand with me for Prop 50 and for democracy.**
**In solidarity,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=18be3001aa&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

---
| [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=b183a2f98f&e=5a6ee82cdb)

# **Florida, Texas, and Missouri Just Made Gold Legal Again**
## **[Now There's A Big Opportunity For Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/4081172f-9e12-4f1d-96ad-00e0ff13cd2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4081172f-9e12-4f1d-96ad-00e0ff13cd2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**How three signatures could trigger the biggest precious metals opportunity since 1974**
Starting next year, Texans, Missourians, and Floridians can pay state taxes with gold coins. They can buy groceries with silver. Even use PayPal for precious metals transactions.
**"We are the first large state to step up and get this done,"** DeSantis announced at the signing. But here's the opportunity, if you're bold enough:
When gold restrictions were lifted in '74, smart Americans who got positioned early saw 179% gains by 1980.
**That 's like getting 18.6% returns a year, for six years straight.**
And in the past 12 months alone, it's...
**["Nearly doubled the returns of the S&P 500 Index."](https://substack.com/redirect/4081172f-9e12-4f1d-96ad-00e0ff13cd2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[
-- Goldman Sachs](https://substack.com/redirect/4081172f-9e12-4f1d-96ad-00e0ff13cd2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Now this new event could trigger one of its biggest moves yet.
**As much as 50% or more in the coming years.**
But the clock's ticking.
**[>>> Get the details here.](https://substack.com/redirect/4081172f-9e12-4f1d-96ad-00e0ff13cd2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/4081172f-9e12-4f1d-96ad-00e0ff13cd2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# BREAKING: Trump announces "lethal" strike on Venezuelan drug ship
President Donald Trump announced during an Oval Office news conference that the U.S. military **[conducted a "lethal strike"](https://substack.com/redirect/4cbd85e3-4f3f-4142-bb6a-0f9a12542dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** against a drug-carrying boat from Venezuela in the southern Caribbean, describing it as a "precision strike" that occurred "moments ago."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f3acdaa6-5281-45ab-8d0e-694a47160859?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Official Details:** Secretary of State Marco Rubio confirmed the strike on social media, stating the vessel was operated by a designated narco-terrorist organization, while a senior defense official characterized the attack as targeting drug trafficking operations coming from Venezuela.
* **Limited Information:** Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro has not yet publicly commented on the strike, and it remains unclear how many fatalities resulted from the military action, though Trump indicated there were "a lot of drugs" on the targeted vessel.

**The story is developing, stay tuned to PolitiBrawl for updates as more information becomes available.**
* * *

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Did you hear what Gov. Walz called you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, Governor Tim Walz’s latest remarks mocking Trump-supporting Americans and their "stupid frickin' hats” expose a growing culture of contempt from the Left toward everyday patriots who uphold our American values. That’s exactly why Congressman Brad Finstad is your unwavering advocate in Washington. While Walz dismisses supporters of traditional American ideals, Finstad is: **Holding government accountable:** He's taken action, joining the Minnesota Republican delegation in demanding answers from Governor Walz regarding massive fraud in the Department of Human Services’ Housing Stabilization Services program. This suspected government fraud is estimated to cost taxpayers millions! **Seeking justice, not excuses:** Finstad has urged the Department of Justice to launch a federal investigation into prospective Medicaid fraud tied to that program, demanding transparency and protecting taxpayer dollars. **Putting YOU first:** While Walz makes headlines with snide remarks, Finstad focuses on results: shielding vulnerable Minnesotans from waste, ensuring taxpayer money isn’t stolen, and holding bad actors accountable. Will you stand with Brad in cutting through politics-as-usual and driving real results? Will you chip in $10 today to fund a campaign that doesn't shy away from defending your values or from calling out hypocrisy right when it happens?

name: Mark Warner
subject: Why far-right conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer is attacking me…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114491573/567195586/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Loomer_250902_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc4MDUyYS00ODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0Adv1g9P7aUuL7iEH2v5lrZXfR5eK-zbD9hEIhPxiM=) Over the weekend, Laura Loomer took to social media and smeared my record as a bipartisan leader on national intelligence. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114491574/567195587/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Loomer_250902_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc4MDUyYS00ODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0Adv1g9P7aUuL7iEH2v5lrZXfR5eK-zbD9hEIhPxiM=) And then she did it again: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114491575/567195588/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Loomer_250902_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc4MDUyYS00ODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0Adv1g9P7aUuL7iEH2v5lrZXfR5eK-zbD9hEIhPxiM=) Let me set the record straight:
* This far-right conspiracy theorist is angry I’m calling for Pete Hegseth’s resignation after he put American lives at risk with his sloppy handling of classified information.
* She’s upset that I’m standing up for justice and due process for all.
* And she doesn’t like that I will speak out against her wackjob conspiracy theories and the threat they pose to our country’s security.

**Look, if far-right, racist conspiracy theorists like Laura Loomer are attacking me and my record...I must be doing something right.**

But the reality is, the more I speak out against Donald Trump and Laura Loomer’s dangerous ideas, the more I need to be prepared for a tough reelection fight next year.

I need your help to fight back, hold this critical seat for Democrats, and flip the Senate, so we can finally hold Trump and his dangerous administration accountable.

[_**So I have to ask: Will you chip in today to support my reelection campaign and fend off whatever attacks Republicans send my way?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114491576/567195589/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Loomer_250902_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc4MDUyYS00ODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0Adv1g9P7aUuL7iEH2v5lrZXfR5eK-zbD9hEIhPxiM=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner **********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114491577/567195590/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Loomer_250902_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc4MDUyYS00ODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0Adv1g9P7aUuL7iEH2v5lrZXfR5eK-zbD9hEIhPxiM=)**********

subject: Quick campaign update for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Thanks to everyone on this grassroots team, we hit our August fundraising goal

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114491695/567196110/1435897075?refcode=email_090225_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjQzMDk5Ny00ODg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bKyAMc4kUOPE0H403DqQn7npIDtfoWdQdLtoeXilzy8=&emci=b6fd5448-4284-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=66430997-4888-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715) Folks, we have good news: **Thanks to everyone on this grassroots team, we hit our August fundraising goal, setting us up for a strong push to the end of the quarter.** But listen, John isn’t running just to raise money. He’s running for YOU! Each email we send, door we knock, and ad we run is about ensuring we re-elect a senator who’s laser-focused on securing a better future for everyday people. Together, we’re building a people-powered movement to defend Colorado, flip the Senate, and block Trump’s extreme agenda so we can get to work delivering real progress on the challenges facing working families. **That means bringing down prices, lowering your energy bill, tackling climate change head on, and so much more.** So again, thank you. We couldn’t do this without you. — Team Hickenlooper _P.S. Before we go, we wanted to give you a heads up: **[September 30th marks our next end-of-quarter reporting deadline, which the FEC releases publicly. subject: Why Mississippi Should Bet on Small Modular Reactors

Mississippi needs power that works when the weather doesn't and when gas prices spike. We need electricity that is steady, clean, and affordable over the long haul.

# [Why Mississippi Should Bet on Small Modular Reactors](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=172564174&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyNTY0MTc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTY4NTEzNDksImV4cCI6MTc1OTQ0MzM0OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DBmF6Jts8oP_0yQ3mlUdb3Vywimtb3Lf8JiSxBAzfIw)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/danacriswell/p/why-mississippi-should-bet-on-small?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/35caf855-07e0-4de8-944d-2b7725ba1129?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Mississippi needs power that works when the weather doesn't and when gas prices spike. We need electricity that is steady, clean, and affordable over the long haul. That's why we should move toward **small modular reactors (SMRs)**.
SMRs are proven nuclear science packaged in smaller, factory-built units that can be installed at existing power sites. They run 24/7. They don't depend on a gas pipeline in a freeze. They produce power without smoke or soot. That's real reliability, not slogans.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4dd5dbd5-8019-4c0b-aec4-05a2e201b405?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Cost -** The first unit will not be the cheapest kilowatt-hour on your bill. First-of-a-kind projects always cost more. But factories learn, supply chains mature, and the fifth and tenth unit get much cheaper. And one rule should be non-negotiable: **large new loads must pay their full cost.** Don't socialize private expansion onto Grandma's light bill.
If Amazon Web Services (AWS) wants to build billion-dollar data centers here, great--welcome to Mississippi--but AWS should pay the full cost for the lines, substations, and capacity it requires. Use special contracts and demand charges so growth isn't dumped onto retirees and small businesses
**Safety -** People hear "nuclear" and think disaster. The facts tell a different story. U.S. commercial nuclear plants have operated for generations with **no radiation deaths**. Modern SMR designs are **passively safe** --if something goes wrong, physics helps shut them down without operators having to save the day. The reactors are smaller, many with components located **underground** , wrapped in multiple layers of steel and concrete. Fuel is sealed. Emergency systems are redundant. Per unit of electricity, nuclear is among the **safest** energy sources we have. And unlike gas or coal, nuclear doesn't dump any pollution into the air our kids breathe. The waste is small in volume, contained, and tracked--handled like the hazardous material it is, not scattered across the sky.
**What the state should do now**
1. **Require every utility resource plan** to include a nuclear build option so SMRs compete head-to-head with gas, solar, and batteries on reliability and winter performance--not just today's sticker price.
2. **Pick a practical design** that uses standard low-enriched uranium fuel available now. Avoid exotic fuel bottlenecks.
3. **Pre-permit two brownfield sites** (water, seismic, interconnection studies) so we're ready when the market is.
4. **Protect ratepayers:** fixed-price contracts, milestone payments, independent schedule reviews, and special tariffs so big users cover their own costs.
5. **Build the workforce pipeline** through our community colleges with scholarships tied to in-state service.

This is conservative energy: reliable, clean, and accountable. No mandates. No sermons. Just power that works. Let's lead with quiet competence--start the site work, choose a sensible design, and build the first unit the right way so the next ones are faster and cheaper. Mississippi can keep the lights on, keep our air clean, and keep our freedom.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

I hope you had a restful holiday weekend. I’m kicking off the new month with great news: **My finance team crunched the numbers, and we hit our August online fundraising goal.** This is a testament to the power of this grassroots team. I’m proud to refuse money from Big Pharma and Big Oil – because I’m beholden to CA-45, not special interests. Now, I’m heading back to Washington to fight against the MAGA agenda in Congress. House Republicans are leaving working families out to dry. Instead of making life more affordable, they’d rather give their billionaire donors a tax break. I’m not backing down, and as one of the most at-risk incumbents in the House, it makes me even more of a target. clean_body: | = I hope you had a restful holiday weekend. I’m kicking off the new month with great news: My finance team crunched the numbers, and we hit our August online fundraising goal. This is a testament to the power of this grassroots team. I’m proud to refuse money from Big Pharma and Big Oil – because I’m beholden to CA-45, not special interests. Now, I’m heading back to Washington to fight against the MAGA agenda in Congress. House Republicans are leaving working families out to dry. Instead of making life more affordable, they’d rather give their billionaire donors a tax break. I’m not backing down, and as one of the most at-risk incumbents in the House, it makes me even more of a target. I’m doing everything I can to defend our communities, but we can’t hold the line – or flip the House – without the resources to stay in this fight. = Thank you, Derek | = | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Thank you, folks.
body:
|
#
Friend, I want to start with a heartfelt**thank you** for everything you did to power our campaign in August. Because of your support, we entered September with strong momentum – and I’m so grateful to have you with me. I just got back to DC, where Congress is back in session. As always, I’m focused on continuing to deliver real results for working families – lower costs, a level playing field, and freedom for all. I’ll have exciting updates to share with you soon about the work ahead and what we’re building together in MI-08. Coming out of Labor Day, I’ve been thinking a lot about the people who keep our communities strong – nurses, teachers, tradespeople, and so many others. Their hard work and perseverance inspire me, and they remind me why this fight matters. Thanks again for being part of this with me. I couldn’t do it without you. More soon, Kristen **P.S.** If you weren't able to get your contribution in before the end of last month, help us kick off September strong by chipping in $3 today. subject: First responders didn’t ask for praise, but deserve your support
body:
First responders go by a lot of names... But you and I know them by the one name they won’t call themselves: hero.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18684232/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YveU05QVluUkdabQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsamtCUzd3UA/qP2hpZHM9bmN4MUJ0WTRkc2JCQU5scw/gaLduHw/s6m3df4956a)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18684232/VaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vc2ItampqLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsamtCUzd3UA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1rZjI1MDYyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEzOTJfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWxvZ28/gaLduHw/scm06985ca3)
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18684232/VaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vc2ItampqLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsamtCUzd3UA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1rZjI1MDYyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEzOTJfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlMQ/gaLduHw/s6l05e85942)

Patriot,

First responders go by a lot of names...

... firefighter.
... paramedic.
... police officer.
... disaster response technician.
... border patrol agent.

**But you and I know them by the one name they won’t call themselves: hero.**

First responders are the hometown heroes who keep us safe. They go to work every day, even though that means confronting the worst situations imaginable. It’s what makes these men and women heroes. They know what they signed up for and do it anyway.

However, their service and sacrifice are almost always overlooked by the Radical Left.

It’s time to restore trust and honor to our first responders.

That’s why I wrote my latest book, _Behind the Badge_ , dedicated to telling their story.
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18684232/VaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vc2ItampqLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsamtCUzd3UA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1rZjI1MDYyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEzOTJfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlMg/gaLduHw/s1mb7da7e69)
I am also teaming up with the Kash Foundation to support our first responders and veterans.

While activists take cheap shots at our first responders, the Kash Foundation is restoring faith in their service, defending their dignity, and standing up for them when attacked by the media and activists.

[I believe in the mission of the Kash Foundation, and I am helping them raise money to support our veterans and first responders by raising $20,000 before the end of the month.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18684232/VaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vc2ItampqLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsamtCUzd3UA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1rZjI1MDYyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEzOTJfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazE/gaLduHw/s0rfe73f366)
[DONATE](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
I know these men and women. I grew up with them, and I served with them. I know the trauma they endure and the victories that they get to save lives every day.

**And it’s a shame the little thanks first responders get sometimes.**

The one thing they all have in common is that each one of them felt compelled to help their fellow citizens, regardless of the risk.

Too often, government officials are setting up our first responders to fail and being used as political punching bags for the Radical Left.

It’s time for you and me to protect them.

The Kash Foundation has been able to:
* Provide financial support and care for families of those who fall in the line of duty. They help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.
* Provide scholarships to the children of those who gave everything. They provide scholarships that help those kids, so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future.
* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, they help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

**Let’s let our first responders know that we have their backs!**

[Please show first responders that they have your support by donating any amount you can spare today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18684232/VaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vc2ItampqLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsamtCUzd3UA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1rZjI1MDYyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEzOTJfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazI/gaLduHw/s4qc0a18927)
[DONATE $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18684232/VaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vc2ItampqLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDI/LbmNsamtCUzd3UA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1rZjI1MDYyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEzOTJfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWFueV9idXR0b24x/gaLduHw/s4v6a8bbbc9)
You and I owe everything to our first responders. It’s time to make sure we have their backs, because they will always be there when we need them.

God Bless America,

Johnny “Joey” Jones

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Fit at 85
body:
META TAG (title): TheFederalistWire.com

META TAG (title): Untitled Document

Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Chuck Norris looks like THIS at 85...

And I recently got him to share his weird anti-aging routine in a short, never-before-seen video:

But please be warned, his answer will SHOCK you...

Because it's not a workout or diet plan. In fact, I'd be willing to bet you've never seen anything like this "fit at any age" routine.

It's perfectly easy to do – you can do it from your kitchen, living room, or wherever you're comfortable. And it takes just 30 seconds a day.

Yet Chuck says since he started doing this 1 thing, he feels BETTER than he did 30 years ago.

"I made just 1 change. I feel like I'm in my 50s!"*

If you want to get fit, have more energy, and stay active into your 60s, 70s, or 80s – click here now to discover Chuck's secret.

*Individual results will vary.

We hit our end-of-month fundraising goal for August, Peter.

_And we did it despite this being the time when most fundraising slows down._

We didn’t just survive the summer slump, **we beat it,** and it's all thanks to the energy, focus, and teamwork from supporters like you. I couldn’t be more proud of how far we've come, not just in August, but since we first launched this campaign.

Now, let’s use our momentum to set ourselves up to hit the ground running as we look ahead to September. September means it’s the end of the quarter, when our fundraising numbers become public and reflect the strength of this campaign. Anything we can do to get ahead will be critical. **Congress should work for the people — not their stock portfolios.**
That’s why Senator Gillibrand has led the charge for years to end the corruption and self-dealing that puts personal profit ahead of public trust.
Just weeks ago, a bipartisan bill to ban congressional stock trading advanced out of committee for the very first time. **But then Donald Trump stepped in — and nearly every Republican voted to kill it. Thankfully, they were unsuccessful, and the bill still has a fighting chance.**
**This fact remains: the GOP chose themselves over the American people.**
This fight is about more than stock trades. It’s about trust, accountability and building a government that puts people first. The public is on our side — but we need to prove it with a massive show of grassroots strength.

clean_body: We’re building overwhelming grassroots pressure to ban stock trading in Congress. Take the poll today and show where you stand. We’re calling on you right now: | | | | | Congress should work for the people — not their stock portfolios. That’s why Senator Gillibrand has led the charge for years to end the corruption and self-dealing that puts personal profit ahead of public trust. Just weeks ago, a bipartisan bill to ban congressional stock trading advanced out of committee for the very first time. But then Donald Trump stepped in — and nearly every Republican voted to kill it. Thankfully, they were unsuccessful, and the bill still has a fighting chance. This fact remains: the GOP chose themselves over the American people. This fight is about more than stock trades. It’s about trust, accountability and building a government that puts people first. The public is on our side — but we need to prove it with a massive show of grassroots strength. We need to know where you stand. | | | | Together, Team Gillibrand * =

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Congress is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Trump needs Congress to keep his DC takeover going. | |
---
Peter, **Trump already has the Supreme Court on his side. Now he just needs Congress.** In an unprecedented move, Trump used the _Home Rule Act_ to take over the nation’s capital and create an authoritarian police state. **That was almost a month ago—and his authority expires after 30 days.** Now that Congress is back, he needs them to authorize a wide-ranging “crime” bill that would give him the power to plot authoritarian takeovers across the country. **The MAGA justices on the Supreme Court have given Trump the green light to act like a dictator. Now, it’s up to Congress to step up and do their jobs.** [**Tell Congress: Reject Trump’s permanent DC takeover. Don’t give him the power to create a police state in our cities nationwide.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39hibSOAWFjMlolZNRsUp16ZQCXjIjth0V9eFl7EN0eqKbSONAVaPJFSoBOsVj4suvCpihDAt-04P8jH5YonglIdXBOVuJ3ArZUHEYSB0K1M_lUNYCX-17qHG9LTCfDvwE8EWL-KMoBox394H9mkuSSob9SsnKXLknhGiy8DFA-peIcDK3viccQJ2y-o6k-20ZprFFvhBvGfn1sS_3U42dPF3bIAfx-X5t-1jKpbG0_bUm_ClDkIwDSaOutxdLlRxjZFVZt_QoV0BQjEFMbguJupbIw7LrVKCVeaPb6_fTfvwfZbuBDB6jL4D9GdNiPo_yYWR-giOWW5G3umi3x5NGWHUr_h8oo-NEW0ikvXHSm7xXU1A942yYeB-YxQBTQ8CkBspll2coEqNUf6f10KLtnO3iQLkuvcGqfVk0Ug-nLu2vAsiK7cSZsv3omaxOdL4M/4jk/hXJ-OOErSMK1Z3CYAm0YFA/h0/h001.rCGmcKEqfIp0WNtF7EJ-r4ykp9YfaKDPqeB2NHxyvw0) [SIGN & SEND](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39hibSOAWFjMlolZNRsUp16ZQCXjIjth0V9eFl7EN0eqKbSONAVaPJFSoBOsVj4suvCpihDAt-04P8jH5YonglIdXBOVuJ3ArZUHEYSB0K1M_lUNYCX-17qHG9LTCfDvwE8EWL-KMoBox394H9mkuSSob9SsnKXLknhGiy8DFA-peIcDK3viccQJ2y-o6k-20ZprFFvhBvGfn1sS_3U42dPF3bIAfx-X5t-1jKpbG0_bRGIGxcpAGXpxY7lBGTeNDknIFHmFEZ-hNR2C_NCxIDYsdjw0YrPp-ztQtSlVGA6PsdcxW_DUMSFa3v7MYawy1RUy1-bXnoV46K8ZclYAfFxTaG_i6RhitDZaa7TdX-kHmddr11GIYeBcdNkqnx98S324HBdA5gUfCj08i9c3oukq3IP52GfNnpvdgZYiQ1-PMlX_zdh9Kt8Gkz9X9EN5hs/4jk/hXJ-OOErSMK1Z3CYAm0YFA/h1/h001.h0xa5DdCXSw7_kBiKslWMTISbw1WQkCghysVPDElrGc) **Let’s be very clear. Trump’s DC takeover isn’t about reducing crime, as he claims.** In fact, the crime rate in DC recently dropped to a 30-year low The Supreme Court is looking the other way while he abuses a law meant for emergencies. They’ve told him he can take illegal actions while lower courts deliberate. And they’ve given him unprecedented executive power. We know that he doesn’t just want to expand his DC takeover. **He wants to take his authoritarian police state to Baltimore, Chicago, Los Angeles, and beyond.** The “crime” bill before Congress would allow him to bypass mayors, city councils, and governors across the United States. [**Tell Congress to stop Trump’s authoritarian takeover in its tracks. Tell them to reject Trump’s request to extend the DC takeover beyond the 30 days and any attempt to give him the same power nationwide now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39hibSOAWFjMlolZNRsUp16ZQCXjIjth0V9eFl7EN0eqKbSONAVaPJFSoBOsVj4suvCpihDAt-04P8jH5YonglIdXBOVuJ3ArZUHEYSB0K1M_lUNYCX-17qHG9LTCfDvwE8EWL-KMoBox394H9mkuSSob9SsnKXLknhGiy8DFA-peIcDK3viccQJ2y-o6k-20ZprFFvhBvGfn1sS_3U42dPF3bIAfx-X5t-1jKpbG0_bdIUeJNUjASx6ajEed5lwoqKzkLyHFp35lWCpXkjql4RUftcUbFk9KRqsVmdTy-QUUtABK0mqVv1GHqBrQjgXUtlB9DQtG4c0ezzbYL3ScavIS4XV6XyRiIMRXWKlMxr571skUkOrOfDvBPHTdZ-Kf67JiUzLJ9UGi5xG-8be5AJ7DZ77S5l_ajxlyWP74KweIauBuPg1888PE90Mlr79v0/4jk/hXJ-OOErSMK1Z3CYAm0YFA/h2/h001.oErTRMvFOOdX0QnqlF2Os-7PpiBpN0Lzi6s19MfN6ec) Thank you for standing up to authoritarianism, Morgan Stahr

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=44249c58961348e8a1bb20494444b7d3&_e=_mUJMvbiDwGm9qhNLsJPqJUN2Y2AwYHJDabvuNsYdwxcabU_iCAgbpIdUQSncN-fhLC6fbonkoX8aPlnb3oiWt3n4MvdAy7oa9vfr3DfaK1CHOo7VnLzrH5zcTqugRswakO9V9DVu1fS5oAbtFGxT5UGrncXp038pOmOgq6xeIxOPHUwX81x37dnPG0W8HR3xoVaZ2UUYniYQ1YFZ35BZw7OIqoP2LNf7yXF4lQ5hyYMLcoWu2O52i5IkmEcHkXM6YkhGe8U1mW03WDYnqIwt2VoKemPNhnv2OVFwyBoY_QUC5dL-naCpnrm5-deM7fcaBSmqV-a-tqZqzd-BWam3HNl5B2c9s9N4xjfr8k9h8Z7mh7IBW_VwqOVjNA0tqh01Sr4SNkj2AajAaGY4iAGYpHtTjbZpsJP8hDi_0Wd_crBeQGnWYfVeQmjktI2VfiPRh3xZNKZ7Ogdr-ftWhf5m9qp7Ut1YdRLk-TYuxqfxlbOIwVn0mBSbxMfyFHv8NZqFCAqoEpangsuWwa3JlOwzWeQy50Kyf2wYFfk9U3iFfiV1u-eaiVgz9byA1kWOeIn612fQo5XkIeq1Hsuwe19fUjnbigdY_gqgWvGTNGQN44fi5_01zzmaZz7o7YuDUrXVZPT6-eYBetGX1Svj51mQQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=44249c58961348e8a1bb20494444b7d3&_e=_mUJMvbiDwGm9qhNLsJPqJUN2Y2AwYHJDabvuNsYdwxcabU_iCAgbpIdUQSncN-fhLC6fbonkoX8aPlnb3oiWt3n4MvdAy7oa9vfr3DfaK1CHOo7VnLzrH5zcTqugRswakO9V9DVu1fS5oAbtFGxT5UGrncXp038pOmOgq6xeIxOPHUwX81x37dnPG0W8HR3xoVaZ2UUYniYQ1YFZ35BZ01-maDgtsNB_gvsopSD7bT16X5laq4uC8KW2keI5n--sNhX279wdC8NNDamQ08AH8Uutfk8lFb4bMqGIaAQ1_lBzNkoBTA5d8MyswIwRTAoUFZyU6UXP0N1Urx7PGbt1Mf8CV8IL7m2DMyQbSyTjhTjO51EUfqcLs6P7jNYdh4zhOVA1eqqnYVMxSL5q2lAnd6gfDvO3tqsOjrAJYkAHFDxxrQeOH2rZWSeGLlUmNMiia1EM8wak2yvEYXRj4klsLQ8DWlxlauNJWhGjBHh6VSseXpVTm9nPjCZ-hnraszyW250HYl5FF3MX3cRgH4YfNSHBojCuIplcpWXFdlAVr2l4wDuTMwRN8UtMisf9baFYs_q5G8shorOG3__7zEAtYdRUMxFFqk-zXnXMxBDG1sdhnAZHvhmRU825qIAN02CQ5xIgEzmuXcX0euK_QfyTg%3D%3D)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---

clean_body: My last chance. My Hail Mary. | Friend, Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice... As a matter of fact, it’s my last resort. You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – and KNOW – was RIGHT. The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! No viable pardon from the President. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill. But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. ...And we’re nearly there! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Wes Moore
subject: Donald Trump is losing sleep over me.
body:
While I have his attention, I’d like to offer the president some free advice.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=548%2E1086043%2EYaAxPx)
Peter, the President of the United States can’t seem to keep my name out of his mouth.
First, he spouted off a bunch of lies about Maryland on Truth Social. And just last week, he attacked me again from the Oval Office.
**So while I have his attention, I’d like to offer the president some free advice:**
Instead of losing sleep over me, why don’t you worry about serving the American people?_
Instead of focusing on me, focus on things that actually matter right now. Focus on the fact that your economic policies are driving up the costs of everything – from our electricity to the clothes that we’re wearing to the food we eat.
Instead of talking about me, let’s talk about the fact that your policies are knocking hundreds _of thousands of_ Marylanders off their health care.
That’s my advice for Donald Trump. Don't worry about me. Worry about doing the job you were elected to do. That’s what public service is about.
**[No matter how many times Trump tries to attack me or spread lies about our progress, I’ll always stay focused on doing right by the people of Maryland. Peter, if you have my back in this fight, will you donate $5 right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250902-2?refcode=em-20250902-2&refcode2=548_1086043_YaAxPx&akid=548%2E1086043%2EYaAxPx)**

Elevate,
Wes

**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250902-2&t=2&refcode2=548_1086043_YaAxPx&akid=548%2E1086043%2EYaAxPx)**

name: Tobias Read
subject: President Trump wants to end voting by mail. My state won’t give it up easily >>
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250828em-msnbc-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250828em-msnbc-pet-rs]
Hi, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I just published a major op-ed in MSNBC because I feel a responsibility to speak out as Oregon’s top elections official.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250826em-msnbc-pet [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250826em-msnbc-pet]
Here’s what's going on:
* Oregon has run all of its elections through the mail for more than 25 years.

* Voting by mail is safe, fair, accurate — and voters across the political spectrum love it.

* Fraud is essentially nonexistent. Ballots are verified with forensic signature matching and overseen by bipartisan boards.

* Last fall, more than 75% of Oregonians cast a ballot — one of the highest participation rates in the country.

President Trump has threatened to eliminate it altogether through executive order. That would be unconstitutional, costly, and dangerous for our democracy.
I made it clear in my MSNBC article: If Congress and the president want to make our elections more secure, they should be expanding vote-by-mail, not shutting it down. And if President Trump tries to impose his executive order, Oregon is prepared to challenge it in court.
But I need the power of the people on my side. Will you add your name today to stand with me and defend vote-by-mail? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/auG4lmiVq06681BB7gmzfw2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/auG4lmiVq06681BB7gmzfw2]
Together, we can send a powerful message: our democracy belongs to the people, not to presidents who want to undermine it for political gain.
More to come,
Tobias Read
P.S. You can read my op-ed here [https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/trump-vote-mail-executive-order-oregon-rcna226337] , and please share it with your friends and networks >>
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250826em-msnbc-pet]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=xrZXytk9GFkaDDuPR52%2B95dX4VHS%2Fv%2FzsDAVT3J0JEyTxCW4VpkYVu%2FhrsgwGLEuMBODmqa9xyqG9BKKXNScT%2FZfnx5mHJUTT1X%2B7In%2FfVPjozqlCeBeOYRDVP1Sdbg4O1j7YhNVDc9tS4jGEWXeR%2BzqSYE9kDH0LB9EHRZ6X2nbU2KVyH2QTPZU6J5I7UE9ThpFo3VDfAFNVrrx%2BMhwnP%2B1FFszc45r0XjliUM03niSKa3WumvoUuH%2FGDutZ3SeIEAD62PW8AIW6NLZU79Y3DcjGcWB6L0eIgjCezp8yNbLcuH1lioQidFW5Bkw12VbHGgCF33z6nhVUIbbXpcBuBh2vodK32cH3CFw8ZufF2fDlL%2BMuYA%2BLvTO32OfCKQkV3cAuUQLffO1%2FlRwLuVPFrDL02tXzOfBVsiy3wkhJBh8bTFyKU0UnEonZ1yAxJny .

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We did it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Last week my whole team and I were working hard to reach our August fundraising goal.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250902-5398-footer&t=1&akid=5398%2E420207%2ErFPPaE)
Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter!
Last week my whole team and I were working hard to reach our August fundraising goal. **And I’m glad to report that with the help of this grassroots team, we did it.**
I don’t take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists because I’m not fighting for giant corporations and billionaires in Congress. This campaign is powered by working people like you because I’m _fighting_ for people like you.
Every donation that comes in, no matter how big or small, means the world to me.
It’s because of those grassroots donations that we’re able to organize year-round and grow the resistance against Trump’s MAGA authoritarian agenda.
It’s clear to all of us that these are challenging times for our democracy. But when ordinary people come together and resist, we can make a big difference together.
**So thank you again for your support in August.[If you’d like to help us get a head start on our goal for September, you can chip in $3 or any amount that works for you at this link.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250902-1?refcode=em20250902-5398&amount=3&refcode2=5398_420207_rFPPaE&akid=5398%2E420207%2ErFPPaE)**

In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:

name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: Even more candidates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We expect even more candidates to jump into the California governor’s race—and that makes this moment even more important.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40101%2E3422442%2ENDhutK)
Peter,
Even more candidates could jump into the California governor’s race—and that makes this moment even more important.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250902_1_ak?refcode=em20250902-40101&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40101_3422442_NDhutK&akid=40101%2E3422442%2ENDhutK)
Katie is never one for BS, so we’ll be honest—this race won’t be a walk in the park. With Governor Newsom term-limited, _more candidates are considering campaigns_ in an already crowded field—including billionaires who might spend millions on their campaign.
**Here’s good news: Katie Porter is the Democratic frontrunner** —with multiple polls showing her with a big lead and gaining support faster than anyone else.
But this race is far from settled. We need to make sure Katie has the grassroots resources she needs to _not just hold her lead, but grow it—all the way through Election Day._
**[Peter, can you chip in $5 today to help elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor? Every contribution will make a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250902_1_ak?refcode=em20250902-40101&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40101_3422442_NDhutK&akid=40101%2E3422442%2ENDhutK)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250902_1_ak?refcode=em20250902-40101&refcode2=40101_3422442_NDhutK&akid=40101%2E3422442%2ENDhutK)
Thank you so much for your support,
Team Katie Porter for Governor

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250902-40101&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40101_3422442_NDhutK&akid=40101%2E3422442%2ENDhutK)**

Katie is never one for BS, so we’ll be honest—this race won’t be a walk in the park. With Governor Newsom term-limited, more candidates are considering campaigns in an already crowded field—including billionaires who might spend millions on their campaign. Here’s good news: Katie Porter is the Democratic frontrunner —with multiple polls showing her with a big lead and gaining support faster than anyone else. But this race is far from settled. We need to make sure Katie has the grassroots resources she needs to not just hold her lead, but grow it—all the way through Election Day. Thank you so much for your support, Team Katie Porter for Governor Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Randy Villegas
subject: Thank you for powering this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress [#]
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/117525/images/Villegas%20Logo.png]
Hi there,

I just want to take a moment to say thank you.

Over the last few days, supporters from across the Central Valley and the country came together to power this grassroots campaign through one of our biggest tests yet. Because of you, we closed out August stronger than we started.

Running a corporate-free campaign isn’t easy, but it’s the right way. Every step of the way, I’m reminded that this movement is built by people who believe our community deserves real representation in Washington.

The support we saw at the end of August is driving us forward with real momentum into September.

This month will bring new challenges, but I know we’re ready because of the strength of this movement.

I’m humbled and grateful to be in this fight with you.

Thank you for believing in me,

Randy Villegas
