**** Dear Defender of Truth, Women shouldn't have to share locker rooms with men. They shouldn't have to compete against male athletes. And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth.

But across America, that's exactly what's happening.

Men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety.

Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--_State of West Virginia v. B.P.J._ and _Little v. Hecox_ --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide.

This could be a watershed moment in the fight to protect biological reality and fairness.

If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today.

[Sign the Declaration on Women’s Sports »](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/bZ_6_8gZpJmYbme_ZI9BcPrluZlBCe-DUywa78uiQwqKk9r6uQw2PSP0mPKXHaU_ahN_EUeOjo0wP0gk9Lu2WdX5B-OpaK3eJI2XRHc5rNR8tn8iVYI-852J99xP7V85TS5LNOQi2FibgCxQodiTz-zql_2zYBGK6ci7o5OYCRRQ11LW2I8v4-YgPChnGDN-9-ZfgCtaISHz12BToVOxbyY45bQmEw8LS1MRnv9GLGq_9vXtUcgAgdCpHTufvIlG2JRcze_xVMN5YXc6TWSM0JS015393IXdSgAHcDQNi88Q9GFa8a4E3mev30MEiwkK9mr-LMFW9hn9oHLV03YuQovFc1LaCNEwP9mAPsY3NmlloWiM1wUxyJb-G1MMSfTB4ZG_H_wVqwkpXstGCAeg2Pa7Vyj2GsZpi2yHFzB3hwQLHxgtMV9zxMlL0-qzLnmU_2tUIokyO7xzL0HvaahMvYZgnTxBLiJGkP1TH3bcLP_DZN5fWZwCEX94TC1J2KN0sjZWolpBQ9Yy5COHE7yxupUN8lbiHkEMLwWXwzNeJ5vGyHg9OHGt4N1tcKJaIl09sJQkbjAS5cW1XJQFlpS-gAF9nANiKI-zQyZ9_rNcaA9-bWprfoGcHy7wcKcfnem9OaNGxYH02wE33KVwabcUUmHS4P9rYe6FOSxECb-TCuUTJeSqWOmpqtRgLFM22r2gOLQxxMyuKe8lBAmxY0oCLzpaeya7LS4AS2Ad3w9S3qEDGDK3PtiZWKgucMEC/UG5su-azPoHG8ThEqoufmbYWw-ZyzbhI/12)

Your signature will say clearly:
✅ Men should not be allowed to compete on women's teams
✅ Women deserve privacy, fairness, and safety
✅ Radical gender ideology must not ignore biological truth

After you sign, you'll be taken to the next critical step...

Make a gift to support female athletes like Lainey Armistead, a courageous former college soccer player who is helping defend her state's Save Women's Sports Act in court.

Your gift of any amount will help Alliance Defending Freedom stand strong at the Supreme Court--at no cost to our clients.

🚨 We've won 16 cases at the Supreme Court since 2011. With your help, and God's blessing, we can win again.

Please add your name now--and then take the next bold step to protect women's sports with a generous gift.

[Add your name and make your gift »](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/bspbHzVC3qxugT9qQBJIoXOsRXvP9NM7wBL_iB1nP-QM5-2VEKuFprkZBA10yz5PQ4mmyWWqRdpabIzOAwuYkQM5sMub2ieb6fnzPplYhgdvOpMQeznhOd9qnJykC5ASGMlznVqyQ9ZPa9V21MyMMVTKaxNNyo2wwMZbS06p0W4rnmuKiJz_2Notw78hOZMPPmSXMoVSbFmyE8B_B6YjbmOb3EtA7T21qVTmb1QFeF19Dvnhv1w3X0H8Mel3KSO9dn1MGODQBTMlJ9AQ2c0bhNkRaDaYPw7DWX_RavNSaap8xexUFNKI7cU0dawel66M2l_F84cXNHume4XxFq8Qr_P5oswelhFJDvHCaSUjaaRWFFWnUEyZr9uU1Ygx3bPgaLouc0xjmtOBeJ4QMRgrGC2q7bJbA82BB4iJMYwinjQcZWnTnr0rhM70XhRgB3h16uZTfIDzFdBMZLb0Oam4Jr363xfWDR-oOAdRhzLRZlOA3vxINj_u_VUD3bP0PsWlfIS2onjyXTX-mwsl6-pWZcUmm9ei7Tlo4CfcOJRwctinXikKESN4jZHkcUC5Vpb4ZRD-WgpOxozSynzwK6ivnA9NNEyxp0il7URi8DOTfx8aHpa0rnlDD6lPI3-3xM8evz4orXkq_xM4wg_JbhwWhc2NNOjUuO5UCxsodie7Jj-dtBoBiwv7IGaRf4LI6EgVfX5hjVgzMwMAyn9Fhz3kSiFCD7WlP5ngAed-pdSHMuzE9w79YnerkSTng5oN/5Jj6G7ulI_rBOopKcltrE4w-DbFue432/12)

Together, we can ensure every girl has a fair opportunity to play--and win--on a level playing field.

Thank you for standing for truth. With gratitude, **Suzanne** **Beecher**
Legal Counsel [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/fCbZdmeVBrxIXuIzxl816F_qecdg1kC9SFpqd4grIzJJNjPAi9rm-LoRJaXcAwe8PC6cc31qh1g0Z9jYyjf1n9mcww7RKA7gFyqfj37d-y5CMiY3-sd6yAHvFPH-9NXfQfmk0b0JErcnrBBiChzCuo8GguXoOxcZuHq9d90CUIJWGKfYUdh8VNOqv7Zvs2P1sX9IFIS6i0x423X_SDUmKVk9ms3WjyuQUopQizN1H9FQ7geh94UtAjnuxEMk5e2ZlfKMOcNTjB6WpnkmRtV7H5Vyh8oQneRWVLVfcbGzZm48JCWYQCA9_v7c9b-BPQ6zeFZZXVfM0y1zofNQHKZ2KXeJ98YNnjH5ll229A8UHo-IClS5chZp6thpBiuGRmPX7qSrJV8fhw4n7zFwx-sY92XVbfU6HwGSfpu6esqiVxgfnp-eSrn3jcNCU18fjdC3tIbeITgdJ9Q8gIIeE0q6iDjUTkAsZh909DR7K1jBy9LoS_8nA3pMXPoeXCS1mrgD_Do2M18aZUdkpJymvGee9KhtRLIyPUfE_Ebe8OhcGrYP400S2QMrnS3np15E_EHMvNK7TVrnwm8fewoNakPcXw43TJUTaTi1F8CTh3LHv3V5aeAXk21-SWtN_FQPLoYIXTw0j1LuA92514UFEFQn5nq94-JrPc3P8lkqTaPPZFSTk12GJdybCtMzDZGhSboP7vtO8xAOXMSQZ3uKnXVZRdogzdFBamaaB0yiwf0i5UK4Pr_kUAu2C6Ie2D7g/_2hupRQH_039t9gdN2KCisTBGSiMkyn9/12)

subject: a federal takeover of elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114493594/567202603/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhiMDI4ZS01MDg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XtAoSqt69jwvfiEkSC8K8kYmPFT6BLz12FLDlPCLsfc=)
Friend, Donald Trump’s Department of Justice is demanding states turn over election data – including entire voter rolls. | ****
**Trump’s DOJ wants states to turn over voter lists, election info**
---
So far, over a dozen states – including most battleground states – have received sweeping requests for sensitive election materials.
States like Colorado, Arizona, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Nevada, Maine, and New Hampshire have received these requests.
**Let’s call this what it is, friend: a federal takeover of elections, grounded in conspiracy theories and designed to intimidate election officials.**
This isn’t about “election integrity.” It’s about Donald Trump laying the groundwork to discredit the 2026 and 2028 elections – just like he did in 2020.
Even Republican election officials are pushing back, refusing to cooperate and warning that these demands are dangerous and unprecedented.
At DASS, we’re preparing to fight back – but we need your help today.
[**Our DASS Legal Fund is working to defend states, protect voter privacy, and stop Trump’s DOJ in its tracks. But legal action is expensive, and the window to act is narrowing. Can you chip in $20 to fund these efforts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114493595/567202613/957523928?refcode=em-9.2.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhiMDI4ZS01MDg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XtAoSqt69jwvfiEkSC8K8kYmPFT6BLz12FLDlPCLsfc=)

Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself. Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Please - Allow me to reintroduce myself, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
I've been called husband, father, Coach, and Senator. Now, I'm running to be Governor.
|
---
Peter,

It's me, Tommy Tuberville.

Throughout my life, I've been called many names. Whether it's Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I've always led by example for those who depend on me. By the end of next year, I'm hoping you'll be able to call me Governor, too.

**This email is a little longer, but it's worth your time.** [**I’m humbly asking you to read it through and consider donating to my campaign for Alabama’s next Governor when you’re finished.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9c99346017034878a14ecdfd704399fe&_e=oBqb3RxYvHDL-2owGougviN30Ci5nu91T4gcukQ8sXUC-2XqyzAgeGsWKPlqJWFutnuhzjLSzosvOFI-q8ycn7bpfqst150R8nBCJO79A3EIqbcqFfYCDCbPdm02BSb-QMAe6HqSotCSX51_IoWyc58VWBQl3kp9X42__zxQWvNkSWY-TZxfEiEdXQwuYmuXCgOgRwL_zrMDYTIV09-UoarCGk8niJ_-s22PgZPGo49Eyh_SYH8-O5MRo2ddBEv13UGjxaNIisUBxLXo7RRYIfEr4Ebz8I3mpcDKDfTWYbE8vA1EDlDYgQBcSr3AqXo_Nor0TmJJPiol04xfIvEtQuRLSIUOl2IuQ9c8RUkWK5k3ZjvsjqGxy1O8uV_Wqk2YPjcAb7QlGq9Yme9tzpMuhZ1chWBvXHLIcB43uCUyFr7qcRwALs3_1fEy1zpGa-CLhW9L3EeZIe3eQMo4byEh4KlqPgV-hLJRprXeBlLPtSS23F7ZtfbotQwnormH_1wOdIz_KiC0M6gh5U6Y64TO15ODgkDb9s0sxguSNtiIe4P8S3bn0WEleOL7WIiqajtC)

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9c99346017034878a14ecdfd704399fe&_e=oBqb3RxYvHDL-2owGougviN30Ci5nu91T4gcukQ8sXUC-2XqyzAgeGsWKPlqJWFutnuhzjLSzosvOFI-q8ycn7bpfqst150R8nBCJO79A3EIqbcqFfYCDCbPdm02BSb-QMAe6HqSotCSX51_IoWyc58VWBQl3kp9X42__zxQWvNkSWY-TZxfEiEdXQwuYmuXw5ypUTxkzyj05D35Z5b0stEzvYSMxK4E1jkNidhh6pXW7MZiHwerKpm4_GL0aumnSNy0xzeMOGwRD_lSwPhDAhikz5KJo-H_eSCgV7iqkNk08VVXsMv9latOtTkUpJbRY8TYeDR-Cox9xjRDuiUoNModvqNl-l8gNtZCQmyR3a5n3WcB968TOCbpx7bgaXSPidjek2hM4OHWO4ppmi3O7i3t6HDALF_d71hcjrFo9LGzG56wkE3m23bmjZEr35y_TYVU58qXNa4VSA6ej7SY37NecfHcvdjoSKb_FWTrcWD8KbMV1EZ82E-XS4hlbVLTTBsHM9vjvQ5KNPeObHy-43KT4V45rTIj6qqAJ8F6ecWmj44Ow_oTg_l_jhxRBuC9)
I was born in Camden, Arkansas, as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to consistently work hard and stand on principle, which I've brought with me every step of my life.

I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married three years later and have two amazing children, Tucker and Troy. _**They continue to make me proud every single day.**_

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9c99346017034878a14ecdfd704399fe&_e=oBqb3RxYvHDL-2owGougviN30Ci5nu91T4gcukQ8sXUC-2XqyzAgeGsWKPlqJWFutnuhzjLSzosvOFI-q8ycn7bpfqst150R8nBCJO79A3EIqbcqFfYCDCbPdm02BSb-QMAe6HqSotCSX51_IoWyc58VWBQl3kp9X42__zxQWvNkSWY-TZxfEiEdXQwuYmuX0NswP2IxJzsKpAxUnN2QOFw1nfAm57IGioVXlLiP4YZCaUEaOMwBn6wGjOJix4XDWX7zPfZxTJsMyAL76f_60nq2AHGhidRQjz298A7x_dwP06WylM3m8CoEqm4_PivNZgCEpKraGPQOOvtte0mAQO8zzN9v_vHgwqDQ1Cshd0qBBPyuSf87HCVNK38B182CQXCkaUqHwgRY6VNwO7SDLKVHTRywSOzNUbiXg12XJHSXONAsL5Vy1H8fLqbWlm2W8bG5Srl9O0zsJDdLV7ayAdfwSDHaEQP0yMA5k1tI2wOJyWXBT8bAbhgGtzPtVzOL6NsCPMFOISxAkW_P452xveBQ-ZLv9urH2XslCOEWthvIOYTo54AVB5LUGpWsuL1V)
After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University.

Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9c99346017034878a14ecdfd704399fe&_e=oBqb3RxYvHDL-2owGougviN30Ci5nu91T4gcukQ8sXUC-2XqyzAgeGsWKPlqJWFutnuhzjLSzosvOFI-q8ycn7bpfqst150R8nBCJO79A3EIqbcqFfYCDCbPdm02BSb-QMAe6HqSotCSX51_IoWyc58VWBQl3kp9X42__zxQWvNkSWY-TZxfEiEdXQwuYmuX4ZvqIu6KdDR6S_Noc4aWsmTiN1bFuoBr-czRZnNfMbQWE50WDb59FihrKvs_mH-e9JL3chZGd0GWAYljLdGsNGD07SBeiOHlPzdHjvH6LRHQIu8ZIQGw365kLlmFv1qkmwjjiQtpeB3A7NFVOy5BMofdiCxDW_rNh33gmEln7z8BDXrvVGIDqknaeazKjfbWZTMCKRyjE4K7j8YHwzyhdxUyGz0yWmEtv_H5rTUxYec1doJ1IALkPMS1Jt3sp62wb6xGA-BeB5r6IFNef5vNPbvuLEChWjBl_Ys9pYFn4u4fdgglfwXjQeEu0lglPpezMrhOkrCb5rODC6m2mdWnozuReMikK9EAcaibeaZWKFhLLWcqcLIAEc61qrCJh7Vj)
I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards.

I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn't done winning just yet.

**In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won.**

**Throughout my time in Washington, D.C., I 've fought nonstop on President Trump's behalf.** Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts, challenging the Biden-Harris Administration's Radical and harmful policies, or working with President Trump to secure our border, protect women in sports, and make our military prioritize readiness over wokeness, I always worked hard. I stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9c99346017034878a14ecdfd704399fe&_e=oBqb3RxYvHDL-2owGougviN30Ci5nu91T4gcukQ8sXUC-2XqyzAgeGsWKPlqJWFutnuhzjLSzosvOFI-q8ycn7bpfqst150R8nBCJO79A3EIqbcqFfYCDCbPdm02BSb-QMAe6HqSotCSX51_IoWyc58VWBQl3kp9X42__zxQWvNkSWY-TZxfEiEdXQwuYmuXvmEvbDn3CHdKaBErPH61g_nRO2_Pcg7SW8m-istxgNCAHnc7F8gUCYVEuGsOj-D9hPBhubhAYdSOsEkXpi-8iYs7V6yVqCPkgJE9T7I0IINNHBK3FuKjTKDXOk6eWo6Kwe_sSJkydUWM38z_SMmXNVT6U4gRLv1jUAei823mEAvlNhOpE0ug96lBAEHcB3jCfgnxdPgeoXsIkMiNgmsTMjqdfWdtE6dhOS3jdXdRhcW4KEdpqoKSvydWLqzMLkSTf8fYy62IfhuZ9RUEsI0CyZg1Vjsi30AhHmta9CghobagOUmVAUXxbJfTFLkDgxQds61Ou4IKqIhRhPVLuh6oqg4fO8YOQduEPCN3rv1mrKR7p1QO8SKl0iPQyms21HYE)
**Now, I 'm running for Governor in Alabama so I can continue making an impact for my community back home.**

The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top gubernatorial targets to defeat in 2026. They're going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it's this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0.

**I 'm looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a political candidate, and I need your help to do so.**

[**Peter, can you chip in just $10 before midnight to give my campaign the resources we need to defeat the Radical Left and protect America First Alabamian values?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9c99346017034878a14ecdfd704399fe&_e=oBqb3RxYvHDL-2owGougviN30Ci5nu91T4gcukQ8sXUC-2XqyzAgeGsWKPlqJWFutnuhzjLSzosvOFI-q8ycn7bpfqst150R8nBCJO79A3EIqbcqFfYCDCbPdm02BSb-QMAe6HqSotCSX51_IoWyc58VWBQl3kp9X42__zxQWvNkSWY-TZxfEiEdXQwuYmuXgNZ6oWlamhxNSOXlnnCSR1hKTd2k4WzmvQB78QA3bY4qIJMIUDIMGAg_gJ_efu1f3Ve8V-EhEkILV4hALD00rlzMrBDvBUKfHR7YRYb0sMs7Y3yviKTuC2F982nOVLPGfXqdgXJUpANUOp7duy_Qtv3xjQjXnK6at0fau0AjoTvWiPMSzY09Bd1eMKN9144N2hB12TXdbYdAORoDIcdlNV5z16NosQqw6vpCBchWAip5EuQvcJq4PAwdixxhr-9aeFtL2kQBhGQtUuoh7frwOdHtJrSzUwmfYtFFuIjXYV6JURxhVev8lHug2YjyivwLczO51UF_kqyt1jwmHRvw1yDwVAjko5mwunNsx09ZtnXKAgLZ5cQSYmKdA-P-EFyS)

I won't take up more of your time.

[**Thank you for reading this all the way through, and please consider donating any amount to help!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9c99346017034878a14ecdfd704399fe&_e=oBqb3RxYvHDL-2owGougviN30Ci5nu91T4gcukQ8sXUC-2XqyzAgeGsWKPlqJWFutnuhzjLSzosvOFI-q8ycn7bpfqst150R8nBCJO79A3EIqbcqFfYCDCbPdm02BSb-QMAe6HqSotCSX51_IoWyc58VWBQl3kp9X42__zxQWvNkSWY-TZxfEiEdXQwuYmuXrb60sGDMfEH7Cb2QcJd9wYffRG5x0_k0flm8VxIf0SBZHY6-HfV6z-xdouy4Q2wwqAeEzued_t-I5xlPD3gJJN0zH6W7OYhepyY8ybvb0ztaYbHHYj32qrL9iVkydcli-UsYsYnMfsnWCuEIb1hkCc5Fg5QHQ-XuPA9Ejj4un4DklVKlkHxFcBvPLATpKfAbf0EloCDzE6AROAUMGyVxypSmsSvYqEvWAFzXlsRLLNl4v42sOhFI9-WhLJWmpmRATdhQVKTLdA41q9CYrbSTDxtiPWMp5RoVRA9qanQP2psbnquYxuvA1a2gjj474vkAYDXLiDeNtgMZP9rBQKNNy6DPIlochyPidnSEGa3DFkeWccpfb2qOoHTcKndvKAUn)

Best,
_Coach Tommy Tuberville_

| [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9c99346017034878a14ecdfd704399fe&_e=oBqb3RxYvHDL-2owGougviN30Ci5nu91T4gcukQ8sXUC-2XqyzAgeGsWKPlqJWFutnuhzjLSzosvOFI-q8ycn7bpfqst150R8nBCJO79A3EIqbcqFfYCDCbPdm02BSb-QMAe6HqSotCSX51_IoWyc58VWBQl3kp9X42__zxQWvNkSWY-TZxfEiEdXQwuYmuX6lwN-RQL2NforVh69DOHJ1mH0mry0olihQX4cppjrtGTVjL-7AbiNpY9ozOTfzXUJsDLSBCZ8tX95PCUqnXv1rPceHsEYo23unP214Jf6DTrUpcOz_5Ch9lb_xuu_t7Osc6z3Q5tnGRJkAWDR6KErMm3b3QXfDGtG_6qj0B7C-Hfzr1nhA47_vSP9TN3_yFDfQkQVBl2vpzPAM8ZwCiUjJ1wXxhq2trLJFgZXstr9E1z3yUSkZgV6TG1NKV9Q0hsqluZncRqXLXbIzMDHXvj77y1rakonT_ItAZMZD7mol4AN40tmmU4fXFnGoK-vhTLamWkVQmWdVODl51zI5QgB80S1Ae3lMRSPZmbPZIBHogp1XgpQM505UNjRzPyCh09)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9c99346017034878a14ecdfd704399fe&_e=oBqb3RxYvHDL-2owGougviN30Ci5nu91T4gcukQ8sXUC-2XqyzAgeGsWKPlqJWFutnuhzjLSzosvOFI-q8ycn7bpfqst150R8nBCJO79A3EIqbcqFfYCDCbPdm02BSb-QMAe6HqSotCSX51_IoWyc58VWBQl3kp9X42__zxQWvNkSWY-TZxfEiEdXQwuYmuXWyEAXtRmcKPt1Ij_uothfOggCSe5o2GnG-yvBCIcQuUYG-Kf8Cf3IndkYW_Jjeq5AHc966PCkGKUNSMzLhMhIH3oMq5_xPIWFjrIosacdmPJjkgzZ7IJJ82nq5Ts7wgPv-eKo9m-0CeUsCg5oFry_DZLRsut9QugEM8Lt-eQuMZHxvndyM40AjnALtocw58soGFHMIkDLGwAKE0k-W4DoFKX9o8KIp0nooekCcPKa_pmwd3kteXWTrRyAQ-1SmnPaaSAugYekCJibUHxEPfMubTCH9H2YQZa6FA1SgiR5pB9v2yRdbWPWRCf8Xgd87riUEus06k4x_K5WpBkacUR-MKojeyoPFWZvpLlV_nEpoGDyG6lBc7zy_jfGTgeNF66)

clean_body: I've been called husband, father, Coach, and Senator. Now, I'm running to be Governor. | Peter, It's me, Tommy Tuberville. Throughout my life, I've been called many names. Whether it's Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I've always led by example for those who depend on me. By the end of next year, I'm hoping you'll be able to call me Governor, too. This email is a little longer, but it's worth your time. I was born in Camden, Arkansas, as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to consistently work hard and stand on principle, which I've brought with me every step of my life. I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married three years later and have two amazing children, Tucker and Troy. They continue to make me proud every single day. After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University. Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards. I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn't done winning just yet. In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won. Throughout my time in Washington, D.C., I 've fought nonstop on President Trump's behalf. Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts, challenging the Biden-Harris Administration's Radical and harmful policies, or working with President Trump to secure our border, protect women in sports, and make our military prioritize readiness over wokeness, I always worked hard. I stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age. Now, I 'm running for Governor in Alabama so I can continue making an impact for my community back home. The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top gubernatorial targets to defeat in 2026. They're going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it's this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0. I 'm looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a political candidate, and I need your help to do so. I won't take up more of your time. Best, Coach Tommy Tuberville | Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

clean_body: Soros Plan EXPOSED >> Soros Plan EXPOSED >> | | | | | Patriot, I have some seriously concerning news to share with you. A Soros-funded organization called Texas Majority PAC has appeared in Texas and is plotting to take permanent control of our government by flipping Texas blue forever... Here is what Texas Majority PAC explains to its donors on its website: " ...We have one simple goal: to permanently flip Texas blue , thus releasing our state from Republican control and delivering two Democratic Senate seats and 40 Democratic Electoral College votes.This will effectively end the possibility of a Republican-controlled Senate or White House for generations ... " This is exactly why we can NEVER take our feet off the gas. The Left never sleeps as they ceaselessly plan to take power by any means necessary- can't let them do it. For Liberty, Ted Cruz PS: Please forward this email on to like-minded friends and family- thank you. | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | |

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I’m grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We met and exceeded our August fundraising goal.
#
I wanted to write a quick note to say thank you! Thanks to this grassroots team, we met and exceeded our August fundraising goal.
The summer is always a challenging time for campaign fundraising, and I’m incredibly grateful that I can count on supporters like you to help us meet our goals year-round.
Your support helps us knock doors, make phone calls, and run ads to reach Delawareans up and down the state as we prepare for next year’s midterms. We couldn’t do any of it without you!
****
[**If you’d like to help us get a head start on our September goal you can click here to pitch in any amount that works for you today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250902-1?refcode=em20250902-2311&refcode2=2311_21716_OCn4Yo&akid=2311%2E21716%2EOCn4Yo)

With gratitude,
Sarah

Team —
Give us a moment to explain why Senator Sherrod Brown deserves our attention.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114494583/567205442/-746039140?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTM4MjEyYS01NTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VM24QStJTdpmTPhLiVGhwOa2keZEdtrnPckNLsicBys=)
**Sherrod Brown was born and raised in Ohio. He’s dedicated his life to fighting for Ohioans and the Dignity of Work.** He believes that hard work should pay off for everyone — no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.
Years ago, a union steelworker gave him a pin of a yellow canary in a birdcage. It’s a reminder of a time when miners would bring canaries into the mines to check for dangerous levels of gas.
If the canary died, the miners knew to get out. At that time, workers didn’t have strong unions or a government that would fight for them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114494584/567205444/-746039140?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTM4MjEyYS01NTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VM24QStJTdpmTPhLiVGhwOa2keZEdtrnPckNLsicBys=)
Sherrod has worn this canary pin ever since to remember the workers he’s fighting so hard for every single day. It’s a reminder that the fight is still going — to support our country and the people who make it work.
Sherrod has taken on the tough fights in the U.S. Senate — working to stand up for working men and women against big corporations.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114494586/567205445/-746039140?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTM4MjEyYS01NTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VM24QStJTdpmTPhLiVGhwOa2keZEdtrnPckNLsicBys=)
**But now, Republicans are preparing to pour MILLIONS into attacking Sherrod and keeping his seat red.**
**[Pitch in $10 to help us support Democrats running in key swing races like Sherrod Brown and Flip the Senate >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114494587/567205448/-746039140?amount=10&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250902_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTM4MjEyYS01NTg4LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VM24QStJTdpmTPhLiVGhwOa2keZEdtrnPckNLsicBys=) **

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Politico: Judge rules Trump can't act as national police chief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25]
Peter ,
A federal judge just ruled that Donald Trump broke the law when he sent armed troops into Los Angeles to police American citizens, warning that Trump seems intent on "creating a national police force with the President as its chief."
This ruling is one of the many reasons why the upcoming Pennsylvania Supreme Court election matters so much. Trump's allies know the courts are the last line of defense, so they're trying to take them over. And right now, one of the most important courts in America, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, is on the ballot this November.
If MAGA extremists capture this court, they’ll have the power to greenlight Trump’s agenda for years to come, and that’s exactly why GOTV PAC is investing in Pennsylvania – to keep the courts as a check on Trump, not a rubber stamp.
Can you contribute today to GOTV PAC so we can defend the PA Supreme Court – one of the last true safeguards against Trump’s agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09022025&amount=25]

Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Jane Fonda via Maxwell Frost
subject: Tyranny in DC got my blood boiling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/teE0KYItskrMX1iA3rzhrA~~/AAPPABA~/lcUtoXbzjYleHRwCco8tFHwSkrSNeMkRc7j0ruytOQuPcXoedcHs971Nc5UW39OZvQM1n2MeTkfUySVlelP9kLNQS-szx6D-90m3z-tyD4w7NlcjTdsvxe3bO0-1S79XbY4sJ2DrowR1vcseu7Cv1cET6drNuu2XaAZn0F5fNJY90tQviF5ZH5igW_h8HIekZnYTx4c_XvlTDURtpTvHqbYWAd9m0ez1dBQHfoG3pv9X8R7qDVgZnjJ4rWew37VLT6hpapxWP5K53AN5Zo5ISEw1RdG_XwWuOEHDore4E22ezOcSg7KJ-WeITfH7GKaHgsIZKV-QE9-vqmx6BqH9qsxb0guk65GN4R3KETGL9W4~)
---
| | [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/teE0KYItskrMX1iA3rzhrA~~/AAPPABA~/lcUtoXbzjYleHRwCco8tFHwSkrSNeMkRc7j0ruytOQuPcXoedcHs971Nc5UW39OZvQM1n2MeTkfUySVlelP9kLNQS-szx6D-90m3z-tyD4w7NlcjTdsvxe3bO0-1S79XbY4sJ2DrowR1vcseu7Cv1cET6drNuu2XaAZn0F5fNJY90tQviF5ZH5igW_h8HIekZnYTx4c_XvlTDURtpTvHqbYWAd9m0ez1dBQHfoG3pv9X8R7qDVgZnjJ4rWew37VLT6hpapxWP5K53AN5Zo5ISEw1RdG_XwWuOEHDore4E22ezOcSg7KJ-WeITfH7GKaHgsIZKV-QE9-vqmx6BqH9qsxb0guk65GN4R3KETGL9W4~) Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. Maxwell Frost invited me to send this message to you, because he knows how urgently we need to act. Donald Trump is threatening to send troops into Chicago — and Illinois Governor JB Pritzker is giving him the only answer he deserves: **"Do not come to Chicago."** The Progressive Change Campaign Committee (PCCC) is blasting this message into Chicago streets on a rolling digital billboard truck alongside another truth: **"FASCISTS ARE NOT WELCOME."** This truck will circle Trump Tower and drive through Chicago’s busiest streets — with information helping people know their rights and learn how to fight back when Trump’s troopers invade. [**_When I saw this, I donated right away. If you are able, I hope you will too. Can you chip in to help the PCCC keep this truck rolling in Chicago — and to support Maxwell Frost’s continued fight against Trump’s oppressive agenda? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/teE0KYItskrMX1iA3rzhrA~~/AAPPABA~/lcUtoXbzjYleHRwCco8tFHwSkrSNeMkRc7j0ruytOQuPcXoedcHs971Nc5UW39OZvQM1n2MeTkfUySVlelP9kLNQS-szx6D-90m3z-tyD4w7NlcjTdsvxe3bO0-1S79XbY4sJ2DrowR1vcseu7Cv1cET6drNuu2XaAZn0F5fNJY90tQviF5ZH5igW_h8HIekZnYTx4c_XvlTDURtpTvHqbYWAd9m0ez1dBQHfoG3pv9X8R7qDVgZnjJ4rWew37VLT6hpapxWP5K53AN5Zo5ISEw1RdG_XwWuOEHDore4E22ezOcSg7KJ-WeITfH7GKaHgsIZKV-QE9-vqmx6BqH9qsxb0guk65GN4R3KETGL9W4~) What Trump is doing in Washington, D.C. is not just about intimidation — it’s about rehearsal. Every checkpoint, every armored vehicle, every overwhelming show of force is an exercise in how to control and subdue American cities. They used what they learned in Los Angeles when they descended on D.C., and they’ll use what they’ve learned in D.C. if they come to Chicago. And it won't stop there. We need to ensure people know their rights and know how to fight back. I’ve spent decades fighting for peace, justice, democracy, and climate action. At this stage of my life, I refuse to stand by while our cities are being occupied — with people living under the weight of armed troops and overwhelming, oppressive federal force. **Silence in moments like this is not an option.** [**_Can you chip in whatever you can so the PCCC can make sure Governor Pritzker’s defiance — and Chicago’s resistance — is shouted from every corner of the city, and help fuel Maxwell Frost’s critical work to confront Trump’s abuses? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/teE0KYItskrMX1iA3rzhrA~~/AAPPABA~/lcUtoXbzjYleHRwCco8tFHwSkrSNeMkRc7j0ruytOQuPcXoedcHs971Nc5UW39OZvQM1n2MeTkfUySVlelP9kLNQS-szx6D-90m3z-tyD4w7NlcjTdsvxe3bO0-1S79XbY4sJ2DrowR1vcseu7Cv1cET6drNuu2XaAZn0F5fNJY90tQviF5ZH5igW_h8HIekZnYTx4c_XvlTDURtpTvHqbYWAd9m0ez1dBQHfoG3pv9X8R7qDVgZnjJ4rWew37VLT6hpapxWP5K53AN5Zo5ISEw1RdG_XwWuOEHDore4E22ezOcSg7KJ-WeITfH7GKaHgsIZKV-QE9-vqmx6BqH9qsxb0guk65GN4R3KETGL9W4~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/wCiwDAQXQ22R0WunCpdQkg~~/AAPPABA~/mz3yiyzIDbFvQ6PL2mNZMFjK289bftA5bqfA49_LUg8FIsrY_BMBPlYELGFmOEYYRhCy13HsiMoy5DZGFTaRPAOISX-PqA6pV4CbT1P55W9RcCgNQirmh7WidYCWs3mct5YRsGs2Skovk3uDxs1SS88nnIhRAwsciypvT8ZaPyHzFiuiMoi6-UKRApd31zoL5k3PWNQYV_iiAMGCouP0twXWeF8jNn6vn2tFec0U-5vii-l6SsxMbcJ1jUG0JaXyo8b1MrRcQkDsFfu6FtBIWzop7LA1VCvgKQImLHaieaoXj4LY6tCqzmlP0DBnnV8nZAwik46lCGpw0jGyeKtq728erFxUlo5jlIDdcEYpoX0MQe3H9hOCu-ZXnbfq8X2HJ11Ffe_aiqvTvvIuW3AH3A~~)

clean_body: | ~ | | ~ Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. Maxwell Frost invited me to send this message to you, because he knows how urgently we need to act. Donald Trump is threatening to send troops into Chicago — and Illinois Governor JB Pritzker is giving him the only answer he deserves: "Do not come to Chicago." The Progressive Change Campaign Committee (PCCC) is blasting this message into Chicago streets on a rolling digital billboard truck alongside another truth: "FASCISTS ARE NOT WELCOME." This truck will circle Trump Tower and drive through Chicago’s busiest streets — with information helping people know their rights and learn how to fight back when Trump’s troopers invade. ~ What Trump is doing in Washington, D.C. is not just about intimidation — it’s about rehearsal. Every checkpoint, every armored vehicle, every overwhelming show of force is an exercise in how to control and subdue American cities. They used what they learned in Los Angeles when they descended on D.C., and they’ll use what they’ve learned in D.C. if they come to Chicago. And it won't stop there. We need to ensure people know their rights and know how to fight back. I’ve spent decades fighting for peace, justice, democracy, and climate action. At this stage of my life, I refuse to stand by while our cities are being occupied — with people living under the weight of armed troops and overwhelming, oppressive federal force. Silence in moments like this is not an option. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~ History is being written in real time. Together, let’s make sure it records that people rose up — loudly, visibly, and with determination — to confront and stop Trump’s authoritarian power grab. clean_body: With less than three months to go, we must increase our fundraising to counter Trump's billion-dollar war chest and reach undecided voters across Virginia. = Peter, the Virginia Governor's race is the most important race of 2025. Look at the evidence: First: Republicans won this seat by two points in 2021 in a devastating blow to Democrats. Then: Election analysts said Democrat Abigail Spanberger is favored to flip Virginia blue. Now: Trump started attacking Abigail and floated an endorsement of our opponent. If winning this election and defeating Trump's agenda is important to you, now is when Abigail Spanberger needs your support. = = = = = = = Thanks for stepping up, The Spanberger Campaign By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: DNC HQ
subject: We wanted to make sure you saw the news...
body:
---
Derek, we wanted to make sure you saw the news: **Last week in Iowa, Democrat Catelin Drey won her race for state Senate, flipping a seat that Donald Trump won by over 10 percent.** In the closing stretch of the campaign, the DNC deployed our distributed organizing team of over 30,000 volunteers to assist with GOTV and help Iowans make a plan to vote. And Derek, that work is only possible because of the support of supporters like you. Supporters like **you broke the supermajority** in Iowa’s state Senate. Supporters like **you helped Democrats win** or overperform in 39 out of 40 key elections so far in 2025. [**And now, we’re calling on you to make your first gift to continue this momentum of winning and overperforming nationwide.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250902_4487_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4487_22930333_yREYtl&akid=4487%2E22930333%2EyREYtl) The GOP and Donald Trump are watching Democrats win across the country right now, and it’s making them nervous. **That’s why they’re trying to rig electoral maps across the nation in their favor.** [**Democrats across the country are standing united to oppose Donald Trump and kick Republicans out of office. If this work matters to you, please chip in $3 to the DNC today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250902_4487_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4487_22930333_yREYtl&akid=4487%2E22930333%2EyREYtl) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250902_4487_fr&refcode2=4487_22930333_yREYtl&akid=4487%2E22930333%2EyREYtl)**
